The company is investing in research and development to introduce advanced materials such as high-purity silicon carbide, ceramics for electronics and semiconductors, and solid oxide fuel cells. These initiatives aim to diversify CUMI's offerings and tap into high-growth sectors.

Name: Schaeffler India Ltd
Overview:
Schaeffler India Ltd, part of the global Schaeffler Group, is a leading manufacturer and distributor of high-precision roller and ball bearings, engine and transmission systems, chassis components, clutch systems, and industrial machinery. The company is recognized for its technological leadership, continuous innovation, and commitment to high-quality standards. Its strong focus on localization, R&D, and digital-ready products keeps it ahead in the competitive auto and industrial components market.
 
 Business Segments
 Automotive Technologies:
 Provides cutting-edge products for ICE, hybrid, and electric vehicles, covering engine, transmission, and chassis applications. Major clients include top OEMs and tier-1 suppliers.
 
 Industrial:
 Offers a broad portfolio of high-speed, high-precision bearings and smart solutions for diverse industries — including railways, renewable energy, machine tools, and process industries.
 
 Automotive Aftermarket:
 Serves the global spare parts market with high-quality repair solutions — replacement clutches, transmission kits, and engine components — for a wide range of vehicles.
 
 Special Machinery:
 Designs and builds new production machinery and modernizes existing lines across its Indian plants, driving operational efficiency and advanced manufacturing capabilities.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Schaeffler India is actively expanding its capabilities in powertrain and e-mobility solutions to meet the growing demand in the automotive and industrial sectors. The company has invested ₹1,700 crore over the past three years to enhance its manufacturing facilities and product offerings. Schaeffler India has also strengthened its presence in the digital automotive aftermarket space with the acquisition of Koovers, a B2B e-commerce platform.

Name: Wendt India Ltd
Overview:
Wendt India Ltd, established in 1980, is a leading manufacturer specializing in super abrasives, machining tools, and precision components. As a joint venture between Wendt GmbH (37.5%) and Carborundum Universal Ltd (37.5%), the company combines German engineering expertise with Indian manufacturing capabilities.

The company operates through three primary segments: Super Abrasives, Machines and Accessories, and Precision Products. Super Abrasives, including diamond and cubic boron nitride (CBN) grinding wheels, constitute the largest revenue share.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Wendt India aims to leverage its strong product portfolio and technological expertise to capitalize on growth opportunities in sectors such as automotive, aerospace, and defense. The company plans to enhance its export presence and focus on innovation to drive future growth.

Name: Timken India Ltd
Overview:
Timken India Ltd, part of the global Timken Group, manufactures, distributes, and sells anti-friction bearings, components, accessories, and mechanical power transmission products. Its portfolio spans engineered bearings, linear motion systems, lubrication solutions, and drive products under globally recognized brands. The company serves a wide industrial base, including railways, process industries, automotive, energy, and heavy engineering.

With manufacturing facilities in Jamshedpur and Bharuch, Timken India is expanding its footprint through new capacity additions in cylindrical roller bearings (CRB), spherical roller bearings (SRB), and plain bearings. The business leverages R&D and technology from its parent company while diversifying into non-bearing products and industrial services for long-term growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management remains cautiously optimistic, focusing on ramping up new capacities, defending leadership in the railway segment, penetrating domestic markets for CRB/SRB, and diversifying export destinations. Margin improvement towards the 20%+ range will hinge on volume growth and operating leverage. Medium-term growth levers include capacity expansion, non-bearing product rollout, and stronger participation in high-potential sectors such as wind, solar, and process industries.

Name: SKF India Ltd
Overview:
SKF India Ltd, a subsidiary of AB SKF, is a leading supplier of bearings, seals, mechatronics, and lubrication systems in India. Established in 1961, the company has built a strong reputation for innovative solutions aimed at reducing friction and enhancing reliability across diverse industries. With state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in Pune, Bengaluru, and Haridwar, along with an extensive distributor network, SKF India caters to both industrial and automotive segments.

The company operates through well-diversified business verticals, offering tailored solutions for Indian OEMs, industrial customers, and global export markets. SKF India has consistently strengthened its market position by focusing on customer-centric strategies, sustainability initiatives, and technological innovations, while also preparing for a strategic demerger to unlock greater value for its industrial and automotive businesses.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management remains committed to driving profitable growth by expanding its e-mobility offerings, accelerating innovation, and deepening OEM partnerships in the automotive segment, while focusing on vertical-specific solutions and global positioning for the industrial segment. With ongoing investments in sustainability, operational excellence, and digitalization, SKF India is well-positioned to double its business by 2030 at improved margins.

Name: NRB Bearings Ltd
Overview:
NRB Bearings Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in needle and cylindrical roller bearings, serving the automotive, industrial, and agricultural sectors. Established in 1965, the company operates multiple manufacturing facilities across India and Thailand, producing a wide range of anti-friction solutions. With a strong global presence, NRB Bearings caters to both domestic and international markets.

The company offers a diverse product portfolio, including needle roller bearings, cylindrical roller bearings, tapered roller bearings, special ball bearings, thrust bearings, and other anti-friction solutions such as planetary shafts and pins. NRB Bearings is committed to innovation and quality, continuously enhancing its manufacturing capabilities to meet the evolving needs of its customers.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
NRB Bearings Ltd aims to expand its global footprint by enhancing manufacturing capabilities and exploring new markets. The company plans to invest in research and development to innovate and improve its product offerings. With a strong order book and focus on operational excellence, NRB Bearings is well-positioned to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the bearing industry.

Name: Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd
Overview:
Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd, established in 1993, is a prominent Indian manufacturer specializing in alcoholic beverages, including beer and Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL). The company operates multiple breweries across India, focusing on delivering quality products to meet the growing demand in the domestic market.

SDBL has a significant presence in the beer segment, with a portfolio of popular brands catering to diverse consumer preferences. The company is also expanding its footprint in the IMFL category, aiming to capitalize on the increasing consumption trends in India.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Looking ahead, SDBL aims to achieve a revenue target of ₹2,000 crore by FY27. The company plans to expand its presence in Uttar Pradesh and strengthen its IMFL segment to drive growth.

Name: Tilaknagar Industries Ltd
Overview:
Tilaknagar Industries Ltd is one of India’s prominent manufacturers of Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL), producing a diverse range of spirits including whisky, brandy, rum, gin, and vodka. The company enjoys strong brand recognition and market presence across domestic markets.

Its operations primarily revolve around the production and distribution of IMFL. The business is supported by an extensive distribution network and a portfolio of trusted brands, allowing effective reach into retail and institutional segments across India.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
With its enhanced financial performance, strong domestic positioning, and expanding premium portfolio, Tilaknagar is well-positioned for continued growth in FY26. Sustained margin improvement and operational control, combined with a robust brand mix, pave the way for sustained momentum in the year ahead.

Name: United Breweries Ltd
Overview:
United Breweries Limited is a leading player in the Indian alcoholic beverages industry, engaged in the manufacturing and sale of beer and non-alcoholic beverages. The company operates with a strong brand portfolio, anchored by flagship names like Kingfisher and Heineken, supported by premium variants and regional brands.

UBL’s operations span across multiple states, with a focus on both volume growth and premiumization. The business model combines in-house manufacturing with contract brewing to optimize capacity, while strategic investments in supply chain, distribution, and brand innovation drive its competitive edge.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
UBL aims to drive growth through accelerated premiumization, capacity expansion, and execution excellence in distribution. The company is cautiously optimistic on margins for FY26, expecting short-term pressure from contract brewing and inflation, but anticipates medium-term improvement as new capacity comes online and premium share rises.

Name: Sula Vineyards Ltd
Overview:
Sula Vineyards Limited, incorporated in 2003, is India’s largest wine producer and seller. The company has been instrumental in creating and expanding the wine culture in the country, establishing itself as the market leader with a strong portfolio of brands across different categories. Its operations include winemaking, distribution, and promotion of wine consumption in India.

Alongside its core wine business, Sula has also developed a strong presence in wine tourism through vineyard resorts, tasting rooms, and hospitality services. This integrated business model not only strengthens brand visibility but also creates multiple consumer touchpoints, driving growth across both products and experiences.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
With the urban discretionary slowdown receding, Sula is positioned to leverage its premium product portfolio and experiential tourism offerings for recovery. Infrastructure tailwinds like the Samruddhi Highway, new tasting rooms (e.g., Dindori), and innovations like the low-alcohol Muscat Blanc wine, are expected to bolster demand.

Name: Globus Spirits Ltd
Overview:
Globus Spirits Ltd is a prominent player in the Indian alcoholic beverage industry, engaged in the manufacturing and marketing of Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL) and country liquor. The company operates multiple distilleries and has a strong distribution network across India.

In FY25, Globus Spirits faced challenges due to increased raw material costs, impacting its profitability. However, the company is focusing on strategic initiatives to improve margins and drive growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Globus Spirits aims to improve its profitability by enhancing operational efficiencies and expanding its product offerings. The company is focusing on increasing its presence in the premium IMFL segment and exploring new markets.

Name: Radico Khaitan Ltd
Overview:
Radico Khaitan Ltd, originally incorporated as Rampur Distillery Company in 1943, is a leading Indian manufacturer in the Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL) industry. Having transitioned from bottling for armed forces and other branded players, the company made a pivotal move in 1997 by launching its own brands. The first in-house brand, 8PM whisky, quickly achieved million-case sales and established Radico as a prominent IMFL brand owner.

Today, Radico Khaitan holds a diverse brand portfolio including Magic Moments Vodka, Morpheus Brandy, and Rampur Indian Single Malt. The company boasts a widespread presence both domestically and internationally, exporting to over 102 countries. It continues to invest in premium and luxury product innovation, while enhancing its manufacturing capacity and distribution network to support long-term growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Radico Khaitan is focusing on expanding its premium and luxury spirits portfolio, aiming to achieve ₹500 crore in revenue from this segment in the near term. The company plans to launch two new luxury products, including a super-premium whisky, to cater to the growing demand for high-end alcoholic beverages.

Name: G M Breweries Ltd
Overview:
G M Breweries Ltd, incorporated in 1981, is a leading manufacturer and marketer of alcoholic beverages in Maharashtra. The company holds a dominant position in the country liquor segment, where it enjoys a monopoly in Mumbai, Thane, and Palghar districts. Its operations contribute significantly to the state’s excise revenues, underscoring its market influence.

The company’s brand portfolio includes G.M. Santra, G.M. Doctor, G.M. Limbu Punch, among others, distributed largely in PET bottles, which constituted 93% of production and sales in FY25. With a fully automated plant in Thane capable of producing 50,000 cases a day, GMBL has emerged as the single largest country liquor manufacturer in the state.
Key Takeways:
Growth & Outlook
The company aims to optimize utilization levels beyond the current 55.74% to unlock higher operating leverage in the coming years. With strong cash reserves, investments, and no operational bottlenecks in PET usage (pending final judgment), GMBL is well-positioned to sustain profitability.

Name: Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd
Overview:
Associated Alcohols & Breweries Limited: Associated Alcohols & Breweries specializes in the production and distribution of a broad range of alcoholic beverages, including Indian-made foreign liquor (IMFL), country liquor, and beer, catering to diverse consumer preferences. The company’s portfolio includes 10–15 key brands, supported by modern production facilities that maintain >98% operational efficiency and batch quality compliance exceeding 99%.

With an extensive domestic distribution network spanning thousands of retail outlets and distributors and exports to 10–12 countries, the company ensures strong market reach and visibility. Committed to sustainability, operations incorporate energy-efficient processes, water management, and eco-friendly production techniques, reducing carbon footprint by 10–15% annually.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook: 
With rising domestic alcoholic beverage consumption (projected 5–7% CAGR) and favorable ethanol policy incentives, revenue growth of 15–20% over the next 3 years is expected, supported by international expansion and product diversification.

Name: Varun Beverages Ltd
Overview:
Varun Beverages Ltd (VBL) is one of the largest global franchisees of PepsiCo, primarily operating in the beverage sector with a wide-ranging product portfolio. The company manufactures and distributes carbonated soft drinks, non-carbonated beverages, and packaged water under PepsiCo's brand umbrella. Strongly affiliated with the RJ Group, VBL leverages synergies with popular QSR brands to enhance its market presence.
 
 Business Segments and Revenue Contribution (FY2025 approximate estimates)
 Geographic Revenue Split:
 
 Indian Subcontinent Countries (India, Sri Lanka, Nepal): ~60-65% of total revenue
 
 African Operations (Morocco, Zambia, Nigeria): ~20-25% of total revenue
 
 Other markets/segments: ~10-15%
 
 Product Mix:
 
 Carbonated Soft Drinks (CSDs): Majority revenue contributor (60-70% of beverage sales)
 
 Non-Carbonated Beverages (juices, water, etc.): Significant portion (~25-30%)
 
 Packaged Water: Smaller but growing segment (~10%)
 
 Total consolidated revenue is estimated to be in the range of ₹15,000 - ₹18,000 crore (₹150-180 billion).
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Varun Beverages’ growth is driven by geographic expansion into new Indian territories and increased penetration in African markets, alongside product innovation through new beverages and snack offerings in collaboration with PepsiCo. Investments in refrigeration and cold chain infrastructure support higher sales, particularly in premium segments, while backward integration of PET and crown cap production strengthens supply chain security and cost efficiency.

Name: India Glycols Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1988, India Glycols Ltd. is a leading green chemical company in India. The company specializes in manufacturing bio-based chemicals, including bulk and specialty chemicals, natural gums, industrial gases, potable spirits, and nutraceuticals. India Glycols operates three integrated manufacturing facilities spread over approximately 360 acres and exports to over 40 countries .

The company's product portfolio is organized into four main segments: Bio-Based Specialties & Performance Chemicals (BSPC), Potable Spirits (PS), Bio-Fuel (BF), and Ennature Biopharma (EB).
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
India Glycols anticipates continued growth in its Bio-Fuel segment, projecting a 35% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) over FY24–26. The company is also focusing on expanding its ethanol capacity, which is expected to reach 1,070 KLPD in FY25

Name: Piccadily Agro Industries Ltd
Overview:
Piccadily Agro Industries began as a sugar manufacturing company and later expanded into the distillery business. Today, it is a vertically integrated agribev player, producing sugar, ethanol, and premium spirits under renowned brands such as Indri Single Malt Whisky and Camikara rum. The company’s modern facility in Haryana enables it to deliver quality products across domestic and global markets.

Its strategic shift towards premium spirits, coupled with its core sugar operations, positions it as an emerging leader in India’s alco-bev industry. The company leverages its manufacturing base for sugar and distillery to support growth in brand-led premiums.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Continued traction in premium spirits, global brand expansion, and new capacity commissions are expected to fuel growth and margin enhancement. The sugar segment remains important for steady cash flows, while the distillery enterprise is poised for accelerated growth and profitability.

Name: United Spirits Ltd
Overview:
Diageo India (formerly United Spirits Ltd) is a leading beverage alcohol company in India and a subsidiary of global giant Diageo PLC. It manufactures, sells, and distributes a diverse portfolio of premium alcoholic beverages, including Scotch whisky, IMFL whisky, brandy, rum, vodka, and gin. The company boasts over 80 brands, with multiple high-volume sellers, and holds a dominant position in the Indian spirits market.
 
 Business Segments
 Whisky: Including Scotch whisky and Indian-made foreign liquor (IMFL) whisky, with a 45% share in the Indian whiskey market.
 
 Other Spirits: Brandy, rum, vodka, gin, and other alcoholic beverages.
 
 New Product Innovations: Recent launches such as Epitome Reserve, Godawan, and Royal Challenge American Pride.
 
 Revenue Mix (Indicative Approximate Percentages)
 Whisky (Scotch & IMFL): ~70% of total revenue, driven by strong market share in whiskey segment.
 
 Other Spirits (Brandy, Rum, Vodka, Gin): ~25% of revenue.
 
 New Brands and Innovations: ~5%, growing as the company introduces new products to capture evolving consumer trends.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

United Spirits (McDowell‑N) is leveraging its dominant 25% market share in India’s spirits industry and a premium brand portfolio to drive growth. It’s innovating with new brand launches and investing in branding and export opportunities, especially if facilitated by an India–UK FTA. Ongoing product renovation and strategic launches aim to sustain market leadership amid a dynamic pricing environment.

Name: Allied Blenders & Distillers Ltd
Overview:
Allied Blenders and Distillers Ltd (ABDL), incorporated in 2008, is India’s largest spirits company by volume, specializing in the manufacture, purchase, and sale of alcoholic beverages across whisky, brandy, rum, vodka, and gin categories. It commands an 8% market share in India’s IMFL segment, with a total volume of 33.1 million cases in FY25, and owns four ‘Millionaire’ brands selling over one million cases annually. Its flagship brands include Officer’s Choice, Officer’s Choice Blue, Sterling Reserve B7 and B10, Kyron Brandy, Zoya Gin, and ICONiQ White Whisky—the latter recognized as the fastest-growing whisky brand globally in CY2023.

ABDL operates 9 owned distilleries and 34 bottling units (9 owned, 6 exclusive third-party, 19 non-exclusive) across India, producing 66% of its ENA requirements in-house, with projects underway to achieve 100% captive supply. The company has expanded its international presence to 27 countries, with strong positioning in the Middle East, Africa, and approvals in North America and the EU. Strategic capex of ₹525 crore is planned by FY27, focusing on capacity expansion, backward integration, and premium segment growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management targets EBITDA margins above 15% within three years, aided by backward integration benefits, the UK FTA (customs duty cuts boosting imported Scotch margins), and continued premiumization. P&A and luxury segments are expected to outpace industry growth, with super-premium volumes projected to double in four years. International expansion, niche brand innovation, and high-margin southern market penetration are positioned as key growth levers, while disciplined working capital management supports debt reduction and free cash flow generation despite regulatory and receivables headwinds.

Name: Jagatjit Industries Ltd
Overview: Jagatjit Industries Ltd is a multi-product company engaged in the manufacture and sale of alcoholic beverages, food products, and real estate. The company's beverage segment includes the production of Extra Neutral Alcohol (ENA), Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL), Country Liquor (CL), and other alcoholic products. Jagatjit Industries Ltd also manufactures malted milk food and malt extract.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Jagatjit Industries Ltd is driving its next phase of growth through strategic expansion and diversification. The company has started commercial operations at a new grain-based ethanol facility in Punjab with a significant daily capacity, expected to generate a substantial addition to its revenue and boost margins by 8–10 percentage points.

Name: Medicamen Biotech Ltd
Overview:
Medicamen Biotech Ltd, established in 1993, is a research-driven pharmaceutical company specializing in the development, manufacturing, and marketing of generic finished dosage formulations. The company focuses on a diverse range of therapeutic areas, including oncology formulations, catering to both domestic and international markets.

Headquartered in India, Medicamen Biotech has expanded its global presence through strategic partnerships and regulatory approvals. Notably, the company has received EU GMP certification for its manufacturing facility in Bhiwadi, Rajasthan, and has entered into agreements to register and market its products in South Africa, a market valued at $4 billion.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Medicamen Biotech is poised for continued growth, driven by its innovative product offerings and strategic expansions. The company's focus on diversifying its product line and expanding its global presence positions it well to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the digital lending and supply chain finance sectors.

Name: Nazara Technologies Ltd
Overview:
Nazara Technologies is a leading India-based diversified gaming and sports media platform with a significant presence in both emerging and developed global markets, including Africa and North America. The company offers a comprehensive suite of offerings across interactive gaming, eSports, and gamified early learning ecosystems. Nazara's strategic acquisitions and investments have bolstered its position in the gaming industry, enabling it to expand its portfolio and reach a broader audience.

In recent years, Nazara has focused on enhancing its product offerings and expanding its global footprint. The company's commitment to innovation and strategic growth initiatives has positioned it well to capitalize on the increasing demand for digital entertainment and gaming experiences worldwide. As the gaming industry continues to evolve, Nazara remains dedicated to delivering engaging and immersive experiences to its users.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Nazara Technologies aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its high-margin gaming verticals and leveraging its global acquisitions. The company's strategic focus on innovation and user engagement is expected to drive sustained profitability and market expansion in the coming years.

Name: Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd
Overview:
Network18 Media & Investments Limited is one of India’s most diversified media and entertainment groups with a presence across news, entertainment, sports, movies, and live events. It operates through multiple platforms, including television, digital media, print, and experiential events, catering to a wide range of audiences across the country. Its portfolio includes leading national and regional channels, digital platforms, and publishing brands, offering a blend of news and entertainment content.

The company’s integrated presence across broadcasting, digital, and print enables it to leverage synergies and deliver consistent content experiences. Network18 has established strong brands in both English and regional markets, ensuring wide reach and influence. It continues to invest in technology, content creation, and distribution to maintain leadership in India’s rapidly evolving media landscape.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Network18 expects FY26 growth to be driven by strong sports properties, continued expansion in digital, and recovery in ad spends as the macro environment improves. The company aims to enhance profitability through operating leverage, diversified revenue streams, and strategic investments in content and technology.

Name: Prime Focus Ltd
Overview:
Prime Focus Ltd is a prominent player in the media and entertainment industry, specializing in post-production services, visual effects (VFX), and animation. The company operates through its subsidiaries, including Prime Focus Technologies and DNEG, offering a comprehensive suite of services to global studios and content creators.

With a strong presence in both the Indian and international markets, Prime Focus Ltd has established itself as a leading provider of media services, catering to the evolving needs of the entertainment industry. The company's commitment to innovation and quality has enabled it to maintain a competitive edge in the dynamic media landscape.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Prime Focus Ltd aims to strengthen its position in the global media services market by expanding its service offerings and enhancing operational efficiencies. The company plans to leverage its technological capabilities and industry expertise to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the entertainment sector, aiming for sustained growth and profitability in the coming years.

Name: Saregama India Ltd
Overview:
Saregama India Limited, established in 1902, is the country’s oldest music label and a diversified pure-play content company with IP ownership across music, films, TV, and digital media. The company holds one of the largest music catalogues in India, with 1.75 lakh songs spanning 23+ languages, and engages in music licensing, artist management, and retail, alongside video content production and live events. Its portfolio is monetized through streaming platforms, broadcasting channels, social media, and brand partnerships.

In recent years, Saregama has expanded into influencer and artist management, building a base of over 230 talents with a combined social media reach of ~200 million. Strategic initiatives in FY26 include the acquisition of NAV Records, strengthening regional content (especially Haryanvi), and disciplined capital allocation towards high-ROI music and video projects. The company maintains a strong digital footprint with 112 million YouTube subscribers and a growing share of subscription-led revenues.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management guides for an adjusted EBITDA margin of 32–33% in FY26, with sustained growth in music licensing, artist management, and video content. Over FY26–27, ₹700 crore will be invested in content, targeting 25–30% share of new music. Long-term growth is expected to remain steady for 20–30 years, driven by digital consumption expansion, structural monetization shifts, and disciplined investment in high-ROI content.

Name: Tips Music Ltd
Overview:
Tips Industries Limited, incorporated in 1996, operates in music production, acquisition, and exploitation of rights, alongside film production and distribution. The company is a leading name in the Indian music industry and also has a strong position in the Punjabi film segment.

Over the years, Tips has built a robust catalogue of songs from the 1990s and 2000s, which continues to generate significant revenue streams. Its focus on both digital platforms and non-digital formats allows it to maintain resilience amid industry disruptions, while expanding its reach through automation and new content releases.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management remains cautiously optimistic, targeting at least 20% revenue and PAT growth with aspirations to achieve 30%. The strength of its catalogue, expanding digital opportunities, and evolving monetization models position Tips well for long-term growth, despite near-term disruptions.

Name: Zee Entertainment Enterprises Ltd
Overview:
Zee Entertainment Enterprises Ltd (ZEEL) is a leading integrated media and entertainment company primarily operating in satellite television broadcasting, content creation, and digital streaming across multiple languages and genres. With a vast audience reach, ZEEL delivers entertainment via its TV channels, digital platform ZEE5, movies, music, and live events, focusing on content quality and technological innovation.

The company is actively transforming its brand and business model to become a content and technology powerhouse, enhancing digital offerings and expanding into new content formats and markets. This strategic repositioning aims to sustain growth and profitability amid evolving industry dynamics and increasing competition.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
ZEEL is committed to accelerating growth, profitability, and cash flow in FY26 through enhanced content-led ratings, digital subscriber expansion, and cost discipline. With the digital business targeting break-even and advertising revenues expected to rebound, the company is well-positioned to leverage industry consolidation and upcoming festive season tailwinds.

Name: PVR Inox Ltd
Overview:
PVR Limited is India’s largest and most premium multiplex cinema exhibitor, pioneering the multiplex revolution since 1997. It operates a wide network of cinemas and screens across many cities, offering a premium big-screen movie experience with a focus on innovation and operational excellence.

Despite challenges in content flow, especially from Bollywood and Hollywood, PVR continues to adapt by expanding regional and dubbed content and evolving its operating model toward asset-light growth. The company remains a key player in the cinema and entertainment ecosystem, closely linked with retail malls and real estate developers.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management aims to continue deleveraging aggressively, targeting negligible net debt in 2-3 years before considering dividends or buybacks. They are cautiously optimistic about medium to long-term growth, supported by a robust content pipeline, strong developer support for multiplexes as mall anchors, and the transition to asset-light business models that will lower capex intensity without compromising growth. Management remains confident in the enduring relevance of cinema in India’s entertainment landscape despite current headwinds.

Name: Sun TV Network Ltd
Overview: Sun TV Network Limited, incorporated in 1985 and rebranded in 1993, is one of India’s leading television broadcasters. It operates satellite channels in Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Bangla, and a digital OTT platform—SUNNXT. It owns IPL franchise SunRisers Hyderabad and SunRisers Eastern Cape, and has expanded into FM radio. The company is renowned for its strong viewership across South Indian languages and its growing footprint in sports and digital media.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
While FY25 experienced a dip in operating revenue, Sun TV Network sustained strong EBITDA and PAT performance, thanks to its well-diversified income base that includes subscription, sports franchises, and content licensing. The early FY26 performance shows continued headwinds in advertising, but growing subscription income and sports revenues offer a stabilizing effect. The company’s future growth will depend on scaling its OTT platform, monetizing premium content, and leveraging its cricket franchises to offset cyclical downturns in ad spending.

Name: Abans Financial Services Ltd
Overview:
Abans Financial Services Ltd, formerly known as Abans Holdings, is a prominent player in the Indian financial services sector, offering a wide range of services including investment banking, wealth management, and advisory services. The company caters to a diverse clientele, including individuals, corporations, and institutions, and is recognized for its innovative solutions and customer-centric approach.

With a strong presence in major financial hubs across India, Abans Financial Services Ltd is expanding its footprint into other regions. The company leverages advanced technology to provide seamless and efficient services while ensuring personalized financial solutions. Its team of experienced professionals is dedicated to delivering effective and customized financial strategies to clients.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Abans Financial Services Ltd plans to expand its service offerings and geographic presence to tap into new markets. The company is investing in technology to enhance service delivery and operational efficiency. Additionally, Abans Financial Services Ltd aims to strengthen its team through training and development programs to maintain high service standards.

Name: Centrum Capital Ltd
Overview:
entrum Capital Limited is a diversified financial services firm headquartered in Mumbai, India. Established in 1977, the company is registered as a Category-I Merchant Banker with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI). It offers a comprehensive suite of services including investment banking, lending, wealth management, broking, bond trading, and insurance. 

The company operates through various subsidiaries and divisions, each specializing in different aspects of financial services. Centrum Broking Limited provides stock broking services, while Centrum Wealth Limited focuses on wealth management solutions.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Centrum Capital aims to leverage its diversified service offerings and digital initiatives to drive growth. The company's focus on expanding its digital platforms, such as Centrum GalaxC, is expected to enhance customer experience and broaden its client base.

Name: 5paisa Capital Ltd
Overview:
5paisa Capital Ltd, established in 2007, is a prominent player in the Indian capital markets, offering a comprehensive suite of financial services. The company provides broking services, facilitating trading across equities, derivatives, and commodities. 

Additionally, it offers mutual fund investments, insurance products, and personal loans, catering to a diverse clientele. With a strong digital presence, 5paisa Capital has expanded its reach to over 142 cities across India and has a significant international footprint in Singapore.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
5paisa Capital Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its customer base and enhancing its service offerings. The company plans to launch innovative products and upgrade its technology platforms to improve customer experience.

Name: SMC Global Securities Ltd
Overview:
SMC Global Securities Ltd, established in 1994, is a diversified financial services company based in India. The company offers a comprehensive range of services, including equity and commodity broking, online trading, depository services, investment banking, wealth management, insurance broking, and distribution of third-party financial products. With a strong presence across various segments, SMC Global caters to both retail and institutional clients, providing them with integrated financial solutions.

The company operates through multiple subsidiaries, each specializing in different aspects of financial services. This diversified approach allows SMC Global to leverage synergies across its businesses and offer a holistic suite of services to its clients.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
SMC Global Securities Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its service offerings and enhancing customer experience. The company plans to leverage technology to streamline operations and improve service delivery. With a strong financial foundation and a diversified business model, SMC Global is well-positioned to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the financial services secto

Name: Geojit Financial Services Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1987 and headquartered in Kochi, Kerala, Geojit Financial Services Ltd is a prominent Indian investment services company. The company offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services, including online broking, mutual fund distribution, portfolio management services (PMS), life and general insurance, and commodities trading.

The company has been at the forefront of digital innovation in the financial services industry, providing clients with a suite of digital tools and platforms for seamless investment management.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Geojit aims to enhance its client base and expand its distribution network. The company plans to onboard 25 to 30 lakh new clients and increase its branch network by 200 locations over the next five years.

Name: Monarch Networth Capital Ltd
Overview:
Monarch Networth Capital Limited is a diversified financial services firm headquartered in Ahmedabad, India. Formed through the strategic amalgamation of Monarch Group of Companies and Networth Stock Broking Ltd., the company offers a comprehensive suite of services encompassing stock broking, primary market operations, mutual funds, insurance, and financial planning.

The company is listed on the NSE under the ticker symbol MONARCH and is led by CEO Manju S. Bafna. Monarch Networth Capital's operations are supported by a robust technological infrastructure, enabling efficient execution of financial services.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Monarch Networth Capital aims to further expand its market presence through strategic initiatives and technological advancements. The company is focused on enhancing its digital platforms to provide seamless and efficient services to its clients.

Name: Share India Securities Ltd
Overview:
Share India Securities Ltd, founded in 1994, is a technology-driven financial services provider offering a wide range of capital market solutions to retail and institutional clients. Its services include equity and derivatives trading, currency and commodity broking, depository participant services, and mutual fund advisory. Over the years, the company has expanded into portfolio management, merchant banking, and other investment services, leveraging a robust technology platform.

Evolving from a traditional brokerage into a diversified tech-based financial services firm, Share India now integrates algorithmic trading, wealth management, and capital market advisory under one roof. With a focus on innovation, operational efficiency, and market expansion, the company aims to cater to investors across geographies, particularly underserved Tier 2, 3, and 4 cities.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management guides for 20–25% revenue growth, contingent on stable regulatory conditions. The focus remains on expanding retail and institutional reach, scaling wealth-tech offerings, and reducing reliance on proprietary trading. Technology-led platforms and diversified product lines are expected to drive sustainable growth over the medium term.

Name: Anand Rathi Share & Stock Brokers Ltd
Overview:
Anand Rathi Share & Stock Brokers Ltd (ARSSBL) is a prominent full-service brokerage firm in India, offering a comprehensive suite of financial services. Established in 1991, the company provides broking services in equities, derivatives, commodities, and currency markets. Additionally, ARSSBL offers margin trading facilities and distributes a range of financial products under the 'Anand Rathi' brand. 

Catering to a diverse clientele—including retail investors, high-net-worth individuals (HNIs), ultra-HNIs, and institutional clients—the firm operates primarily in the stock broking segment. Its services encompass cash-delivery and intra-day trading, as well as assistance with initial public offerings (IPOs) and other investment avenues. The company has a significant presence in India and the United Arab Emirates
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

ARSSBL has set ambitious growth targets, aiming for a 20–25% increase in revenue and a 30–35% rise in profit over the next few years. The company plans to achieve this by expanding its client base, enhancing digital platforms, and introducing innovative financial products. Additionally, ARSSBL intends to strengthen its presence in underserved markets and leverage emerging technologies to improve operational efficiency and client engagement

Name: Indo Thai Securities Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1995 and headquartered in Indore, India, Indo Thai Securities Ltd (ITSL) is a prominent full-service brokerage firm. The company operates as a member of both the National Stock Exchange (NSE) and the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE), providing a comprehensive range of financial services. These services encompass equity, derivatives, currency, and debt broking, catering to retail investors, high-net-worth individuals, and corporate clients. 

Additionally, ITSL offers mutual fund distribution and acts as a depository participant with Central Depository Services (India) Ltd (CDSL), facilitating dematerialization and settlement of trades. The company is also engaged in real estate activities and environmental technology manufacturing
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Indo Thai Securities Ltd is focused on expanding its digital presence by enhancing its online trading platforms and introducing innovative financial products. The company aims to increase its retail investor base by offering user-friendly interfaces and real-time market insights. Additionally, ITSL plans to strengthen its wealth management services to cater to the growing demand for personalized financial planning.

Name: Dhani Services Ltd
Overview:
Dhani Services Ltd, incorporated in 1992, is an Indian technology-driven financial services company offering a range of subscription-based healthcare and transaction finance services through its 'Dhani' app. The company also engages in diverse business activities, including asset reconstruction and stock broking.

The company's business model focuses on integrating various financial services into a single platform, catering to the growing demand for digital financial solutions in India. By offering services such as personal loans, insurance, and healthcare benefits, Dhani Services seeks to empower individuals with comprehensive financial tools.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Dhani Services Ltd aims to enhance its digital platform to offer more personalized and efficient financial solutions. The company plans to expand its service offerings and improve customer experience through technological innovations. With a focus on sustainable growth and operational excellence, Dhani Services is well-positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for digital financial services in India.

Name: Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd
Overview:
Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd is one of India’s oldest and most trusted asset management firms, established as a joint venture between Canara Bank and ORIX Corporation Europe N.V. With a legacy spanning over three decades, the company offers a diverse range of investment products, including equity, debt, and hybrid mutual funds, catering to both retail and institutional investors. 

Canara Robeco managed an average assets under management (AUM) of ₹1.11 lakh crore, with nearly 91% allocated to equity schemes, reflecting its strong presence in the equity mutual fund segment. The company operates through a robust distribution network comprising over 52,000 partners, including Canara Bank’s extensive branch network, facilitating widespread access to its investment products across India.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd is focused on expanding its footprint in India's rapidly growing mutual fund market by enhancing its digital capabilities and broadening its product offerings. The company aims to leverage its strong distribution network and the increasing adoption of digital investment platforms to attract a broader base of retail investors, particularly in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. By offering tailored investment solutions and improving financial literacy, Canara Robeco seeks to capitalize on the growing demand for structured financial products.

Name: Religare Enterprises Ltd
Overview:
Religare Enterprise Ltd is a diversified Indian financial services firm, operating across SME lending, affordable housing finance, health insurance, and retail broking. Through its subsidiaries, it serves a vast client base across hundreds of locations in India, delivering an integrated suite of offerings tailored to different customer segments from insurance policies to broking services and lending solutions.

In recent quarters, the company has seen a rebound in revenues, although profit margins remain under pressure. It continues to restructure under new promoter leadership, positioning itself for financial stability and strategic growth going forward.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Supported by the substantial capital infusion and under streamlined promoter leadership, REL is positioned to reinforce its balance sheet, refuel growth in core segments like SME lending and insurance, and potentially improve profitability over FY26. Continued operational discipline and strategic investments will be key to its turnaround and expansion.

Name: IIFL Capital Services Ltd
Overview:
FL Capital Services Limited (formerly IIFL Securities Ltd), established in 1996, is a prominent financial services firm in India, offering a comprehensive suite of services including retail and institutional equities, financial products distribution, commodity and currency broking, investment banking, financial planning, and wealth management. The company caters to a diverse clientele comprising retail and institutional customers across India, leveraging its extensive experience and expertise in the financial sector.

Operating primarily through two business segments Retail Brokerage and Institutional Broking IIFL Capital Services has established a strong presence in the Indian financial market. The retail brokerage segment accounts for a significant portion of the company's revenue, driven by a robust client base and a wide range of financial products and services. The institutional broking segment complements this by providing specialized services to institutional clients, further diversifying the company's revenue streams
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
IIFL Capital Services aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its product offerings and enhancing its global presence. The company's focus on innovation and sustainability positions it well to meet the evolving needs of its diverse customer base. With a strong foundation and strategic initiatives, IIFL Capital Services is poised for sustained growth in the financial services sector.

Name: UTI Asset Management Company Ltd
Overview:
UTI Asset Management Company Ltd is a pioneer in India’s mutual fund industry, being the first to launch equity mutual funds and dedicated investment products such as children’s plans. The company focuses exclusively on investment management and related services, catering to retail, institutional, and pension investors through its diversified product portfolio.

As one of the oldest and most trusted brands in the financial sector, UTI AMC maintains a significant presence in mutual funds and the National Pension System. It leverages its brand equity, distribution network, and customer trust to sustain leadership and deliver consistent value to stakeholders.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
UTI AMC aims to accelerate growth in equity and passive products, deepen penetration in B-30 cities, and enhance digital engagement to tap India’s expanding investor base. With strong brand trust, industry tailwinds, and operational efficiency, the company is positioned to grow AUM, sustain margins, and increase profitability through FY 26 and beyond.

Name: Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Ltd
Overview:
Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Limited is a leading retail wealth management and financial products distribution company in India. The firm operates through an open-architecture platform, offering mutual funds, insurance, stockbroking, and a wide range of alternative investment products. Its business model combines technology platforms with a strong network of mutual fund distributors (MFDs) and branches to cater to investors across geographies.

The company has steadily diversified beyond mutual funds into insurance, PMS/AIF, deposits, and other financial solutions to deepen client engagement and improve revenue resilience. Leveraging a balanced mix of direct and indirect AUM, Prudent continues to expand its reach across India while focusing on technology integration, operational efficiency, and margin stability.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management expects to sustain double-digit AUM growth, stable yields, and margin discipline despite competitive intensity. Insurance, alternates, and technology-led engagement are positioned as the next growth engines, supported by a strong balance sheet for potential inorganic expansion.

Name: Dolat Algotech Ltd
Overview:
Dolat Algotech Ltd. is a technology-driven, diversified quantitative trading firm based in Mumbai. The company operates as a trading cum self-clearing member of the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE), specializing in proprietary trading of shares, securities, commodities, and other financial products. Utilizing advanced quantitative analysis, Dolat Algotech engages in ultra-low latency trading, providing liquidity and actively managing risk in the financial markets.

As a registered broker for the capital market and futures & options segments with the NSE, Dolat Algotech is not involved in manufacturing or selling tangible products. The company leverages research, applied mathematics, and statistical techniques to uncover new opportunities and make calculated trading decisions.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Dolat Algotech aims to continue leveraging its quantitative trading strategies to navigate the complexities of the financial markets. The company's focus on low-latency trading and risk management positions it to capitalize on market opportunities. While the company faces challenges such as market volatility, its technological capabilities and strategic approach are expected to support its growth trajectory in the coming quarters.

Name: Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd
Overview:
Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd is a prominent Indian wealth management firm offering a comprehensive suite of financial services tailored to meet the diverse needs of individuals, families, and businesses. The company specializes in providing customized portfolio management solutions, investment advisory, and trading services, focusing on helping clients achieve long-term financial growth and security.

With a client-centric approach, Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd aims to deliver personalized financial strategies that align with each client's unique goals and risk tolerance. The company's commitment to excellence and innovation positions it as a trusted partner in navigating the complexities of wealth management.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Wealth First Portfolio Managers Ltd is dedicated to expanding its service offerings and enhancing its technological capabilities to better serve its clients. The company plans to introduce new investment products and advisory services, aiming to cater to the evolving financial needs of its clientele. Additionally, Wealth First is focusing on strengthening its digital presence and operational efficiencies to provide seamless and accessible financial solutions.

Name: JM Financial Ltd
Overview:
JM Financial Ltd is a diversified, integrated financial services firm active in investment banking, asset & wealth management, mortgage lending, distressed credit, and private markets. With a legacy spanning decades, it serves corporate, institutional, and retail clients via advisory, credit, and capital solutions.

The group's strength lies in its comprehensive platform, bolstered by leadership in capital markets, expanding wealth AUM, and deep-footprint in private markets and affordable housing—drivers of its ambitious growth strategy.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

JM Financial Ltd is strategically focusing on four core business verticals: investment banking, wealth and asset management, private markets, and affordable home loans. The company is actively expanding its digital presence through initiatives like the "blinkX" platform, developed in collaboration with Google Cloud, to enhance customer engagement and offer personalized financial services.

Name: Aditya Birla Money Ltd
Overview:
Aditya Birla Money Ltd (ABML), incorporated in 1995, is a prominent financial services company in India, offering a comprehensive suite of services including stock broking, distribution of capital market products, depository participant services, and portfolio management services (PMS). As a subsidiary of Aditya Birla Capital Ltd, ABML leverages the group's extensive infrastructure and expertise to cater to a diverse clientele. The company operates through a robust digital platform, providing seamless access to financial markets and investment solutions. 

ABML's commitment to innovation is evident in its continuous efforts to enhance customer experience and expand its service offerings. The company has been focusing on integrating advanced technologies to streamline operations and improve service delivery.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Aditya Birla Money Ltd (ABML), a subsidiary of Aditya Birla Capital Ltd, is actively enhancing its digital infrastructure to cater to the evolving needs of investors. The company is focusing on expanding its product offerings, including equity and derivatives trading, portfolio management services (PMS), and depository services, to provide a comprehensive suite of financial solutions.

Name: Master Trust Ltd
Overview:
Master Trust Ltd, established in 1985, is a diversified financial services company headquartered in Ludhiana, India. Formerly known as Arora Financial Consultants, it offers a wide range of services including forex trading, securities dealing, equity and derivatives broking, insurance broking, merchant banking, and distribution of financial products. 

The company operates through its corporate office in Mumbai and regional offices in New Delhi and Chandigarh, providing nationwide coverage across India. With a market capitalization of approximately ₹1,874 crore, Master Trust Ltd competes with other financial service providers such as Geojit Financial Services, Monarch Networth Capital, and 5Paisa
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Master Trust Ltd is strategically expanding its financial services portfolio to enhance investor engagement and operational efficiency. The company is focusing on digital transformation by developing advanced trading platforms, including mobile applications and web portals, to provide real-time market data and seamless trading experiences. Additionally, Master Trust is enhancing its algorithmic trading capabilities, offering tools like TradingView charts and REST APIs to cater to the evolving needs of traders.

Name: VLS Finance Ltd
Overview:
VLS Finance Ltd is a leading non-banking financial company (NBFC) in India, providing a comprehensive range of lending and financial services to individuals, small businesses, and SMEs. The company specializes in personal loans, vehicle financing, microloans, and business credit facilities, targeting both urban and semi-urban markets. With over two decades of operations, VLS Finance has built a strong brand presence through its customer-centric approach, timely loan disbursal, and prudent credit practices.

The company leverages technology for credit assessment, risk management, and efficient loan processing, integrating ERP systems and digital platforms to enhance operational efficiency. Its conservative lending model and robust risk management frameworks enable sustainable growth and stable profitability. By focusing on financial inclusion, VLS Finance aims to serve underserved segments, offering flexible products tailored to their specific requirements.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

VLS Finance Ltd is focusing on enhancing its proprietary investments across sectors like media, IT, and engineering, aiming to diversify its portfolio and capitalize on emerging opportunities. The company is also exploring the launch of new product lines to cater to evolving market demands. Additionally, VLS Finance is committed to maintaining a strong dividend payout, reflecting its stable earnings and shareholder value focus.

Name: Dam Capital Advisors Ltd
Overview:
Dam Capital Advisors Ltd is a financial services firm specializing in investment banking, equity capital markets, debt advisory, and M&A services. Known for its strong execution in capital raising, the company provides advisory solutions to corporates, institutions, and government entities.

With a client-centric approach, Dam Capital has developed expertise across diverse sectors, including infrastructure, financial services, healthcare, and consumer businesses. Its research-driven framework and strong distribution capabilities have earned it a solid reputation in India’s investment banking space.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

DAM Capital Advisors Ltd is actively expanding its service offerings to include wealth management and retail broking, aiming to diversify revenue streams and enhance client engagement. The company is also focusing on deepening its sector expertise and strengthening industry relationships to target high-value transactions, particularly in Equity Capital Markets (ECM), Mergers & Acquisitions (M&A), and Private Equity advisory. Additionally, DAM Capital plans to establish an Asset Management Company (AMC) to broaden its financial services portfolio.

Name: Arihant Capital Markets Ltd
Overview:
Arihant Capital Markets Ltd is a diversified financial services company engaged in stockbroking, wealth management, investment advisory, and related financial products. With decades of experience, it has created a wide network of clients across India, catering to both retail investors and institutions. Its services are delivered through physical branches as well as digital platforms, which are playing a key role in scaling its reach.

The company has gradually expanded beyond traditional broking services to include mutual funds, insurance distribution, and structured financial solutions. This diversification has helped Arihant Capital maintain resilience during market fluctuations. With a growing focus on digital-first offerings, the company aims to provide a comprehensive investment ecosystem for its clients while improving scalability and cost efficiency.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Arihant Capital is investing significantly in digital infrastructure to further penetrate retail markets, particularly in tier-2 and tier-3 cities. Future growth will be driven by expansion into new financial products, including alternative investments and mutual funds, supported by rising retail investor participation in capital markets. With its strong brand and client trust, the company is well-positioned to sustain long-term growth.

Name: Greenply Industries Ltd
Overview:
Greenply Industries Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in plywood, medium-density fiberboard (MDF), and allied products. Established in 1990, the company has a robust presence in the domestic market and exports to over 50 countries. Greenply operates multiple manufacturing facilities across India, catering to diverse customer needs with a wide range of products.

The company is strategically expanding its product portfolio to include PVC and WPC boards, doors, and frames, aiming to diversify its offerings and reduce dependency on traditional plywood products. Additionally, Greenply has ventured into the furniture and fittings segment through a joint venture, marking its entry into the growing home décor market.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Greenply aims to achieve an EBITDA margin of 10% or higher in FY26, with a target of 16% in the MDF segment. The company plans to scale up its furniture and fittings joint venture, targeting a topline of ₹200–220 crore over the next three years. Greenply is also focusing on expanding its PVC and WPC product lines to cater to the growing demand in the market.

Name: La Opala RG Ltd
Overview:
La Opala RG Ltd is a pioneer in opal glassware and a leading lifestyle tableware brand in India, offering products like opal dinner sets, bowls, coffee mugs, and premium lead crystalware. It has established itself through quality, elegance, and widespread consumer recognition.

The company markets under brands such as La Opala, Diva (with collections like Classique, Ivory, Cosmo), Cook Serve Store, and Solitaire Crystal. With strong retail and e-commerce distribution, it combines craftsmanship with modern design to serve both domestic and export markets.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
La Opala remains committed to growth through innovation, cost discipline, and channel expansion. With its strong brand equity, focus on premium segments, and renewed push into exports and alternate distribution channels, the company is well-positioned to regain demand momentum and improve profitability further in FY26.

Name: Asahi India Glass Ltd
Overview:
Asahi India Glass Ltd. (AIS), established in 1984, is India’s leading integrated glass solutions provider with a dominant presence in both automotive and architectural segments. The company operates across the entire glass value chain — from float glass manufacturing to processing, fabrication, and installation — serving both domestic and global markets.

Its automotive division caters to major OEMs like Maruti Suzuki, Mahindra, Hyundai, Tata Motors, Toyota, and KIA, commanding ~75% share in the passenger car glass market. The architectural division supplies a range of processed and decorative glass to over 1,400 stockists, serving applications in both interior and exterior design. AIS operates 12 manufacturing plants and 10 sub-assembly units across India.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Asahi India Glass Ltd. (AIS) is actively pursuing a comprehensive growth strategy to strengthen its position as India's leading integrated glass solutions provider. The company has embarked on a ₹600 crore expansion plan, which includes establishing a second float glass plant to enhance production capacity and reduce import dependency.

Name: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd
Overview:
Euro Pratik Sales Limited, incorporated in 2010, is a designer, seller, and marketer of decorative wall panels and decorative laminates in India. The company offers a large design range—over 30 product categories and about 3,000 designs—and launches many catalogues each year to align with modern architecture and interior décor trends. It follows an asset-light model by outsourcing manufacturing to contract manufacturers in India and abroad, while maintaining quality control and innovation. Euro Pratik has built a strong market presence through a wide distributor network across India and exports to multiple countries.

The company caters to residential, commercial, and institutional customers by offering products that combine aesthetics with durability. It focuses on providing high-end design solutions that meet the growing demand for decorative interiors. With an experienced management team and strong relationships with dealers and suppliers, Euro Pratik continues to expand its footprint across key cities and regions.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Euro Pratik plans to strengthen its domestic reach by expanding its distribution network and introducing more innovative, eco-friendly, and premium product lines. The company aims to increase its market share through strategic collaborations, new product categories, and selective acquisitions to enhance its brand portfolio. It also intends to explore new export destinations while investing in digital marketing, design studios, and display centers to boost visibility.

Name: Pokarna Ltd
Overview:
Pokarna Limited, established in 1991, operates in the natural stone and engineered quartz surfaces business, with products marketed globally under the Quantra brand for quartz and Pokarna brand for granite. The company’s quartz surfaces, produced with Italian Bretonstone® technology, are recognized for their premium quality, designs, and durability. Granite products are sourced from captive quarries in India and marketed across multiple geographies.

The company has a strong export footprint across 23 countries, with the U.S. as its largest market, supported by a growing presence in Europe, Canada, Mexico, and Russia. It recently exited its apparel division (STANZA brand) to sharpen focus on its core stone business. Pokarna’s quartz subsidiary, PESL, is India’s largest exporter of premium engineered quartz surfaces and continues to drive growth with a robust order book, ongoing capacity expansion, and innovative product launches.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
In the medium term, Pokarna’s growth will be led by premium product ramp-up (KREOS, Chromia), capacity expansion adding ₹500 crore turnover, and geographic diversification reducing U.S. dependence. Near-term headwinds from tariffs and macro uncertainty could impact order flow, but resilient margins, strong brand positioning, and direct customer engagement support its ability to navigate challenges. The company views the current environment as a chance to consolidate its premium leadership and emerge stronger once demand.

Name: Borosil Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1962, Borosil Limited is a diversified Indian company that manufactures and supplies high-quality glassware products, including laboratory glassware, microwave-safe kitchenware, and opalware. Its operations are categorized into scientific & industrial products and consumer products, delivering robust product lines across both segments.

The company’s reach spans over 15,000 retail outlets and it operates three manufacturing facilities, reinforcing its entrenched presence in both the professional scientific market and household kitchens.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
With healthy growth momentum in the latest quarter and a balanced business model, Borosil is well-positioned for sustained performance. Continued traction in its scientific and consumer segments, along with efficient cost management, supports optimism for improved margins and incremental scalability in FY26.

Name: Rushil Decor Ltd
Overview: Rushil Decor Ltd is a specialized manufacturer of decorative laminates and related surface materials, serving the interior design, furniture, and construction sectors. Established with a vision to provide high-quality surface solutions, the company produces high-pressure laminates (HPL), compact laminates, and customized decorative surfaces. Rushil Decor Ltd focuses on product innovation, durability, and aesthetic appeal to meet the evolving demands of architects, interior designers, and furniture manufacturers.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Rushil Decor Ltd is scaling up its operations by completing the second phase of its jumbo laminate manufacturing plant, which will significantly boost its sheet output and strengthen its presence in export markets such as the USA and Europe. At the same time, the company is diversifying into plywood, positioning itself to offer a broader range of panel products across its network

Name: Orient Bell Ltd
Overview:
Orient Bell Ltd is a prominent ceramic tile manufacturer in India, offering a wide range of wall, floor, and vitrified tiles. The company caters to both residential and commercial real estate markets with a distribution network spanning across India. Its offerings emphasize design, durability, and cost competitiveness.

The company invests in modern manufacturing technology and digital marketing to enhance its brand presence. With real estate and infrastructure spending rising, Orient Bell is well-positioned to leverage industry growth while focusing on efficiency and product differentiation.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook 
Expansion of distribution reach, focus on digital design solutions, and entry into premium product categories are expected to sustain growth momentum. The company also benefits from urban housing demand and infrastructure projects.

Name: Century Plyboards (India) Ltd
Overview:
Century Plyboards India Ltd., founded in 1982 by Mr. Sajjan Bhajanka and Mr. Sanjay Agarwal, is a leading manufacturer of plywood, laminates, MDF, particle boards, veneers, and allied products. With a 29% share in India’s organized plywood market, the company has established a diversified product portfolio catering to both domestic and export markets.

It operates 13 manufacturing facilities in India and 3 overseas units, supported by a vast distribution network of over 18,493 retailers, 3,924 dealers, and 43 warehouses, covering all Indian states and exporting to 16 countries. Century Plyboards continues to expand capacity across plywood, laminates, MDF, and particle board segments, with major investments concentrated in Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu, and Punjab.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management guided for 20% revenue growth in laminates and MDF in FY26, supported by export expansion and domestic market share gains. Particle board margins are expected to improve post the commissioning of the Tamil Nadu plant, targeting 15% steady-state EBITDA. The company is targeting ₹12,000 crore turnover by FY31, with capex peaking in FY26 and significant deleveraging planned by FY27. Margin recovery in laminates is anticipated by H2 FY26, and plywood volumes are expected to remain strong.

Name: Kajaria Ceramics Ltd
Overview:
Kajaria Ceramics Ltd is India’s largest ceramic and vitrified tiles manufacturer and the eighth-largest globally, with an annual capacity of 90.50 million sq. meters spread across nine plants in India and Nepal. The company operates through own manufacturing, subsidiaries, and outsourcing, with tiles forming the bulk of its revenues, alongside sanitaryware, faucets, and adhesives. It markets products under the Kajaria, Kerovit, and Kajaria Ply brands, supported by a network of over 1,800 dealers, including 400 exclusive showrooms.

The company holds stakes in multiple subsidiaries, including Kajaria Vitrified, Kajaria Infinity, South Asian Ceramics, Kajaria Surfaces, and Kajaria Bathware, which produce a range of tiles and bathware products. It has also expanded internationally via Kajaria International DMCC, with joint ventures in the UAE and Nepal. Kajaria has been consolidating operations by closing less profitable ventures such as the plywood division and scaling down UK operations.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Kajaria aims to strengthen profitability through premiumisation, expansion in sanitaryware and adhesives, and optimization of subsidiary operations. The company is expected to benefit from operational leverage as demand improves, with recent capacity additions in bathware and adhesives contributing to growth. Strategic exits from underperforming segments like plywood and scaling down costly overseas ventures should further enhance efficiency.

Name: Somany Ceramics Ltd
Overview:
Somany Ceramics Ltd specializes in manufacturing and trading a wide range of décor and sanitary products, including ceramic wall and floor tiles, polished vitrified tiles, glazed vitrified tiles, sanitary-ware, bath fittings, and related offerings. It caters to both residential and commercial segments, providing complete décor solutions tailored to diverse customer requirements.

The company places strong emphasis on product design, quality, and innovation to stay competitive in the décor and building materials industry. Its integrated approach ensures supply of well-curated product ranges to meet evolving consumer preferences.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Somany Ceramics Ltd is on a robust growth trajectory, aiming for high single-digit revenue growth in FY26. This is driven by enhanced capacity utilization and a strategic shift towards value-added product offerings. The company is focusing on expanding its retail footprint and has plans to open additional franchisee showrooms and experience centers.

Name: Greenpanel Industries Ltd
Overview:
Greenpanel Industries Ltd is India’s largest manufacturer of medium-density fibreboard (MDF) and a leading player in the wood panel industry. With plants in Uttarakhand and Andhra Pradesh, the company produces MDF, HDWR boards, pre-laminated MDF, plywood, and wooden flooring, catering to both residential and commercial applications.

The company has built its strength on sustainability, using agro-forestry wood as its primary raw material, while steadily expanding distribution through thousands of retail outlets across India. By focusing on product innovation and efficient manufacturing, it has positioned itself as a key player in the engineered wood market.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Greenpanel expects a recovery in both revenue and margins, supported by the ramp-up of its thin MDF capacity. Management is targeting volume growth of nearly 29% year-on-year, aided by higher utilization levels and improving demand. With improved operating leverage and moderating raw material costs, margins are expected to expand. The company also aims to turn net-debt free within the next 4–6 quarters, while the enforcement of BIS norms is anticipated to reduce import competition and support domestic demand.

Name: Greenlam Industries Ltd
Overview:
Greenlam Industries Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in surfacing and substrate products. Established in 1993, the company offers a diverse range of products, including laminates, plywood, decorative veneers, engineered wooden floors and doors, and particle boards. With a strong presence in both domestic and international markets, Greenlam is recognized among the world's top three laminate manufacturers.

The company's flagship brands encompass Greenlam Laminates, NewMika Laminates, Mikasa Decowood Veneers, Mikasa Floors, Mikasa Doors & Frames, MikasaPly, and Greenlam MFC. Greenlam operates multiple manufacturing facilities, including units in Prantij, Gujarat, and Naidupeta, Andhra Pradesh, to cater to the growing demand for its products.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Greenlam aims to achieve breakeven in chipboard by FY26/FY27 and expand laminate capacity in Gujarat and Andhra Pradesh. The company targets 18-20% revenue growth in FY26 while improving profitability through operational efficiencies in plywood and chipboard segments.

Name: Asian Granito India Ltd
Overview:
Asian Granito India Ltd is one of the country’s leading ceramic tile manufacturers, producing vitrified, glazed, and ceramic tiles. It also operates in sanitaryware, bathware, and marble segments, positioning itself as an integrated home décor solutions provider. AGL is one of India’s leading tile and surface solution providers, engaged in the manufacturing and marketing of tiles, sanitaryware, quartz, and engineered marble. The company operates with a strong retail and dealer distribution network, supported by exclusive showrooms and design studios, making its presence visible across both urban and semi-urban markets.

With a diversified product portfolio ranging from affordable mid-segment tiles to high-margin premium vitrified products, Asian Granito has positioned itself as a complete lifestyle surface solutions brand. Its continuous investments in branding, retail expansion, and digital platforms further enhance visibility and strengthen consumer connect.

The company’s distribution network spans domestic retail outlets, large format stores, and international exports. Brand strength and diverse product offerings cater to both premium and value-conscious customers.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Urban housing demand, affordable housing schemes, and government-led infrastructure spending are expected to sustain demand in the medium term. Additionally, premiumization trends in tiles and sanitaryware categories are likely to support margin expansion and profitability.

Name: Borosil Renewables Ltd
Overview:
Borosil Renewables is India’s largest manufacturer of low-iron solar glass, catering to photovoltaic panels, flat plate collectors, and greenhouse applications. With a strong foothold in the domestic market and a significant share in Germany through its overseas presence, the company offers a diversified product range, including anti-reflective, anti-glare, and value-added 2 mm solar glass.

The company is strategically positioned to benefit from India’s expanding solar capacity and supportive government policies such as anti-dumping duties and ALMM regulations. Its operations are centered on high-quality, import-substitution products, with a focus on capacity expansion and efficiency improvements to meet the rapidly growing domestic demand.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management is optimistic about the long-term growth trajectory, citing strong demand, stable pricing, and favorable policy support. While near-term competition from new domestic entrants is a consideration, the combination of sectoral growth, capacity expansion, and operational efficiency positions the company for sustained revenue and profitability growth.

Name: Borosil Scientific Ltd
Overview:
Founded in 1962, Borosil Scientific Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer of high-quality scientific and laboratory glassware.
