Their products are integral to quality control processes in pharmaceutical industries, food and soil testing, microbiology, and biotechnology. Renowned for their durability and precision, Borosil's glassware is trusted by research institutions, educational laboratories, and industrial R&D centers across India.

In December 2023, Borosil Scientific Ltd was demerged from its parent company, Borosil Ltd, to focus exclusively on its scientific and industrial products division. This strategic move aims to enhance operational efficiency and unlock the value of its specialized business.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Borosil Scientific Ltd is committed to expanding its presence in the global laboratory glassware market, which is projected to grow at a robust pace. The company plans to invest in modernizing its manufacturing facilities to enhance production capabilities and meet increasing demand. Additionally, Borosil Scientific aims to diversify its product portfolio by incorporating advanced materials and technologies to cater to emerging sectors such as semiconductor and solar industries.

Name: Cera Sanitaryware Ltd
Overview:
Cera Sanitaryware Ltd is a leading Indian building products manufacturer offering sanitaryware, faucetware, tiles, wellness products, kitchen sinks, and mirrors under its three brands—Senator, CERA Luxe, and CERA—serving luxury, premium, and mass-premium market segments. It operates with both manufacturing and outsourcing models, backed by a strong pan-India presence with 6,500+ dealer partners, 24,000+ retailers, 1,800 brand stores, and 13 company-owned experience centers.

In FY25, sanitaryware contributed 49% of revenue, faucetware 39%, tiles 10%, and wellness 2%. The company maintained high capacity utilization at 95% for faucetware and 90% for sanitaryware. It launched 431 new SKUs, including Vibe Sense technology-based sanitaryware and PVD-colored faucets, and expanded premium offerings through the Senator and CERA Luxe lines. Cera also strengthened its B2B presence, with projects forming 38% of annual revenues, supported by an order book of ₹1,215 crore.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management targets ₹2,900 crore in revenues by FY27, contingent on retail market recovery, and expects to outperform the market by 6–7% once conditions improve. B2B share is expected to stabilize between 40–45%, premium product contribution to rise, and EBITDA margins to remain in the 15–16% range. Strong cash reserves (₹719 crore) and a robust project pipeline are expected to support growth even in a cautious demand environment.

Name: Stanley Lifestyles Ltd
Overview:
Stanley Lifestyles Ltd is a premium lifestyle and furniture brand offering curated solutions such as sofas, luxury home furnishings, and designer collections through formats like COCO and franchise-operated stores. With over a decade-long lineage, it serves aspirational Indian consumers seeking quality and elegance.

The company blends integrated manufacturing with high-impact retail and an evolving brand portfolio, positioning itself as one of India’s few super-premium home lifestyle brands with strong retail execution and product innovation.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Against a backdrop of cautious luxury demand, Stanley is leveraging its brand strength, integrated manufacturing, and retail format diversification. Expansion into Hyderabad via acquisition and support from a reinforced leadership team add strategic depth. With focus on curated collections, curated retail expansion, and cost-management, the company is well-positioned for renewed growth and margin recovery through FY26.

Name: One Point One Solutions Ltd
Overview:
One Point One Solutions Ltd is a Business Process Management (BPM) service provider based in Thane, Maharashtra. Established in 2008, the company offers a wide range of services including customer relationship management, data management, sales support, and back-office operations. It caters to various industries such as telecommunications, banking, financial services, insurance, e-commerce, and retail. 

With a focus on enhancing operational efficiency, One Point One Solutions aims to deliver customized solutions that meet the unique needs of its clients.  The company has established partnerships with prominent brands like Bharti Airtel, LIC Mutual Fund Asset Management, and Wonderchef Home Appliances.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
One Point One Solutions Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its service offerings and leveraging advanced technologies. The appointment of Nitin Mahajan as CEO is expected to drive strategic initiatives that will enhance the company's capabilities and market presence.

Name: Krystal Integrated Services Ltd
Overview:
Krystal Integrated Services Ltd (KISL) is a prominent Indian company specializing in integrated facilities management services. Established in 2000 and headquartered in Mumbai, the company offers a comprehensive suite of services, including staffing solutions, payroll management, private security, catering, and waste management. 

KISL caters to a diverse clientele across various sectors, such as healthcare, education, public administration, airports, railways, metro infrastructure, and retail. The company operates on a B2B model, providing tailored solutions to meet the specific needs of its clients.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Krystal Integrated Services is well-positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for integrated facilities management services in India. The company's strategic focus on expanding its service offerings and client base, coupled with its strong presence in key sectors, is expected to drive sustained growth.

Name: BLS E-Services Ltd
Overview:
BLS E-Services Ltd, a subsidiary of BLS International, is a leading digital services provider specializing in Business Correspondent (BC) operations, assisted e-services, and e-governance solutions. It delivers government-to-citizen (G2C), business-to-consumer (B2C), and business-to-business (B2B) services across India, especially in underserved semi-urban and rural regions.

Since its establishment, the company has built a vast network of touchpoints, digital kiosks, and partnerships with banks and institutions—facilitating services like banking outreach, insurance, healthcare, and last-mile connectivity, aimed at inclusive financial and digital access.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
With its enhanced digital infrastructure, widened rural reach, and broadening service portfolio, BLS is well-positioned for sustained growth. As government schemes increasingly rely on outsourced delivery (e.g., Jan Dhan, DBT), the firm is poised to capture scale. The dividend declaration also signals confident cash flow generation and shareholder value orientation.

Name: Updater Services Ltd
Overview:
Updater Services Ltd is a leading provider of integrated facility management services in India. Established in 2009, the company offers a comprehensive range of services, including housekeeping, security, and maintenance, to various industries such as commercial, residential, and industrial sectors. Updater Services Ltd is known for its customer-centric approach and commitment to service excellence.

The company has a pan-India presence, with operations in major cities across the country. Updater Services Ltd employs a large workforce and leverages technology to deliver efficient and effective services to its clients. The company's focus on quality and customer satisfaction has earned it a strong reputation in the facility management industry.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Updater Services Ltd plans to expand its service offerings and geographic presence to tap into new markets. The company is investing in technology to enhance service delivery and operational efficiency. Additionally, Updater Services Ltd aims to strengthen its workforce through training and development programs to maintain high service standards.

Name: Innovision Ltd
Overview:
Innovision Limited, incorporated in 2007, is a service-oriented company that provides manpower solutions, toll plaza management and skill development training across India. The company offers staffing and workforce management services to various industries, helping businesses manage their operational and human resource requirements efficiently. Its manpower services include recruitment, deployment and management of personnel for different sectors.

Apart from staffing, the company is actively involved in toll plaza management, handling operations, maintenance and revenue collection for highway projects. It also focuses on skill development and training programs aimed at enhancing employability and supporting workforce readiness.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Innovision Limited plans to expand its manpower services by increasing its client base and strengthening its presence across multiple industries. The company aims to grow its toll plaza management segment by securing new contracts and improving operational efficiency. It is also focusing on scaling its skill development initiatives to align with rising demand for trained workforce in India.

Name: SIS Ltd
Overview:
Security & Intelligence Services (India) Ltd (SIS) is one of the leading integrated security and business support service providers in India, with operations spanning security, facility management, and cash logistics. The company also extends its expertise internationally, offering a wide range of services through subsidiaries and joint ventures.

Its core portfolio includes manned guarding, training, paramedic and emergency response, facility management, electronic security, pest control, and secure cash logistics. With a pan-India presence and growing global footprint, SIS has positioned itself as a market leader with strong client trust and long-term industry demand.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management guides for consolidated EBITDA margins of 5.5–6% as India Security and FM aim for 6% margins, while international is expected to stabilize at 4–4.5%. Growth will be driven by continued market share gains, cross-border opportunities, cash logistics IPO, and technology adoption, with a focus on maintaining disciplined balance sheet strength and profitability.

Name: Alldigi Tech Ltd
Overview:
Allsec Technologies Ltd (recently rebranded as Alldigi Tech) provides global outsourcing solutions—spanning customer experience (CXM), employee experience (EXM), HR payroll, and administrative services.

 Incorporated in 1998, the company operates through delivery centers across Chennai, Bengaluru, and the NCR. With a significant international presence and a multi-channel service model, Allsec supports Fortune 100 clients and growth-oriented organizations with scalable, resilient business operations.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Allsec aims to revive profitability by enhancing cost efficiency and scaling higher-value CXM and EXM services—especially with growing international business contributions. Management remains focused on improving margin performance through optimized operations and strategic service mix shifts.

Name: Team Lease Services Ltd
Overview:
TeamLease Services Limited is a leading provider of employment-related services in India, offering staffing, recruitment, training, payroll, and compliance solutions. With a presence across multiple industries, it plays a key role in bridging workforce demand and supply, while supporting organizations with flexible manpower models.

The company operates through three major segments general staffing, specialized staffing, and HR services supported by apprenticeship and edtech initiatives. Its scale, technology-led execution, and diversified client base position it as a key player in India’s evolving employment ecosystem.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management expects a positive growth, aided by recovery in muted sectors and ongoing efficiency gains. The company is guiding for at least 30% EBITDA growth (ex-inorganic) for the remainder of FY26, supported by strong client additions, operational leverage, and demand recovery in BFSI, consumer, and IT-related hiring.

Name: Quess Corp Ltd
Overview:
Quess Corp Limited is India’s leading business services provider operating through four key segments: Workforce Management, Operating Asset Management, Global Technology Solutions, and Product Led Business. The company leverages domain expertise and digital platforms to deliver outsourced solutions, supporting a large associate base across India and overseas. It is focused on driving productivity through service innovation and strategic investments in technology and staffing verticals.

The company’s diverse portfolio covers general staffing, professional staffing (with strong emphasis on Global Capability Centers), and overseas operations across Asia-Pacific and the Middle East. Quess is also expanding its digital footprint via platforms like Hamara Jobs, enhancing reach into MSME and rural markets. Strategic initiatives such as ‘Origint powered by Quess’ further bolster its GCC-focused business line, supporting its long-term growth agenda.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Quess anticipates margin expansion driven by growth in professional staffing and GCC business, operational efficiencies, and recovery in general staffing sectors impacted by macro factors. The Employment Linked Incentive (ELI) scheme, launching August 2025, is expected to formalize labor markets and benefit large staffing providers from late FY26. Overseas business growth, digital platform scaling, and geographic diversification also underpin medium-term growth prospects.

Name: Hikal Ltd
Overview:
Hikal Ltd is an integrated specialty chemicals and life sciences company, offering services across active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), contract development and manufacturing (CDMO), crop protection, and animal health. With a global client base, it combines deep R&D capabilities and commercial manufacturing.

The company operates both in regulated pharma markets and agrochemical segments, leveraging its technical expertise, multi-site manufacturing, and compliance strengths to serve global innovators and domestic customers alike.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Hikal remains focused on turning around the pharmaceutical vertical and regaining deferred offtake through corrective actions and regulatory remediation. The robust project pipeline in APIs and CDMO, alongside stable demand in crop protection, positions the company well for a recovery in H2 FY26. With a strong foundation, renewed compliance credentials, and disciplined execution, the company is set to regain growth and margin momentum.

Name: Solara Active Pharma Sciences Ltd
Overview:
Solara Active Pharma Sciences Ltd is a prominent Indian company specializing in the manufacturing and distribution of Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs). Established through the demerger of the API business from Strides Shasun Ltd (now Stride Pharma Sciences), the company further expanded its portfolio by acquiring the human API business from Sequent Scientific Ltd. This strategic consolidation has positioned Solara as a dedicated API player in the pharmaceutical industry.

Headquartered in India, Solara operates multiple manufacturing facilities that adhere to global regulatory standards, including certifications from WHO-GMP, EU-GMP, and USFDA. The company's product offerings encompass a wide range of APIs catering to various therapeutic segments.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Solara Active Pharma Sciences Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its product offerings and enhancing manufacturing capabilities. The company is focused on strengthening its presence in regulated markets and exploring new therapeutic segments to drive revenue growth.

Name: Anthem Biosciences Ltd
Overview:
Anthem Biosciences Ltd is a technology-focused Contract Research, Development & Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO) that offers end-to-end services in chemistry and biology. It works with global biotech and pharma companies to do everything from discovery through development, preclinical work, up to commercial manufacturing. It also has a business line that makes specialty ingredients like enzymes, peptides, probiotics, and nutritional actives, serving the wellness, nutraceutical, and pharma ingredient markets. 

The company has built strong infrastructure including multiple operational manufacturing units, labs for GMP synthesis, pilot plants, and fermentation capabilities. It is certified by global regulatory bodies, and emphasizes quality, regulatory compliance, and R&D strength in organic synthesis, biologicals and fermentation.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Anthem Biosciences is planning to further expand its manufacturing capacity by bringing its third facility online, increasing custom synthesis and fermentation capacity significantly. It intends to deepen its CRDMO offerings across more modalities including biologics, peptides, RNA-based therapies, and antibody-drug conjugates. The company is pushing into specialty ingredients more aggressively, aiming to serve wellness and nutraceutical markets better.

Name: Sai Life Sciences Ltd
Overview: Sai Life Sciences is one of India’s fastest-growing contract research, development, and manufacturing organizations (CRDMOs) in the pharmaceutical sector. Founded in 1999 and headquartered in Hyderabad, it offers end-to-end services spanning medicinal chemistry, process development, scale-up synthesis, pharmacokinetics, and manufacturing of complex small molecules. The company actively collaborates with innovator pharmaceutical and biotechnology firms across the USA, Europe, and Japan. Returning customers account for approximately 80% of its business, reflecting high satisfaction and retention.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Sai Life Sciences Ltd is experiencing significant growth, driven by strategic investments in capacity expansion and infrastructure. Key initiatives include the completion of Phase II at its Bidar facility, adding 91 KL capacity, and the establishment of a new R&D center in Hyderabad to enhance capabilities in complex peptides and emerging modalities

Name: Vimta Labs Ltd
Overview:
Vimta Labs Ltd, established in 1990, is a leading contract research and testing services provider based in India. The company offers a comprehensive range of services, including analytical, clinical, and preclinical testing, primarily catering to the life sciences industry. 

Vimta Labs also provides quality testing for food and beverage sectors, as well as environmental services to various industries. With a strong track record of supporting national and overseas companies, the company has expanded globally, positively impacting millions of lives.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Vimta Labs is poised for continued growth, driven by its strategic initiatives and expanding service offerings. The company's focus on enhancing its capabilities in pharmaceutical services and electronics testing is expected to contribute to its revenue growth.

Name: Cohance Lifesciences Ltd
Overview:
This Hyderabad-based CDMO is a leading player in India’s contract research and manufacturing services (CRAMS) sector, ranking among the top five suppliers of high-end intermediates to innovators. The company provides integrated New Chemical Entity (NCE)-based solutions, spanning process research and development, scale-up, late-stage clinical, and commercial manufacturing. Its service portfolio covers pharma CDMO, specialty chemicals, and formulations, enabling it to cater to diverse global pharmaceutical, biotech, specialty chemical, and generic clients, including 14 of the world’s top 20 pharma companies.

Operations are supported by three manufacturing facilities and two R&D plants in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, with a combined reactor capacity exceeding 1,800 KL. The company has delivered over 1,000 CDMO projects and continues to strengthen its technical capabilities through targeted expansions, strategic acquisitions, and integration of complementary businesses. Its focus is on leveraging high-value CDMO demand, expanding its product and technology portfolio, and scaling manufacturing capacity to drive long-term growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
The company aims to double its combined business within five years, with mergers and acquisitions playing a central role. Recovery in Specialty Chemicals, a backloaded CDMO shipment schedule, and expanded global biologics and complex drug capabilities are expected to drive growth in the near term.

Name: Acutaas Chemicals Ltd
Overview:
Ami Organics Limited, soon to be rebranded as Acutaas Chemicals Limited, is a leading research and development-driven manufacturer specializing in advanced pharmaceutical intermediates (APIs) and New Chemical Entities (NCEs). The company also produces key starting materials for agrochemicals and fine chemicals, serving a global clientele.

Ami Organics operates multiple manufacturing facilities across India, strategically located to serve key markets. The company emphasizes innovation and sustainability, investing in research and development to enhance its product offerings. Ami Organics has also expanded its capabilities through acquisitions, such as the purchase of Gujarat Organics, strengthening its position in the pharmaceutical intermediates market.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Ami Organics projects a 25% revenue growth for FY26, driven by increased demand for its pharmaceutical intermediates and expansion into new markets. The company's strategic initiatives, including investments in research and development and acquisitions, position it for continued growth in the specialty chemicals sector.

Name: Biocon Ltd
Overview:
Biocon Limited is a Bengaluru-based biopharmaceutical company with global operations across Biosimilars, Generics, and Novel Biologics. Its Biosimilars segment is the largest revenue contributor, with 20 products in the pipeline and approvals across major markets like the U.S., EU, and emerging countries. Biocon has manufacturing facilities in India, Malaysia, and the U.S., enabling global reach and scale.

Biocon holds a controlling stake in Syngene International, its publicly listed subsidiary that offers contract research, development, and manufacturing (CRDMO) services. Syngene serves over 400 global clients, including 14 of the top 20 global pharma companies. Meanwhile, Biocon's Generics segment covers 79 APIs and 83 formulations, while its novel biologics portfolio is led by assets like Itolizumab and Bicara Therapeutics' oncology pipeline.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Biocon is planning strong growth by boosting its product lineup in biosimilars and generics, supported by strategic investments in manufacturing and R&D. The company is allocating substantial capital to expand its biologics and generics capabilities, aiming to scale production and innovation. It is pushing forward launches of new biosimilar and generic drugs globally, gaining commercial traction in multiple markets and leveraging acquisitions to streamline development and distribution.

Name: Neuland Laboratories Ltd
Overview:
Neuland Laboratories is an established manufacturer and exporter of bulk drugs catering to domestic and international pharmaceutical markets. The company operates across three key segments: Prime APIs, Niche/Specialty APIs, and Custom Manufacturing Solutions (CMS), with a diverse product portfolio ranging from high-volume mature APIs to complex, patent-protected molecules. Its CMS business focuses on R&D and commercial manufacturing for innovator pharma and biotech companies.

The business faces inherent lumpiness due to the nature of order flows, especially in the CDMO and specialty API segments. While recent quarters have shown revenue softness, Neuland is advancing strategic capacity expansions including a new commercial block and a dedicated peptide facility to capture growing opportunities in peptides and complex APIs. The company remains focused on long-term growth supported by a strong product pipeline and deep technical expertise.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management maintains a confident Growth Outlook with expectations of a 20% CAGR over 3–5 years driven by capacity additions and a robust CMS pipeline. The company aims to smooth out revenue volatility as more molecules reach commercialization and broaden its customer base, particularly in the peptide segment. Capital allocation will continue balancing growth investments and operational efficiency.

Name: Suven Life Sciences Ltd
Overview:
Suven Life Sciences Ltd is a biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development and commercialization of novel therapeutics. The company focuses on research and development in areas such as oncology, neurology, and metabolic disorders.

In FY25, Suven Life Sciences faced challenges in its financial performance due to declining revenues and increasing expenses. The company is focusing on streamlining operations and advancing its R&D pipeline.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Suven Life Sciences is firmly focused on advancing its pipeline of innovative therapies targeting central nervous system disorders, progressing multiple candidates through late-stage clinical development toward commercialization. Resources from its CDMO divestment are fueling this drive. The company is heavily investing in research and development to strengthen its drug discovery capabilities and plans to scale breakthroughs across neurodegenerative and psychiatric conditions.

Name: Syngene International Ltd
Overview:
Syngene International Ltd., established in 1993 as a Biocon subsidiary, is India’s first Contract Research Organization (CRO) that has evolved into an integrated CRAMS (Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Services) provider. The company delivers end-to-end solutions spanning drug discovery, development, and manufacturing on a unified platform. Its infrastructure footprint totals 1.9 million square feet, spread across multiple state-of-the-art facilities.

The company operates four main business divisions—Discovery Services, Development Services, Manufacturing Services, and Dedicated R&D Centres—serving diverse sectors like pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, animal health, and consumer products. It has built strong global relationships, working with 13 of the top 15 global pharma companies, and holds more than 400 patents jointly with clients. Facilities are located across Bengaluru (HQ, discovery, development, manufacturing), Mangalore (API manufacturing), and Hyderabad (R&D).
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook

Management expecting mid-single-digit reported revenue growth and early-teens underlying growth. Short-term challenges include inventory adjustments in biologics commercial manufacturing and continued biotech funding uncertainty. Medium-term prospects remain strong, underpinned by the ramp-up of Unit 3 in Bengaluru, the upcoming Bayview biologics facility in the US, and capability additions in peptides. The company anticipates capacity utilization and margins to improve over the next 3–5 years as new facilities scale.

Name: Permanent Magnets Ltd
Overview:
Permanent Magnets Ltd is a leading manufacturer of permanent magnets and magnetic solutions, offering a diverse portfolio that includes rare earth magnets, ferrite magnets, alnico magnets, and flexible magnets. These products serve critical applications across industries such as automotive, electronics, renewable energy, medical devices, and industrial machinery. The company emphasizes quality, precision, and reliability, ensuring that its magnetic products meet stringent standards and customer specifications. With dedicated research and development, Permanent Magnets continually innovates to provide efficient, customized solutions, strengthening its global reputation as a trusted magnetic solutions provider.

Permanent Magnets Ltd focuses on growth through product innovation, market expansion, strategic collaborations, and operational excellence. By enhancing R&D capabilities, entering new markets, forming industry partnerships, and optimizing manufacturing processes, the company aims to expand its market presence, deliver high-quality magnetic solutions, and achieve sustained growth in the competitive permanent magnets sector.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Permanent Magnets Ltd is actively enhancing its manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand for engineering and current sensing applications. The company plans to expand its capacity by adding a new furnace, significantly increasing production to serve the rising market needs. Additionally, Permanent Magnets Ltd has secured the AS 9100:2016 certification for its alloys facility, opening up opportunities in aerospace, aviation, and defense sectors.

Name: Bharat Bijlee Ltd
Overview:
Bharat Bijlee Ltd, established in 1946, is a renowned electrical engineering company in India known for manufacturing transformers, electric motors, drives, and providing turnkey solutions like EHV switchyards, substations, and elevator systems.

With a diversified portfolio across electrical equipment and automation, the company serves segments including power utilities, industrial, and infrastructure, leveraging deep technical expertise and a robust manufacturing footprint.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The strong first quarter performance of FY26 signals a possible turnaround in demand. If maintained, momentum could drive improved utilization, margin expansion, and better return on capital. The company’s diverse product mix and technical strength position it well to tap into infrastructure and industrial modernization trends.

Name: Cummins India Ltd
Overview:
Cummins India Ltd, a subsidiary of the US-based Cummins Inc., is a leading manufacturer of diesel and alternative fuel engines, power generator sets, and related components. The company operates a diversified business with a strong domestic footprint and export presence, offering solutions for power generation, industrial applications, and green energy technologies. Through strategic joint ventures like Valvoline Cummins Pvt Ltd, it has also built a significant position in the lubricants market.
 
 Business Segments
 Engines Business Division: Diesel & natural gas engines for multiple applications.
 
 Components Business Unit: Power generation systems and engine-related technologies.
 
 Industrial Segment: Expanding into fishing boats and high-demand exports, especially to the data centre industry.
 
 Distribution Business Unit: Service & supply of power generation systems.
 
 Lubes Business Division: Lubricants, through JV with Valvoline International Inc.
 
 Revenue Summary
 Major contribution from Engines and Components segments.
 
 Strong domestic presence with a focus on industrial, power generation, and automotive sectors.
 
 Export growth driven by demand from the data centre industry and new industrial verticals.
Key Takeways:
rowth Outlook

Cummins India is set to invest $1 billion over the next decade to drive expansion across engines, components, and emerging domains. The company plans to recruit 4,000 new staff to support innovation, including the launch of its zero‑emissions brand Accelera under the New Power division. Focusing on battery-electric and fuel-cell solutions as part of its global Destination Zero and PLANET 2050 sustainability goals, Cummins India is charting a long‑term path toward clean energy leadership.

Name: Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd
Overview:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Limited (KOEL), part of the Kirloskar Group, is a leading manufacturer of diesel engines, diesel generator sets, and pump sets catering to agriculture, industrial, and power generation markets. The company operates multiple manufacturing facilities across Pune, Kagal, Nashik, Rajkot, and Bhare, and has expanded into high-horsepower (HHP) solutions, marine propulsion systems, and emission-compliant engine platforms. Its product portfolio now spans from 3 kVA to over 6 MW, targeting both domestic and export markets.

KOEL has recently completed a multi-year transformation program, overhauling its product range to meet CPCB IV+ and BS V norms, enhancing operational efficiency, and consolidating plants for B2C operations. The company has also strengthened its aftermarket, distribution, and international businesses, while its NBFC arm, Arka Fincap, is pivoting towards high-yield retail lending. With FY25 sales above ₹5,000 crore (standalone) and ₹6,295 crore (consolidated), KOEL is now focusing on scaling HHP offerings, expanding internationally, and executing its “2B Strategy” to reach USD 2 billion revenue by FY30.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
KOEL aims to position itself as a global technology leader in power solutions, leveraging fuel-agnostic engines, efficiency-led innovations, and selective acquisitions to enhance global competitiveness.

Name: Ajax Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Ajax Engineering Ltd is a specialist manufacturer of industrial machinery and high-precision components that serve critical industries such as defense, aerospace, and heavy engineering. The company focuses on providing tailor-made machine tools and equipment that can meet stringent technical requirements, often for mission-critical applications. This niche expertise has positioned Ajax as a trusted partner for sectors where quality, reliability, and accuracy are non-negotiable.

The company’s operations are underpinned by state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities equipped with advanced machining and testing capabilities. Its workforce combines engineering expertise with innovation, enabling Ajax to deliver solutions that often fill technology gaps in the domestic market. With India focusing heavily on indigenization in defense and manufacturing, the company’s offerings align with national priorities, giving it strategic importance within the industrial landscape.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Ajax is poised to expand its footprint by deepening its role in defense supply chains and exploring opportunities in adjacent high-tech manufacturing areas. Continued investment in R&D and capacity expansion could further consolidate its positioning as a leader in precision engineering.

Name: Powerica Ltd
Overview:
Powerica Ltd is a power solutions company engaged in providing diesel generator (DG) sets used for both primary and backup power requirements. The company offers a range of DG sets catering to residential, commercial, and industrial customers, ensuring uninterrupted power supply in areas with unreliable grid connectivity or critical operations. Its products are widely used across sectors such as manufacturing, infrastructure, healthcare, telecom, and data centers.

The company focuses on delivering end-to-end power solutions, including installation, commissioning, and after-sales services for its generator systems. It works with established engine and equipment partners to supply reliable and efficient DG sets tailored to customer needs.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

The company plans to expand its product portfolio by introducing more fuel-efficient and technologically advanced power solutions. It aims to benefit from rising demand for reliable backup power across industries such as infrastructure, healthcare, and data centers. The company is also focusing on strengthening its service network and expanding its reach in new geographical markets.

Name: Action Construction Equipment Ltd
Overview:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd (ACE) is India’s most diversified construction equipment manufacturer, operating across infrastructure, manufacturing, logistics, and agriculture sectors. Established in 1995, the company is the world’s largest pick-and-carry crane manufacturer with over 63% market share in the mobile cranes segment and 60% in tower cranes domestically. Its product portfolio spans cranes, construction equipment, forklifts, and agricultural machinery, supported by strong in-house manufacturing and R&D capabilities.

ACE maintains a vast sales and service network across 125+ locations in India, with exports to over 37 countries. In FY25, the company achieved its highest-ever revenue and profitability, driven by record crane, material handling, and construction equipment volumes. The year also saw significant milestones such as securing the largest-ever defense order for 1,121 rough terrain forklifts worth ₹420 crore, highlighting ACE’s growing role in government-led infrastructure and defense initiatives.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
ACE projects 14–15% revenue growth in FY26, supported by capacity expansion to 15,000–18,000 cranes annually and continued dominance in the pick-and-carry crane segment. The company is also eyeing higher contributions from the defense, logistics, and urban infrastructure sectors, aiming for a 70% market share in pick-and-carry cranes.

Name: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd
Overview:
ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd is a diversified engineering conglomerate that designs, manufactures, and executes complex industrial solutions. Its product suite includes boilers, process equipment, sugar and ethanol plants, mechanical presses, air pollution control systems, and EPC contracts across multiple sectors.

With a legacy dating back to 1933 and a global footprint spanning six continents, ISGEC leverages integrated manufacturing and engineering strength across India and key international markets, serving clients in energy, industrial, and infrastructure domains.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
With improved earnings, steady sugar segment contribution, and consolidated operations, ISGEC is well-placed for stable performance in FY26. A full recovery hinges on renewed strength in project execution, project inflows, and stabilization of cyclical segments. Management remains focused on synergy, margin optimization, and balanced business portfolio.

Name: Marine Electricals (India) Ltd
Overview:
Marine Electricals (India) Ltd. is a leading provider of electrical and automation solutions catering to marine and industrial applications. With decades of expertise in electrical engineering, the company delivers a comprehensive range of services, including design, procurement, installation, testing, and commissioning of electrical systems for ships, offshore platforms, and industrial plants. Its solutions cover power generation and distribution, automation and control, communication systems, lighting, and navigation equipment, making it a trusted partner for shipyards, ship owners, and industrial clients. The company also provides robust after-sales, maintenance, and repair services, ensuring long-term system reliability and customer support.

Beyond its core marine segment, Marine Electricals has diversified into oil & gas, power, infrastructure, and renewable energy sectors, leveraging its expertise to provide tailor-made solutions across industries. With a strong focus on technological innovation, R&D, and safety standards, the company continues to stay ahead of emerging industry trends. Its growth strategy emphasizes R&D investments, market diversification, strategic partnerships, and operational efficiency, positioning Marine Electricals as a trusted and forward-looking player capable of delivering sustainable, cutting-edge solutions in both marine and industrial domains.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Marine Electricals (India) Ltd is strategically expanding its presence in the electrical automation and ICT solutions sectors. The company has secured new orders totaling ₹14.33 crore, further solidifying its position in the electrical and automation solutions sector. The company is also focusing on expanding its footprint in various sectors such as data centers, metro rails, and the pharmaceutical industry, aiming to diversify its revenue streams and enhance its market presence.

Name: Hind Rectifiers Ltd
Overview:
Hind Rectifiers Ltd. is a specialized Indian company engaged in the design, manufacturing, and marketing of power semiconductor devices and power electronic equipment. Its portfolio includes diodes, thyristors, modules, and power electronic stacks, which are widely used in power conversion and control applications across industries. These technologies enable efficient and reliable electrical power regulation, supporting critical operations in sectors such as industrial automation, railways, defense, renewable energy, and power control systems.

Beyond components, the company also develops and supplies power electronic systems for traction control, locomotive propulsion, industrial drives, battery charging, and renewable energy solutions. Complementing its products, Hind Rectifiers provides end-to-end services such as engineering, installation, commissioning, and after-sales support, ensuring customers receive tailored solutions that match their operational needs. Its strong R&D focus and advanced manufacturing facilities with robust quality control systems have helped establish it as a reliable and innovative player in the power electronics space, with a presence in both domestic and international markets.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Hitachi Hi-Rel Power Electronics Ltd is strategically expanding its manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand for power electronic equipment in India. The company is investing approximately ₹60–65 crore over the next two fiscal years to enhance its production capacity, focusing on advanced products such as solar inverters, UPS systems, and traction transformers. This expansion is supported by a strong financial position, with reduced debt levels and healthy liquidity.

Name: LMW Ltd
Overview:
Lakshmi Electrical Control Systems Ltd. (LECS), incorporated in 1981 and part of the Lakshmi Group, is engaged in manufacturing control panels, engineering plastic components, and allied products. The company primarily caters to the textile machinery sector, with a significant portion of its revenue derived from recurring orders from its parent company, Lakshmi Machine Works Ltd. Its product offerings span power and motor control centres, automation and textile panels, cable harnesses, smart meters, drives and power supply units, as well as high-precision moulded plastic components for automobiles, engineering, and textile industries.

LECS operates two manufacturing facilities in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, housing dedicated divisions for control panels, assembly, cable harness production, and plastic component manufacturing. With over 77 products, a customer base exceeding 120, and a workforce of more than 410 employees, the company serves diverse industries including textiles, automobiles, telecom, renewable energy, EV, and machine tools. Its integrated manufacturing capabilities and established relationship with LMW ensure a steady revenue base while also enabling diversification into new sectors like EV components and renewable energy solutions.
Key Takeways:
Strategic Outlook
LECS aims to sustain growth by deepening its relationship with LMW while expanding its non-textile customer base. Investments in automation, product diversification, and renewable energy-linked solutions are expected to support future growth momentum, with a continued focus on operational efficiency and margin expansion.

Name: Atlanta Electricals Ltd
Overview:
Atlanta Electricals Limited is a manufacturer of power, auto-duty, inverter-duty, furnace, generator, and special-duty transformers in India. It produces transformers ranging from low capacity through high-capacity units and serves utilities, renewable energy projects, infrastructure, steel, textiles, and construction clients. The company operates several manufacturing plants in regions such as Gujarat and Karnataka and has a customer presence across many Indian states and union territories. 

Over decades of operation, Atlanta Electricals has built up its product portfolio, testing capabilities, and order execution experience. As demand in India grows for upgraded transmission and distribution infrastructure, reliable transformer supply, and specialized units for solar, EV charging, and grid stabilisation, the company has positioned itself to meet those evolving technical and regulatory requirements.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Atlanta Electricals plans to deepen its manufacturing strength by bringing newly commissioned facilities into full operation and by increasing its capacity to handle higher voltage and larger MVA transformer units. It aims to grow its geographic reach in underserved states and exploit orders from public sector and renewable energy customers.

Name: Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd
Overview:
Fujiyama Power Systems Ltd is a technology-driven solar energy company in India that manufactures and provides solutions across the rooftop solar value chain. Under its two brands — UTL Solar and Fujiyama Solar — it offers a wide range of products, including solar panels, inverters (on-grid, off-grid, hybrid), lithium-ion and lead-acid batteries, UPS systems, and solar charge controllers. 

The company operates multiple manufacturing facilities located in Greater Noida, Parwanoo, Bawal, and Dadri, and maintains a strong pan-India distribution network with hundreds of distributors, thousands of dealers, and dedicated “Shoppe” franchises.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Fujiyama Power Systems aims to scale up significantly by using IPO proceeds to set up a new integrated plant and reduce its debt load. It plans to expand its capacity for solar modules, inverters, and batteries, thereby strengthening its manufacturing footprint. With its large SKU portfolio, the company is also well-poised to cater to growing demand from residential and commercial rooftop solar segments.

Name: Ram Ratna Wires Ltd
Overview:
Ram Ratna Wires Limited (RRWL) is a prominent Indian manufacturer specializing in the production of enamelled copper winding wires. Established in 1988, the company has evolved into a significant player in the electrical equipment sector, catering to diverse industries such as automotive, home appliances, and industrial applications. RRWL is recognized for its commitment to quality and innovation, offering a wide range of wire products that meet international standards.

Headquartered in Mumbai, RRWL operates multiple manufacturing facilities across India, including locations in Bhiwadi, Rajasthan, and Baroda, Gujarat.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Ram Ratna Wires aims to double its revenue over the next two years, driven by strategic capacity expansions and diversification into new product segments. The company plans to invest in manufacturing facilities, including a new plant in Alwar, Rajasthan, with an estimated investment of ₹200 crore over five years.

Name: Precision Wires India Ltd
Overview:
Precision Wires India Ltd specializes in producing enamelled copper winding wires, continuously transposed conductors, and insulated copper conductors using materials like paper, mica, and Nomex. The company caters primarily to OEMs and sectors including power, automotive, consumer durables, transformers, and construction, positioning itself as the largest winding wire manufacturer in South Asia.

Its operations span a diverse product portfolio serving industrial switchgear, wires and cables, and building electrical segments—driving a broad reach across key engineering and infrastructure-related industries.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Precision Wires India is positioned to continue its strong growth in FY26, supported by consistent demand in sectors like power, industrial machinery, and infrastructure. The company is expected to sustain its double-digit growth trajectory due to increased focus on exports, diversification in product lines, and rising investments in energy and electrical infrastructure globally.

Name: TIL Ltd
Overview:
IL Limited is a prominent Indian company specializing in the manufacturing and marketing of a comprehensive range of material handling, lifting, port, and road construction solutions. With a legacy spanning over 80 years, TIL has established itself as a cornerstone in India's infrastructure development. The company offers a diverse product portfolio, including mobile cranes, reach stackers, rough terrain cranes, truck cranes, pick-and-carry cranes, crawler cranes, and aerial work platforms. These products are engineered to meet the rigorous demands of various industries such as construction, mining, ports, and refineries.

Headquartered in Kolkata, TIL operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in Kamarhati and Kharagpur, both ISO 9001:2015 certified. The company's Kharagpur plant is particularly notable for its advanced CNC machinery and dedicated testing tracks, underscoring TIL's commitment to quality and innovation.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

TIL Limited is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to introduce new cranes and forklifts over the next four years, aiming to expand its product portfolio and cater to the evolving needs of its customers. Additionally, TIL is focusing on technological advancements by integrating IoT capabilities and AI-driven analytics into its machinery, enhancing operational efficiency and customer satisfaction

Name: Indef Manufacturing Ltd
Overview:
Indef Manufacturing Ltd, established in 2022, is a prominent Indian company specializing in the design and production of material handling equipment. Operating under the Bajaj Group, the company offers a diverse range of products, including mechanical and electrical hoists, cranes, and storage solutions. Indef Manufacturing serves various industries such as automotive, engineering, metals, petrochemicals, power generation, cement, and food processing, providing tailored solutions to meet the unique needs of each sector.

The company operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Chakan, Pune, which commenced operations in 2022. This facility is equipped with advanced technology to produce high-quality hoists and cranes, ensuring precision and reliability in material handling operations.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Indef Manufacturing Ltd is focused on expanding its product offerings and enhancing its manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand for material handling equipment. The company plans to introduce new models and variants of hoists and cranes to cater to diverse industrial requirements. Additionally, Indef Manufacturing aims to strengthen its presence in both domestic and international markets through strategic partnerships and collaborations.

Name: Greaves Cotton Ltd
Overview:
Greaves Cotton Ltd is a diversified Indian engineering company with a strong presence in mobility, engineering, and electric vehicle (EV) sectors. Established in 1859, the company has evolved from a diesel engine manufacturer to a comprehensive provider of sustainable mobility and engineering solutions.

The company operates across three main business segments: Greaves Retail, Greaves Engineering, and Greaves Electric Mobility. Greaves Cotton Ltd has been expanding its client base and product offerings, aiming to strengthen its position as a leader in India’s transition to sustainable mobility solutions.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Greaves Cotton aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its electric mobility offerings and enhancing operational efficiencies across all business segments. The company is focusing on innovation and customer-centric solutions to strengthen its position in the sustainable mobility and engineering markets. With a diversified portfolio and strategic initiatives, Greaves Cotton is well-positioned to capitalize on emerging opportunities in India and internationally.

Name: Oswal Pumps Ltd
Overview:
Oswal Pumps Ltd, founded in 2003, is one of India’s fastest-growing vertically integrated manufacturers of pumps—covering solar submersibles, monoblock pumps, pressure pumps, industrial and agricultural ranges, and electric motors. Based in Haryana, it operates a large, multi-product manufacturing facility and has built a vast dealer and service network across India. The company also exports to over 20 countries.

It has earned multiple industry accolades and focuses on energy-efficient, BEE 5-star rated products. With strong in-house capabilities spanning die-casting, winding, and cable production, Oswal maintains tight control over product quality and cost.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Oswal Pumps Limited is strategically positioning itself for substantial growth by expanding its manufacturing capacity and diversifying its product offerings. The company plans to increase its pump production from 200,000 to 500,000 units and expand its solar module capacity from 570 MW to 2,200 MW by 2028. Additionally, Oswal Pumps aims to enhance its global presence, currently exporting to 22 countries, including Australia, Bangladesh, and Dubai.

Name: Windsor Machines Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1963, Windsor Machines Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in plastic processing machinery. The company offers a comprehensive range of products, including injection molding machines, extrusion lines, and blow molding equipment, catering to various industries such as packaging, automotive, and consumer goods. Windsor Machines operates through two primary segments: Extrusion Machinery and Injection Moulding Machinery, providing solutions for pipe extrusion, blown film extrusion, and injection molding applications 

With a global presence, Windsor Machines serves and supports the varied needs of the plastic processing industry across 65 countries. The company's continued association with Kuhne GmbH (Germany) has enabled it to build technological excellence and rise rapidly against competition.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Windsor Machines Ltd is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to expand its product offerings in the plastic processing machinery sector to cater to the evolving needs of its customers. Windsor Machines aims to strengthen its distribution network across international markets, ensuring wider accessibility of its products. The company is also focusing on enhancing its research and development capabilities to foster innovation and improve product quality.

Name: Swaraj Engines Ltd
Overview:
Swaraj Engines Ltd (SEL) is a leading Indian manufacturer of diesel engines, producing engines ranging from 22 HP to over 65 HP. Established in 1985, the company has a strong presence in the agricultural and industrial sectors, catering to various machinery applications. SEL is known for its high-quality manufacturing processes and precision engineering.

The company operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities equipped with advanced technology to ensure the production of reliable and efficient engines. SEL is committed to innovation and continuous improvement, focusing on meeting the evolving demands of its customers. The company also emphasizes sustainability and environmental responsibility in its operations.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Swaraj Engines Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its product offerings and enhancing its manufacturing capabilities. The company is focusing on innovation and quality to meet the evolving demands of the agricultural and industrial sectors. With a strong financial performance and a commitment to excellence, SEL is well-positioned for sustained growth in the coming years.

Name: Lloyds Engineering Works Ltd Partly Paidup
Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd
Overview:
Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd, incorporated in 1993, is a diversified financial services platform focusing on affluent, high-net-worth (HNI), ultra-high-net-worth (UHNI) clients, corporates, and institutions. Majority-owned by PAG, one of Asia’s largest alternative investment managers, the company offers a fully integrated model encompassing wealth management, asset management, asset services, and capital markets. Its hybrid delivery combines advanced technology with relationship managers to provide tailored solutions across investment advisory, estate planning, lending, treasury services, and capital market access.

The platform is built on a client-first foundation and operates with strong governance, an independent board, and a wide national and international presence. It serves over 1.2 million affluent and HNI clients, 4,250+ UHNI families, and 1,000+ corporates, supported by 3,400+ employees and 1,300+ relationship managers across 100+ offices. Its service capability is enhanced by in-house research, bespoke structuring, and strategic offshore hubs in Dubai and other global financial centres.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Nuvama targets significant scaling in all business lines — doubling RM capacity in 3–5 years, expanding NRI and offshore wealth services, and growing asset management AUM 6–8x with a focus on alternatives and public strategies. Asset services aim to deepen institutional relationships and broaden product offerings, while technology investments will continue to enhance efficiency and client experience. The company is poised to benefit from India’s structural wealth growth and the rapid expansion of the alternatives market

Name: IIFL Finance Ltd
Overview:
IIFL Finance Limited is a diversified NBFC catering primarily to the retail lending segment, with operations spanning home loans, gold loans, microfinance, loans against property, digital loans, and construction finance. The company operates an extensive network of over 4,800 branches, serving more than 8 million customers nationwide. It holds leadership in affordable housing loans under ₹20 lakh through its subsidiary, IIFL Home Finance, and has a significant presence in gold lending through thousands of branches across India. Its lending model emphasizes retail focus, PSL compliance, and strong digital integration through proprietary platforms and fintech partnerships.

The company has progressively shifted towards high-quality, secured retail assets while maintaining healthy capitalization and a diversified borrowing mix. Its technology-driven processes, coupled with targeted segment expertise, support efficient credit underwriting and customer acquisition. Post the RBI directive impacting fresh gold loan disbursements, IIFL Finance has continued to strengthen its other verticals while addressing compliance requirements.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company is targeting accelerated growth in microfinance and affordable housing segments, aiming to double the portfolio in these categories over the medium term. While awaiting regulatory clearance to resume new gold loan disbursements, IIFL Finance is focused on diversifying its retail lending mix and expanding geographical reach to drive sustainable growth.

Name: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd
Overview: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions (IKS) is a technology-driven healthcare solutions provider established in 2006. It specializes in delivering integrated services like administrative support, clinical process optimization, medical documentation, virtual scribing, digital health solutions, and EHR migration for healthcare providers in US, Canada, and Australia.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd (IKS Health) is poised for robust growth by expanding its AI-driven Care Enablement Platform, which integrates clinical, operational, and financial functions to enhance healthcare delivery. The company is focusing on scaling its presence across the United States, Canada, and Australia, aiming to support over 800 healthcare enterprises and empower more than 150,000 clinicians. IKS Health is also investing in advanced solutions like IKS Scribble™ and AssuRx™ to streamline clinical documentation and medication management, thereby reducing clinician burnout and improving patient care.

Name: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd
Overview:
Groww is a Bengaluru-based fintech company that was incorporated in the late-2010s and offers a digital platform for retail investors to access a wide array of financial products. The company enables users to invest in mutual funds, stocks (including derivatives), exchange-traded funds (ETFs), digital gold and other investment instruments in a mostly paperless, app-first format.  

It has focused on simplifying investing for newer, first-time investors in India by providing an intuitive interface, broad product selection, and a minimal-friction onboarding process. Groww’s growth has also been bolstered by the rapid increase in retail participation in financial markets, its technology-driven approach, and its emphasis on education and accessibility beyond major metros.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Groww plans to further expand its product suite and move beyond basic investing into adjacent financial services such as wealth management, commodities trading, corporate bonds and loans against investments. It is targeting deeper market penetration in tier-2 and tier-3 cities, enhancing its technology platform (including better analytics and user experience), and improving monetisation of its large user base through premium services and value-added offerings.

Name: BSE Ltd
Overview:
BSE Ltd is Asia’s first and India’s oldest stock exchange, established in 1875 and located in Mumbai’s Dalal Street. It offers a trading platform across equities, currencies, debt instruments, mutual funds, and derivatives. With a trading speed of 6 microseconds, it is also the world’s fastest stock exchange.

Over the years, BSE has diversified into multiple businesses including data dissemination, insurance broking, mutual fund distribution, and agricultural spot trading. It operates prominent platforms like BSE StAR MF, India INX, and BEAM, and was the first stock exchange to be listed in India in 2017.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

BSE is building a stronger future by investing in cutting-edge infrastructure and expanding into new business areas. It is significantly upgrading its technology backbone—adding hundreds of co-location racks—to support high-frequency and algorithmic trading, driven by rising interest from global trading firms. The exchange is aiming to sustain its record-high IPO activity and grow platforms like its mutual fund distribution service and index offerings.

Name: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd
Overview:
HDFC AMC is one of India’s largest asset management companies, providing a wide spectrum of mutual funds, portfolio management, and advisory services across equity, debt, and money market instruments. With a strong brand, vast distribution network, and trusted product lineup, it serves retail, HNI, institutional, and corporate clients nationwide.
 
 Business Segments 
 
 Mutual Funds (Equity, Debt, Liquid): ~85% of total revenue
 
 Portfolio Management & Advisory: ~10% of total revenue
 
 Other Income (Fees, Other Services): ~5% of total revenue
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

HDFC AMC is leveraging its strong retail franchise, deep distribution network, and trusted brand to tap into India’s financialization wave. New fund launches, expanding HNI/institutional services, and growing SIP inflows support AUM growth. However, near-term headwinds include rising costs and market volatility. Despite cyclical sensitivity, its long-term leadership in the asset management space is underpinned by a broad product suite and strong governance.

Name: Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd
Overview:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd, incorporated in 1995, is a leading non-bank wealth solutions provider in India and ranks among the top three non-bank mutual fund distributors by gross commission. It operates under the Anand Rathi Group umbrella, which offers a broad range of investment services including private wealth, institutional equities, investment banking, insurance broking, and NBFC operations. As of FY25, the Group’s total AUM stood at ₹77,103 Cr, with Anand Rathi Wealth itself driving strong growth across its business verticals.

The company’s business spans three core segments—Private Wealth, Digital Wealth, and Omni Financial Advisor (OFA). The Private Wealth division serves HNI and Ultra-HNI clients, holding an AUM of ₹75,291 Cr in FY25 with 198,000 active client families. Its Digital Wealth segment, through AR Digital Wealth, targets the mass affluent market, while the OFA platform provides SaaS-based solutions to MFDs and IFAs, enabling them to manage ₹1,42,935 Cr in assets as of FY25. The company has a presence in 17 major Indian cities and a representative office in Dubai, with plans to expand to the UK by FY26 to tap into the NRI/HNI market.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Anand Rathi Wealth is poised for continued expansion, with a focus on increasing its assets under management (AUM) and enhancing its service offerings. Additionally, Anand Rathi Wealth is expanding its digital wealth platform, aiming to increase its AUM in this segment to ₹2,000 crores by 2026. The company's commitment to innovation and client-centric services positions it well for sustained growth in the evolving wealth management landscape.

Name: Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd
Overview:
Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd is a non-banking financial company (NBFC) that specializes in fund-based operations, managing a diversified portfolio comprising equity (listed and unlisted), private equity, real estate, debt instruments, and structured financing solutions. The company also offers secured lending, fixed-return portfolios, and equity investments in emerging businesses, establishing itself as a comprehensive asset manager and financier.

The firm's strategy emphasizes both opportunistic and structured investments across sectors, strengthening its market positioning through strategic acquisitions, portfolio diversification, and robust capital deployment frameworks.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Authum Investment & Infrastructure Limited is actively pursuing strategic expansions across its core business segments, including lending, asset management, and advisory services. The company is enhancing its capital structure to support these growth initiatives, with plans to raise external funding while maintaining a conservative gearing ratio. Authum is also focusing on diversifying its investment portfolio, with recent acquisitions in sectors such as pharmaceuticals and infrastructure.

Name: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd
Overview:
ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company (AMC) is a leading Indian asset management firm that provides a wide range of investment products and services to retail and institutional clients. Its core business is managing mutual funds across equity, debt, hybrid, passive and liquid strategies, catering to diverse investor goals from long-term wealth creation to income generation. 

The AMC has a pan-India distribution network that includes offices across multiple states, along with digital platforms like web and mobile apps to enhance client reach and engagement. It serves a large base of individual investors,
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

ICICI Prudential AMC aims to grow by expanding its mutual fund and alternates franchises, adding new schemes and investment strategies that meet evolving investor needs and regulatory trends. It plans to deepen its presence in high-potential segments like PMS and AIFs while scaling advisory services for global and offshore clients. The company is investing in digital platforms, analytics and technology enhancements to improve customer experience and streamline operations.

Name: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd
Overview:
Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd. (MOFSL), founded in 1987, is a well-diversified financial services company headquartered in India. The firm operates across Capital Markets, Asset & Wealth Management, and Housing Finance, servicing over 1.6 million customers across 550+ cities through 2,500+ business locations operated by partners.

It has evolved into a leading player with presence in broking, investment banking, mutual funds, portfolio management, alternative investment funds (AIFs), private equity, real estate funds, and home financing services. Its group companies include MOFSL Securities, MOAMC, Motilal Oswal Home Finance Ltd., and others.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd (MOFSL) is strategically enhancing its position in India's financial services sector by focusing on high-growth areas such as wealth management, asset management, and private equity. The company is expanding its digital platforms to provide seamless investment experiences and is actively involved in investor education initiatives to promote financial literacy. MOFSL's commitment to innovation and customer-centric services positions it well for sustained growth in the evolving financial landscape.

Name: Choice International Ltd
Overview:
Choice International Ltd, incorporated in 1993, is a diversified financial services provider offering broking and distribution, NBFC services, investment banking, and advisory solutions. The company operates through multiple subsidiaries, enabling it to serve retail, institutional, corporate, and government clients with a broad product suite.

Its business spans across securities broking, wealth management, lending, government advisory, and insurance broking, supported by a strong physical presence in Tier 3/4 markets and technology-driven platforms. The firm leverages both digital capabilities and a wide partner network to drive financial inclusion and expand its reach across India.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management guides robust CAGR, supported by multi-vertical growth, technology-led efficiency, and deeper penetration into Tier 3/4 markets. Margins are expected to remain strong with potential for incremental improvement, aided by operational leverage and expansion into new businesses like AMC and enhanced wealth management services.

Name: Angel One Ltd
Overview:
Angel One Ltd is a leading diversified financial services company and India’s largest listed retail stockbroking firm. It operates across stock, commodity, and currency broking, institutional broking, margin trading, depository services, and distribution of financial products, including mutual funds, loans, and insurance.

The company leverages technology and AI-driven platforms to deliver a superior customer experience, with a strong presence in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. Alongside its broking core, Angel One is expanding into asset management, wealth management, and credit intermediation, supported by a rapidly growing client base and diversified revenue streams.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Angel One aims to maintain double-digit sequential revenue growth, driven by AI-powered client engagement, deeper penetration in Tier 2/3 markets, expansion of AMC and wealth platforms, and increased cross-sell of financial products. Management remains structurally bullish on retail participation in Indian capital markets, expecting sustainable margin expansion and long-term market share gains.

Name: Jio Financial Services Ltd
Overview:
Jio Financial Services Ltd.: Business Overview and Strategic Outlook
 Jio Financial Services Ltd., formerly Reliance Strategic Investments Pvt Ltd, is a systemically important non-deposit taking NBFC registered with the RBI. As a holding company, it conducts its financial operations through subsidiaries such as Jio Finance Limited, Jio Insurance Broking Limited, Jio Payment Solutions Limited, and the joint venture Jio Payments Bank Limited.
 
 Business Focus and Offerings
 Core Operations: Digital financial services including lending (auto loans, home loans), insurance broking, payment solutions, and payment banking.
 
 Customer-Centric Approach: Development of a technologically advanced, AI-powered customer app to improve accessibility, customer experience, and engagement.
 
 Mission: Facilitate financial inclusion and improve financial well-being for the Indian population by delivering a diverse range of digital financial products.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook:
The company is well-positioned to benefit from India’s rapidly expanding digital economy, leveraging technology and AI to enhance operational efficiency and customer experience. Expansion of its product portfolio—including auto and home loans—aims to capture a larger market share, while low current penetration of financial investment products presents significant growth potential. A strong focus on financial inclusion ensures broad accessibility across urban and rural areas, aligning with government priorities and supporting sustainable, long-term growth.

Name: 360 ONE WAM Ltd
Overview:
360 ONE WAM Limited, formerly IIFL Wealth Management, is one of India’s largest private wealth management and asset management firms, serving ultra-high-net-worth individuals (UHNI), high-net-worth individuals (HNI), corporates, and institutions. Founded in 2008, the company offers discretionary and non-discretionary advisory, estate planning, lending solutions, portfolio management, alternate investment funds (AIF), mutual funds, private equity, and real estate strategies.

The firm operates across India and internationally in Singapore and Mauritius, combining a high-touch relationship model with technology-driven platforms. Its business mix is anchored by annuity-like ARR revenues, diversified transaction income, and a growing asset management arm focused on both listed and alternate strategies.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management expects sustained double-digit AUM growth driven by organic flows, inorganic contributions from B&K and UBS, and deeper penetration into HNI/UHNI and mass affluent segments. Yield compression is likely to be modest and offset by growth in alternates. Transaction income is targeted to remain steady at ~20% of total income. Cost efficiency gains from integrations are expected to further improve margins, while a strong product pipeline, including 4–5 new alternate strategies annually, will support incremental AUM of ₹8,000–10,000 crore each year.

Name: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd
Overview:
Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Limited (ABSL AMC), incorporated in 1994, is a joint venture between Aditya Birla Capital Limited and Sun Life AMC. It is one of India’s largest non-bank affiliated asset management companies, offering mutual fund services, portfolio management, offshore funds, real estate investments, and alternate investment products. The company manages a diversified portfolio across equity, debt, hybrid, ETF, and fund-of-fund categories, with flagship schemes such as Aditya Birla Sun Life Frontline Equity Fund and Aditya Birla Sun Life Corporate Bond Fund.

With a strong presence across 300+ locations, 86,000+ distributors, and coverage in 19,000+ pin codes, ABSL AMC has built a wide distribution network. It also maintains a robust digital platform, contributing significantly to new inflows and operational efficiency. The AMC focuses on expanding its alternate asset offerings and introducing innovative products to capture evolving investor needs in domestic and international markets.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
ABSL AMC aims to deepen its retail investor penetration, enhance digital adoption, and grow its alternate asset platform. With planned fund launches, a strong SIP book, and expanding high-margin equity assets, the company is positioned to strengthen its market share and deliver steady AUM growth in the coming years.

Name: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd
Overview:
Nippon Life India Asset Management (NAM India) is one of India’s leading asset management companies, engaged in mutual fund management—including ETFs—managed accounts (PMS, AIFs, pension funds), and offshore advisory mandates. Promoted by Japan's Nippon Life Insurance, which holds assets over JPY 97 trillion as of FY25, NAM India benefits from strong parentage and global asset management expertise.

The company manages an AUM of ₹6.56 lakh crore as of 9MFY25, with ₹5.56 lakh crore from mutual funds, ₹83,300 crore from managed accounts, and ₹16,700 crore internationally. It offers 91 mutual fund schemes (43 active, 48 passive), operates globally through offices in Singapore, Japan, Dubai, and GIFT City, and serves ~20 million unique investors through a 1.11 lakh-strong distribution network across T-30 and B-30 cities.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Nippon Life India Asset Management is gearing up for future growth by broadening its product range, notably expanding into passive offerings like ETFs and index funds, while also building its presence in offshore markets to tap new investor segments. The firm is committed to improving its digital reach and operational efficiency through a “build-operate-distribute” strategy, cost rationalization, and automation. It is also deepening financial inclusion by establishing branches in remote and border regions, widening its investor base across diverse geographies

Name: Electrosteel Castings Ltd
Overview:
Magna Electro Castings Ltd (MECL), established in 1990, specializes in manufacturing and supplying ferrous components, including ductile and grey iron castings, to users worldwide. The company caters to diverse industries by producing components ranging from 300 grams to 2,000 kilograms, with capabilities in both casting and fully machined forms. MECL's product portfolio encompasses bearing caps, valve bodies, exhaust manifolds, and turbocharger castings, among others.

With over 500 man-years of technical expertise, MECL has developed a portfolio of over 1,200 unique product designs and simulations of more than 2,500 castings. The company operates with a strong focus on quality and precision, serving both domestic and international markets.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Looking ahead, MECL aims to sustain its growth trajectory by leveraging its technical expertise and expanding its product offerings. The company plans to enhance its manufacturing capabilities and explore new markets to drive revenue growth in FY26 and beyond.

Name: TVS Holdings Ltd
Overview:
TVS Holdings Limited, formerly known as Sundaram Clayton Ltd, is a prominent auto components manufacturer in India and a part of the TVS Group, headquartered in Chennai. Established in 1962, the company specializes in aluminum pressure die castings used across a wide range of automotive applications. Its reputation as a key supplier in the automotive and non-automotive sectors stems from its quality-driven manufacturing processes and long-standing industry presence.

The company derives a significant portion of its revenue through its flagship subsidiary, TVS Motor Company, which is a leading two-wheeler and three-wheeler manufacturer in India. In recent years, TVS Holdings has diversified its operations further through its financial services arm, TVS Credit Services. With manufacturing facilities both in India and the US, and a growing international footprint, the company is well-positioned for sustained growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Sundaram Clayton Ltd is actively expanding its global footprint and enhancing its manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand for automotive components. The company has inaugurated a state-of-the-art die-casting facility in Thervoy Kandigai, Chennai, which is now the largest die-casting cluster in India. This facility integrates high-pressure, low-pressure, and gravity die-casting technologies under one roof, alongside finished machining capabilities, to produce aluminum die-cast components for automotive applications, including engine parts and structural elements for electric vehicles.

Name: Sterling Tools Ltd
Overview:
