The company plans to unlock value by redeveloping its prime real estate holdings, such as the Shipping House and MTI, into commercial and residential projects. These redevelopment projects are expected to generate significant revenue streams and enhance the company's asset base.

Name: Birla Cable Ltd
Overview:
Birla Cable Ltd, part of the M.P. Birla Group, is a leading manufacturer of optical fiber cables, copper telecommunication cables, and specialty cables. The company supplies to telecom operators, infrastructure providers, ISPs, and defense establishments, ensuring a diversified end-market presence.

With a strong manufacturing base in Madhya Pradesh, Birla Cable emphasizes high-quality, technologically advanced products that cater to India’s rapid digital infrastructure growth. The company has also built a strong export presence, supplying to markets in Europe, Africa, and Asia, giving it a global edge.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Birla Cable is poised to benefit from India’s 5G rollout and rising global fiber deployment. Continued product innovation and strong export momentum provide a favorable growth path for FY26.

Name: Universal Cables Ltd
Overview:
Universal Cables Ltd is a leading manufacturer of electrical and communication cables, serving industrial, power, and infrastructure sectors. Its product range includes power cables, control cables, instrumentation cables, and specialty cables for telecom and industrial applications.

The company emphasizes innovation, quality, and reliability, catering to domestic and international markets. Its strong manufacturing capabilities and wide distribution network allow it to meet diverse client requirements. Universal Cables is committed to sustainable manufacturing and adopting global standards to ensure product excellence and operational efficiency.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company plans to expand product offerings, invest in R&D, and enter new markets. Emphasis on sustainable manufacturing, advanced technologies, and operational efficiency is expected to support long-term growth. Focus on international expansion and strategic partnerships will enhance competitiveness.

Name: R R Kabel Ltd
Overview:
RR Kabel Limited, incorporated in 1995, is a diversified player in the consumer electricals sector with two main business segments: Wires & Cables (W&C) and Fast Moving Electrical Goods (FMEG). The company holds a ~40% share in the Indian electrical industry and is a key player in the branded W&C export market, serving over 72 countries. Its products cater to residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure needs, backed by strong manufacturing and R&D capabilities.

In the W&C segment, RR Kabel produces house wires, industrial wires, power and special cables, while its FMEG portfolio includes fans, lighting, switches, and appliances under the Luminous Fans and Lights brand (licensed) and its premium in-house RR Signature brand. The company has a wide distribution network of over 1.4 lakh retailers and a strong export footprint, with exports contributing nearly a third of revenues in Q1 FY26.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
RR Kabel aims to sustain double-digit revenue growth led by cable capacity expansion, increased export penetration, and margin accretive premium product launches. Operational efficiency gains, higher export contribution, and focus on premiumisation in FMEG are expected to further strengthen profitability in FY26–FY28.

Name: Finolex Cables Ltd
Overview:
Finolex Cables Limited, founded in 1958, is India’s leading and most diversified manufacturer of electrical and telecommunication cables. Over decades, the company has strengthened its position through manufacturing innovation, technical expertise, and operational excellence. The business caters to both retail and institutional markets, with a strong presence in the fast-moving electrical goods (FMEG) sector, expanding its product offerings to meet the needs of the growing B2C consumer segment.

The company operates with extensive backward integration, producing key raw materials in-house, including PVC compounds, copper rods, and optic fibers. It has a wide distribution network supported by over 5,000 channel partners, 175,000+ retailers, and exclusive retail outlets under the ‘Finolex House’ brand. Segment-wise, electrical cables dominate revenues, followed by communication cables and other products.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company has announced a ₹500 crore capex over the next 18–20 months to expand capacities across product categories, strengthen backward integration by manufacturing optical fiber preforms, increase fiber draw and auto cable capacity, expand compound manufacturing, and establish an e-beam facility.

Name: KEI Industries Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1968, KEI Industries Ltd is a prominent player in the wires and cables (W&C) industry, offering a comprehensive portfolio of power and specialty cables. The company caters to both retail and institutional customers across India and more than 60 international markets. It also undertakes turnkey EPC (Engineering, Procurement & Construction) projects in electrical infrastructure, substations, and railway electrification.

KEI has six strategically located manufacturing units across India, offering a combined cable production capacity of over 193,000 km/year, along with significant capacity for house wires, winding wires, and stainless-steel wires. It maintains a strong focus on R&D, with NABL-accredited in-house labs for innovation and customer-centric solutions. The company has been steadily ramping up capacity through internal accruals and debt-funded greenfield projects to support future growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

KEI Industries is primed for sustained growth driven by ambitious capacity expansions and strong export push. It is ramping up manufacturing capabilities via a major greenfield facility in Sanand, coupled with brownfield upgrades at Chinchpada and Pathredi, positioning the company to achieve double-digit volume growth across its wire and cable portfolio. The firm is also strengthening its presence in higher-margin segments like exports, aiming to boost export revenue share significantly, supported by new plant logistics and product certifications.

Name: Diamond Power Infrastructure Ltd
Overview:
Diamond Power Infrastructure Limited (DPIL) is a prominent player in India's power transmission and distribution sector. The company specializes in manufacturing a wide range of products, including conductors, cables, and transmission towers, catering to the growing energy demands across the country. With a robust infrastructure and state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities, DPIL has established itself as a reliable supplier to various utilities and industrial clients.

Over the years, DPIL has expanded its product portfolio and enhanced its production capabilities to meet the evolving needs of the power sector. The company's commitment to quality and innovation has enabled it to secure significant contracts and partnerships, positioning it for sustained growth in the competitive energy market.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Diamond Power Infrastructure Limited is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to bolster its market position and achieve substantial growth. The company has outlined plans to significantly enhance its manufacturing capacities, including tripling its conductor production and expanding its rod manufacturing facility. Additionally, DPIL aims to increase its medium voltage cable production by adding new lines to meet the escalating demand in the power sector.

Name: Paramount Communications Ltd
Overview:
Paramount Communications Ltd, established in 1989, is a prominent Indian manufacturer specializing in a diverse range of cables. Headquartered in New Delhi, the company produces power cables, telecom cables, railway cables, and specialized cables, catering to various sectors including power, telecommunications, railways, and infrastructure. The company emphasizes quality, reliability, and innovation, establishing itself as a key player in the Indian cable manufacturing industry.

Paramount Communications Ltd has a strong focus on technological upgrades and compliance with international standards, enabling it to deliver consistent and reliable products. Its extensive distribution network ensures accessibility across domestic and select international markets. The company continues to innovate and expand its product lines to meet evolving market needs.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company plans to expand product offerings and strengthen international presence. Focus on R&D, technological upgrades, and sustainability initiatives will drive long-term growth. Paramount Communications Ltd aims to maintain leadership in cable manufacturing through innovation and operational excellence.

Name: Polycab India Ltd
Overview:
Polycab is India’s leading manufacturer of cables, wires, and allied electrical products. Building on its core leadership in wires & cables, the company has diversified into consumer electricals, including fans, switches, LED lighting, and solar solutions. With strong backward integration and 25 manufacturing facilities, Polycab has built a reputation for quality and scale.
 
 Business Segments
 Wires & Cables:
 
 Core segment with the largest market share in India.
 
 FMEG (Fast-Moving Electrical Goods):
 
 Fans, LED lights, switches, solar inverters, and accessories.
 
 Services:
 
 Installation, maintenance, and after-sales support to strengthen customer relationships.
 
 Revenue Summary
 Wires & Cables contribute the majority of revenue, supported by a growing share from FMEG products.
 
 Extensive distribution network of 3,500+ dealers and 1,25,000+ retail outlets, with exports to 20+ countries.
 
 Targeting Rs 20,000 crore revenue by FY26 under its ‘Project Leap’ strategy, implying a 13% CAGR.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Polycab’s “Project Leap” initiative emphasizes scaling operations, launching new products, and enhancing brand presence to surpass Rs 20,000 crore in sales by FY26. The company is accelerating digital adoption, improving customer-centric practices, and expanding its export footprint across over 20 countries. Strengthened organizational capabilities with strategic talent and governance frameworks support its growth trajectory.

Name: Dynamic Cables Ltd
Overview:
Dynamic Cables Ltd., established in 1995 and headquartered in Jaipur, is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in power infrastructure cables. The company offers a comprehensive range of products, including low tension (LT), high tension (HT), extra high voltage (EHV), power control and instrumentation cables, flexible and industrial cables, solar cables, and railway signaling cables. 

With manufacturing facilities in Jaipur and Reengus, Dynamic Cables serves a diverse clientele encompassing government distribution companies, private distribution firms, engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) contractors, as well as industrial and export clients.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Looking ahead, Dynamic Cables aims to capitalize on the growing demand for power infrastructure cables, driven by infrastructure development and renewable energy projects. The company's robust order book and ongoing capacity expansion initiatives position it well for sustained growth in the coming quarters.

Name: Platinum Industries Ltd
Overview:
Platinum Industries Ltd operates as a specialty chemical manufacturer, with core business segments in PVC stabilizers, CPVC additives, and lubricants. These products find application in pipes, profiles, cables, and other industrial uses. The company has established itself as a reliable partner for leading PVC pipe and plastic product manufacturers in India, building strong relationships through consistent quality and service delivery.

The company has steadily expanded its product portfolio and geographic reach, with exports forming a meaningful part of its revenue mix. With increasing infrastructure, real estate, and industrial development in India driving demand for CPVC and PVC piping solutions, Platinum Industries is positioned to benefit as a key supplier in the value chain.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Management guided for further capacity expansion to meet surging demand in India and overseas. With global infrastructure spending and India’s housing focus driving PVC consumption, Platinum expects consistent growth. Plans for wider geographic reach, particularly in Africa and the Middle East, remain a key growth lever.

Name: Jindal Photo Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1986, Jindal Photo Ltd is a prominent player in India's photographic and imaging industry. The company is renowned for manufacturing and marketing a diverse range of imaging products under the 'Kodak' and 'Fujifilm' brands. Its product portfolio includes photographic color paper, chemicals, thermal printers, cine color positive film, medical X-ray films, and related equipment. 

Jindal Photo Ltd has established a strong presence in both the consumer and medical imaging segments, catering to a wide array of customer needs.  Tijori Finance The company operates as an investment holding firm, primarily holding investments in the securities of group companies and providing management consultancy services.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Looking ahead, Jindal Photo Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its product portfolio and enhancing its manufacturing capabilities. The company's focus on quality, innovation, and strategic investments positions it well to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the photographic and imaging industry.

Name: Ador Welding Ltd
Overview:
Ador Welding Ltd., established in 1951, is a prominent Indian company specializing in welding products, technologies, and services. The company offers a comprehensive range of products, including welding equipment, consumables, automation solutions, and flares & process equipment.

 Ador Welding serves various industries such as shipbuilding, oil and gas, railways, infrastructure, power, automotive sectors, heavy fabrication, and structural engineering. With a strong focus on "Make in India," Ador Welding manufactures world-class products across six facilities nationwide and maintains a robust sales and distribution network across the globe.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Ador Welding aims to continue its expansion in international markets, with a focus on the USA and Australia. The company plans to enhance its product offerings and strengthen its presence in existing markets.

Name: IKIO Technologies Ltd
Overview:
IKIO Technologies Ltd is a leading manufacturer of energy-efficient LED lighting solutions, serving both domestic and international markets. The company specializes in designing and producing a wide range of LED products for residential, commercial, and industrial applications.

In FY25, IKIO Technologies reported a decline in profitability due to increased raw material costs and competitive pressures. The company is focusing on enhancing operational efficiencies and expanding its product portfolio to drive growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
IKIO Technologies aims to improve its profitability by enhancing operational efficiencies and expanding its product portfolio. The company is focusing on increasing its market share in the LED lighting industry and exploring new revenue streams.

Name: Aimtron Electronics Ltd
Overview:
Established in 2011, Aimtron Electronics Ltd is a prominent Indian company specializing in Electronics System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) services, with a strong focus on Printed Circuit Board (PCB) design and assembly. Operating from state-of-the-art facilities in Vadodara, Gujarat, and Bengaluru, Karnataka, Aimtron offers a comprehensive range of services, including high-volume PCB assembly, quick-turn prototyping, and complete box build assembly. 

The company caters to diverse industries such as industrial automation, electric vehicle mobility, IoT, embedded systems, medical technology, wearables, gaming, and robotics
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Aimtron Electronics Ltd is strategically expanding its capabilities to meet the increasing demand for advanced electronics manufacturing services. The company plans to enhance its production capacity for PCB assembly and box build services, focusing on high-precision engineering to support industries such as electric vehicles, IoT, and medical technology.

Name: Control Print Ltd
Overview:
Control Print Ltd is a specialist manufacturer providing comprehensive coding and marking solutions, including machines and consumables such as fluid ink and ink ribbons. Established in 1991 and headquartered in Mumbai, the company serves diverse industries like FMCG, pharmaceuticals, food & beverage, automotive, and steel. 

With advanced manufacturing facilities in Himachal Pradesh and Assam and an extensive branch network, it ensures broad domestic and international reach.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Control Print seems well-positioned for growth with a diversified product range and strong customer reach. If the company can manage cost pressures and optimize its expense structure, the improving revenue momentum may translate into profit recovery in upcoming quarters.

Name: Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1990, Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd (MEIL) is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in transformer components and related products. Headquartered in Jaipur, Rajasthan, the company offers a comprehensive range of products, including CRGO (Cold Rolled Grain Oriented) slit coils, cut laminations, wound cores, amorphous cores, core assemblies, and oil-immersed circuit breakers.

The company operates five state-of-the-art production facilities in Rajasthan, with a combined annual production capacity of 16,200 metric tonnes of CRGO, 1,022,500 kilovolt amperes of transformers, 75,000 units of oil-immersed circuit breakers, and 2,400 metric tonnes of amorphous units.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd is focused on expanding its manufacturing capacity and enhancing its product offerings to meet the growing demand in the power infrastructure sector. The company plans to increase its production capabilities, particularly in high-capacity transformer components, to cater to both domestic and international markets.

Name: Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd
Overview: Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd is India's leading electronic system design and manufacturing service company. The company offers services ranging from concept to new product development, including PCB assembly, box build, system integration, DFM, DFT, and prototyping solutions. Vinyas serves customers worldwide, providing comprehensive electronics manufacturing services.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Vinayak Polycon International Ltd is actively enhancing its operational capabilities to drive growth. The company is investing in an in-house mold-making facility, which is expected to expedite product development and reduce time-to-market for new designs. This strategic move aims to improve cost-effectiveness and technical competence, aligning with the evolving needs of customers.

Name: Salzer Electronics Ltd
Overview:
Salzer Electronics Ltd is a well-known name in the field of manufacturing electrical switches, cam rotary switches, and modular switches in India. The company also offers a range of products, including wiring ducts, terminal connectors, and energy management solutions.

Salzer Electronics Ltd's products are used in various applications, from industrial automation to residential and commercial electrical installations.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Salzer Electronics Ltd aims to expand its product offerings and enhance manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand in domestic and international markets. The company is also focusing on sustainability and technological advancements to stay ahead in the industry.

Name: Vikran Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Established in 2008, Vikran Engineering Limited is a fast-growing Indian Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) company specializing in delivering end-to-end infrastructure solutions. The company offers comprehensive services across various sectors, including power transmission and distribution, water infrastructure, railway infrastructure, and solar energy projects. 

With a strong focus on quality and timely execution, Vikran Engineering has established a reputation for successfully completing complex projects in challenging environments. The company's diversified order book reflects its capabilities in handling a wide range of infrastructure projects, contributing to its position as a leading EPC player in the Indian market.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Vikran Engineering Limited is poised for significant growth, focusing on expanding its presence in the renewable energy sector, particularly in solar energy projects. The company aims to leverage its expertise in EPC services to tap into emerging opportunities in infrastructure development across India. Strategic initiatives include enhancing operational efficiencies, adopting advanced technologies, and exploring new markets to diversify its project portfolio.

Name: Kernex Microsystems (India) Ltd
Overview: Kernex Microsystems (India) Ltd is an ISO 9001 certified company established in 1991 and registered as a 100% Export Oriented Unit. The company specializes in providing professional electronic systems capable of operating under stringent and harsh environmental conditions. Its capabilities include concept design, validation, manufacture, evaluation, installation, and providing technical and maintenance support on a turnkey basis.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
The business is gearing up for robust expansion by rolling out its safety systems across an increasingly broader network, steadily winning major deployment contracts that enhance its market presence. It is strengthening its delivery and execution capabilities by partnering on infrastructure development, building up reliable installation pipelines. With a focus on advanced safety technology and integration into railway operations, the firm is positioning itself to become the preferred provider for modernized transit safety solutions.

Name: ICE Make Refrigeration Ltd
Overview:
ICE Make Refrigeration Ltd is a leading manufacturer of industrial and commercial refrigeration products, catering to sectors like dairy, cold storage, pharmaceuticals, and food processing. Its offerings include cold rooms, refrigeration systems, and transport refrigeration units.

The company’s focus on energy-efficient solutions and custom-built refrigeration systems has positioned it as a preferred partner for industries requiring temperature-sensitive logistics and storage.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
ICE Make is well-positioned to grow with rising cold chain investments in India. The company’s focus on innovation and sector-specific solutions is likely to support expansion in FY26.

Name: Kirloskar Electric Company Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1946, Kirloskar Electric Company Ltd is a prominent Indian electrical engineering company. The company manufactures a wide range of products, including motors, generators, transformers, and alternators. Kirloskar Electric caters to core sectors such as power generation, transmission and distribution, transportation, and renewable energy. With over 70 products under eight product groups, the company plays a pivotal role in India's industrialization.Kirloskar Electric Co. Ltd. is a prominent Indian company specializing in the manufacturing and distribution of electrical and power generation equipment. As part of the Kirloskar Group, the company offers a comprehensive portfolio of products, including motors, generators, transformers, switchgear, and control panels, serving industries such as power generation, oil and gas, water treatment, infrastructure, and manufacturing. Known for its high-quality and reliable electrical equipment, the company emphasizes technological innovation and invests in research and development to deliver advanced solutions tailored to customer needs.

Beyond manufacturing, Kirloskar Electric provides a range of power generation solutions, including diesel and gas generator sets, as well as cogeneration systems designed to be efficient, cost-effective, and environmentally friendly. The company also offers installation, commissioning, and after-sales support through a strong domestic and international service network. With a commitment to sustainability, energy efficiency, and customer satisfaction, Kirloskar Electric serves industries, commercial establishments, and government organizations worldwide, aiming to foster industrial growth and infrastructure development.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Kirloskar Electric Company Ltd (KECL) is actively pursuing growth through strategic investments and technological advancements. The company is focusing on expanding its product portfolio and enhancing manufacturing capabilities to meet the evolving demands of the electric motor and power generation sectors. KECL's commitment to innovation is evident in its investment in research and development, aiming to introduce energy-efficient and environmentally friendly solutions

Name: Vidya Wires Ltd
Overview:
Vidya Wires Limited is a manufacturer of copper and aluminum wires and related conductivity products used in a wide range of industrial applications. It produces precision-engineered enameled winding wires, paper-insulated conductors, copper busbars, bare copper conductors, PV ribbons and aluminium paper-covered strips that are essential for power generation, electrical systems, electric mobility, clean energy and railways. 

The company makes thousands of different product variants across very fine to thicker sizes to suit diverse customer needs. Headquartered in Anand, Gujarat, Vidya Wires has grown into one of India’s larger players in insulated copper and aluminum conductors with a diversified customer base across domestic and international markets.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Vidya Wires is focused on expanding its production capacity significantly by adding a new manufacturing unit to nearly double its total output, enabling it to meet rising demand from power transmission, renewables, e-mobility and industrial customers. It also plans to broaden its product range by introducing higher-value products such as copper foils, solar cables and advanced aluminium winding wires, helping it enter newer end-use segments.

Name: Epack Durable Ltd
Overview:
Epack Durable Ltd is a leading packaging solutions provider offering customized, sustainable, and durable packaging for industrial, commercial, and consumer products. The company specializes in high-quality flexible and rigid packaging, with a focus on process optimization, material innovation, and customer-centric solutions.

With an emphasis on sustainability, Epack Durable has introduced eco-friendly materials and advanced production techniques. The company maintains a strong market presence through efficient distribution, reliable supply chain management, and technology-driven packaging innovations.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company aims to expand its footprint in both domestic and international markets through capacity enhancements, product innovation, and sustainable packaging solutions. Continued focus on technology-driven operations and customer-centric offerings is expected to support long-term growth.

Name: HPL Electric & Power Ltd
Overview:
HPL Electric & Power Ltd is a renowned electrical equipment manufacturer in India, known for its presence across diverse product verticals such as metering solutions, modular switches, switchgears, LED lighting, and wires & cables. With four decades of experience, the company serves a broad customer base—from utilities and government bodies to retail and institutional clients, while also maintaining a strong export footprint.

The company emphasizes innovation and automation, positioning itself as a trusted and quality-driven brand in India's electrical solutions market.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management highlighted key strategic priorities, including scaling up manufacturing capacity to meet rising smart metering demand, deepening automation in switchgear production, and enhancing product development pipelines. Capital expenditure for FY25 was just over ₹70 crore—higher than normal—to support capacity expansion.

Name: Indo Tech Transformers Ltd
Overview:
Indo Tech Transformers Ltd is a specialist in manufacturing power and distribution transformers, including bespoke solutions like mobile substation transformers and turnkey substation systems. Established in 1999, the company serves diverse industrial sectors requiring robust electrical infrastructure. 

Headquartered in India, its manufacturing capabilities cater to both domestic and global markets, with a strong emphasis on technical customization and reliability. The company’s value proposition lies in offering full-fledged transformer solutions from product design and fabrication to commissioning enabling customers to rely on a single provider for complex electrical infrastructure needs.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Indo Tech Transformers Ltd is poised for significant expansion, with plans to more than double its transformer manufacturing capacity from 3,500 MVA to 8,000 MVA at its Chennai facility. This capacity enhancement is expected to be achieved through internal accruals within the next 8–12 months, aiming to meet the increasing demand in the power transmission sector.

Name: MIC Electronics Ltd
Overview:
MIC Electronics Ltd, founded in 1988 and headquartered in Hyderabad, is a diversified electronics company engaged in the design, development, and manufacturing of LED products, medical appliances, and electric vehicles (EVs). The company has established a strong presence in sectors such as transportation, healthcare, and renewable energy, delivering innovative solutions to meet evolving market demands. 

With a commitment to quality and sustainability, MIC Electronics operates in three primary business segments: LED products, medical and other appliances, and automobiles (EVs). The company has been actively involved in projects that enhance public infrastructure, including the installation of emergency lighting systems in railway coaches, and has developed energy-efficient lighting solutions for various industrial applications.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
MIC Electronics is poised for growth, driven by its diversified product portfolio and strategic initiatives. The company's focus on expanding its presence in the EV market and enhancing its offerings in the LED and medical segments positions it well to capitalize on emerging opportunities in these sectors.

Name: Honda India Power Products Ltd
Overview:
Honda India Power Products Ltd (HIPP), a subsidiary of Honda Motor Co., Japan, specializes in manufacturing and marketing a diverse range of power products. Established in 1985, the company offers portable gensets, water pumps, general-purpose engines, lawn mowers, brush cutters, tillers, and marine engines. HIPP operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in Greater Noida, Rudrapur, and Puducherry, ensuring high-quality production standards. 

With a strong emphasis on innovation and customer satisfaction, HIPP has consistently introduced technologically advanced products. The company's commitment to quality and performance has earned it a reputable position in the industry.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
HIPP aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its product portfolio and enhancing operational efficiencies. The company's focus on innovation and quality is expected to drive demand for its products in both domestic and international markets.

Name: Prostarm Info Systems Ltd
Overview:
Prostarm Info Systems Ltd is a leading provider of power backup and energy solutions tailored for India’s critical sectors. Operating since 2008, the company offers modular UPS systems, solar inverters, UPS accessories like Modbus cards, and serves multiple industries—including banking, IT, healthcare, and infrastructure—with reliable, customized power products. It maintains a national presence via multiple offices and a strong service and engineering network ensuring quick response across more than 200 districts.

Through in-house manufacturing and R&D, Prostarm emphasizes quality, innovation, and accessibility—designing solutions that withstand Indian power realities and enable digital continuity.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
With a focus on innovation and national reach, Prostarm is poised to expand its footprint further. Future growth drivers include deeper penetration into Tier-II/III cities and leveraging renewables integration for hybrid UPS solutions.

Name: Elecon Engineering Company Ltd
Overview:
Elecon Engineering Company Ltd., established in 1960, is a leading manufacturer of industrial gear solutions and material handling equipment with a strong domestic presence and a footprint in over 90 international markets. Its portfolio caters to core industries such as steel, cement, power, defense, and OEM manufacturing, supported by in-house design, engineering, and production capabilities. .

With two primary business divisions Gears and Material Handling Equipment (MHE) Elecon holds a leadership position in the Indian organized gear market and is scaling its global reach. The strategic vision is anchored on export growth, OEM partnerships, aftermarket expansion, and targeted capex to enhance capacity and capabilities. This approach is supported by strong balance sheet health and a focus on high-margin service revenues.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management remains confident of sustaining revenue growth and maintaining steady-state EBITDA margins near 24%, driven by domestic infrastructure demand, export scale-up, OEM penetration, and expanding aftermarket services. Geopolitical risks are being managed, and visibility extends to FY27 with clear growth opportunities in defense, refurbishment, and large-scale industrial capex.

Name: Genus Power Infrastructures Ltd
Overview:
Genus Power Infrastructures Limited, part of the Kailash Group, is a leading provider of smart metering solutions and turnkey engineering services in India’s power sector. The company specializes in advanced metering products, integrated software platforms, and end-to-end implementation capabilities that serve utilities and power distribution companies nationwide.

Its portfolio spans smart electricity and gas meters, software solutions, and large-scale power transmission and distribution projects. With a strong focus on backward and forward integration, technology automation, and operational efficiency, the company is well positioned to capture opportunities in India’s ongoing smart grid transformation.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
The company expects strong double-digit growth in FY26, driven by robust execution of existing orders, resumption of new tendering activity, and rising smart meter adoption across India. Investments in capacity, technology, and platform capabilities position it to benefit from the next phase of the RDSS rollout and broader power distribution reforms.

Name: Zen Technologies Ltd
Overview:
Zen Technologies Limited, incorporated in 1996 and headquartered in Hyderabad, is India’s largest supplier of simulation training equipment and anti-drone systems. The company specializes in combat training solutions and counter-drone technologies for defense, paramilitary, and police forces, with operations extending to the UAE and USA. Its solutions integrate live, virtual, and constructive simulations, alongside operational products like advanced corner-shooting devices and wideband counter-drone systems.

The company has a strong domestic footprint with 90% of revenue from repeat customers and a growing export presence. Zen maintains a significant technological edge through deep R&D capabilities, DSIR-recognized facilities, and over 172 patent applications as of 9M FY25. Its product portfolio spans live ranges, virtual simulation, combat training centers, UAV systems, and AI-enabled defense technologies.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Zen Technologies Ltd is actively expanding its capabilities in advanced defense technologies through strategic acquisitions and product innovations. The company has acquired a 55% stake in TISA Aerospace Pvt Ltd, enhancing its portfolio in loitering munitions and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). Additionally, Zen has completed acquisitions of Applied Research International Pvt Ltd and Bhairav Robotics Pvt Ltd, broadening its expertise in naval simulation and autonomous robotics

Name: Graphite India Ltd
Overview:
Graphite India Ltd is a leading manufacturer and seller of graphite electrodes, carbon, and related products, catering primarily to steel manufacturing and industrial sectors. The company’s operations span across India with a diversified customer base both domestically and internationally. Leveraging decades of technical expertise, it maintains strong market positioning in the graphite electrode industry.

Its portfolio covers a range of graphite and carbon products, ensuring relevance across multiple industrial applications. The company focuses on efficiency, technology upgrades, and customer-centric product offerings to sustain competitiveness. With an established brand reputation, Graphite India continues to explore opportunities for capacity optimization and market expansion.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Graphite India anticipates steady demand from the steel industry in FY26, aided by global infrastructure investments and domestic steel capacity expansion. Management expects utilization rates to improve, with margins benefiting from a stable raw material cost environment and operational efficiencies, positioning the company for moderate revenue and profitability growth.

Name: PG Electroplast Ltd
Overview:
PG Electroplast Limited (PGEL), a flagship of PG Group, is a leading Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS) provider, offering ODM, OEM, and plastic injection molding solutions to both Indian and global brands. Its diversified manufacturing footprint spans ACs, washing machines, coolers, and other consumer durables.

In the most recent fiscal year, PGEL delivered remarkable growth, driven largely by its product business, which now represents a dominant share of total revenue. The company also retains a strong balance sheet and continues to scale capacity across multiple locations.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
PGEL is positioned for sustainable growth supported by outsourcing tailwinds, product diversification, and capacity expansion. While early monsoon-related demand softness and high inventory could weigh on near-term margins, its robust balance sheet, client base, and growth investments reinforce a positive long-term outlook.

Name: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd
Overview:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd is a prominent Indian aerospace and defense electronics company specializing in the design, development, and manufacture of electronic, electromechanical, and engineering solutions. Established in 1997 and headquartered in Hyderabad, the company caters to defense, space, railways, and homeland security sectors.

The company focuses on delivering high-quality, mission-critical systems, leveraging advanced technologies and a skilled workforce. Apollo Micro Systems is committed to innovation and operational excellence to meet the evolving demands of its clientele and achieve sustainable growth.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its product portfolio and enhancing manufacturing capabilities. The company is focusing on innovation and quality to meet the evolving demands of the aerospace and defense electronics industry. With a strong financial performance and strategic initiatives, Apollo Micro Systems is well-positioned for sustained growth in the coming years.

Name: Surya Roshni Ltd
Overview:
Surya Roshni Limited, established in 1973, is a leading manufacturer and exporter in India’s steel pipes and lighting industries. It holds a dominant position in ERW GI Pipes and is one of the largest exporters of ERW pipes, alongside being the second-largest player in the lighting segment. The company has consistently focused on enhancing its product mix with higher value-added offerings to drive profitability and strengthen its market leadership.

With a robust distribution network and manufacturing footprint, Surya Roshni has expanded into new product categories such as wiring cables and pumps. Its growth strategy blends capacity expansion, operational efficiencies, and market diversification both domestically and internationally while maintaining a strong financial position and debt-free status.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Steel pipe volumes are expected to exceed 1.1 million tons with higher EBITDA per ton, and lighting to deliver double-digit growth with stable margins. Over the next three years, the share of value-added steel products is expected to rise to 55–60%, wiring and pumps to scale rapidly, and exports to benefit from favorable global trade dynamics.

Name: Esab India Ltd
Overview:
ESAB India Ltd, a subsidiary of ESAB Corporation USA, is a leading manufacturer and supplier of welding consumables, cutting equipment, automation solutions, PPE, and related digital services in India. The company serves a broad base of industrial sectors through its strong distribution network of ~200 distributors and direct institutional clients.

With four manufacturing facilities in Chennai, Kolkata, Nagpur, and Chengalput, ESAB India maintains a strong export footprint spanning multiple regions globally. The company continues to focus on productivity, innovation, and expansion of its distributor network to strengthen sales and profitability, while leveraging global expertise and best practices from its parent group.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management remains focused on long-term investment and navigating short-term turbulence through cost discipline, productivity gains, and product innovation. Opportunities lie in new product introductions, export growth, revival in the capital goods cycle, and expansion of service revenues, particularly in cost-competitive markets like India. The company is also well-positioned to leverage global acquisitions and market presence to strengthen its competitive edge.

Name: Syrma SGS Technology Ltd
Overview:
Syrma SGS Technology Limited, incorporated in 2004 and headquartered in Chennai, is an engineering and design company specializing in turnkey electronics manufacturing services (EMS). The company offers an integrated suite of solutions to OEMs, ranging from product concept co-creation to high-volume production, with expertise in printed circuit board assemblies, RFID products, electromechanical parts, motherboards, and memory modules.

With 12 manufacturing facilities across India and three dedicated R&D centers in India and Germany, Syrma serves over 270 customers in more than 25 countries. Its diverse sector exposure spans automotive, industrial, healthcare, consumer electronics, IT, and railways. In FY25, Syrma inaugurated a new integrated manufacturing facility in Pune to strengthen PCB assembly capabilities, while also forming a joint venture to manufacture multi-layer PCBs in India, targeting a large import-substitution opportunity.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management guides for 30–35% revenue growth and 8.5–9% EBITDA margins. The pivot to automotive, industrial, and healthcare segments, combined with the PCB JV, positions Syrma for sustained margin expansion and export growth. Execution of the order book, timely rollout of the PCB plant, and resolution of US tariff uncertainties are key to meeting targets.

Name: HEG Ltd
Overview:
HEG Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer and exporter of graphite electrodes, operating the largest single-site integrated plant globally. The company primarily serves the steel industry’s Electric Arc Furnace (EAF) segment, supplying various grades of electrodes critical for steel production. HEG is part of the LNJ Bhilwara Group, leveraging a strong industrial legacy and expertise in cost-efficient production.

The global steel industry is undergoing a shift toward EAF technology driven by decarbonization goals, supporting growing graphite electrode demand over the medium term. Despite short-term pricing pressure and tariff challenges, HEG maintains high capacity utilization and robust financial health while expanding its product portfolio into emerging green technologies such as battery anodes.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management is optimistic on demand recovery driven by accelerating global EAF transitions and expects pricing to improve over the next few quarters. The expansion projects and Greentech platform position HEG for sustained growth and value creation over the medium term, while navigating near-term cyclical challenges and tariff uncertainties.

Name: Kaynes Technology India Ltd
Overview:
Kaynes Technology India Limited, incorporated in 2008, is a leading integrated electronics manufacturing services (ESDM) and IoT-enabled solutions provider. The company offers end-to-end capabilities from conceptual design and process engineering to integrated manufacturing and life-cycle support, serving industries such as automotive, industrial, aerospace, defense, railways, medical, IT, and IoT. It operates 21 advanced manufacturing and design facilities, with upcoming capacities in OSAT (Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test) and HDI (High-Density Interconnect) PCBs, positioning itself as a strategic partner to global OEMs.

The company has built strong global relationships, serving over 500 customers across 30+ countries, with marquee names in automotive, industrial, aerospace, and medical electronics. FY25 saw Kaynes expand capacity at its Chamarajanagar and Hyderabad plants, enhance cleanroom and wire-bonding capabilities, and grow internationally with acquisitions like Sensonic GmbH in Austria. Its design-led manufacturing approach and certified facilities allow it to address high-value, low-volume segments with flexibility and speed.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company is targeting revenue of ₹4,500 Cr in FY26 with operating margins above 15%, supported by its ₹74,011 Mn order book and expansion into OSAT and HDI PCB manufacturing. Significant capex will continue in FY26 and FY27 to commission semiconductor and PCB facilities, expand international presence, and enhance value-added offerings.

Name: V-Guard Industries Ltd
Overview:
Founded in 1977, V-Guard Industries Ltd. is a diversified Indian manufacturer in the Electronics, Electricals, and Consumer Durables space. Originally renowned for voltage stabilizers in South India, the company has expanded into a wide product portfolio including UPS systems, inverter batteries, house wiring cables, pumps, switchgear, water heaters, solar water heaters, fans, air coolers, and kitchen appliances. V-Guard operates both through in-house manufacturing and outsourcing (~35% of its product profile) with stringent quality control and design oversight.

The company has steadily transitioned from being regionally focused to becoming a pan-India player. Non-South geographies now contribute nearly half of its revenue, supported by a network of 35 branches and over 1 lakh channel partners. Manufacturing facilities are spread across Tamil Nadu, Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Telangana, Haryana, Sikkim, and Gujarat. Its growth strategy is driven by brand-building, capacity expansion, and increasing market share in existing and emerging product categories.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
V-Guard expects demand normalisation in coming quarters, aided by capacity enhancement projects and distribution expansion. It plans to add 3,000–4,000 new retailers annually while targeting a 10% EBITDA margin. Market share gains are anticipated in Electronics (stabilizers, UPS, batteries), Electricals (house wiring cables, pumps, switchgear), and Appliances (water heaters, fans, solar water heaters). Strategic focus remains on strengthening non-South presence and leveraging brand equity for long-term growth.

Name: Aditya Vision Ltd
Overview:
Aditya Vision Ltd, established in 1999 and headquartered in Patna, Bihar, is a prominent multi-brand consumer electronics retail chain in India. The company specializes in offering a wide range of electronic products, including televisions, refrigerators, air conditioners, home theater systems, and other consumer durables. With a focus on smaller Tier II and Tier III cities, Aditya Vision has expanded its retail footprint across Bihar and neighboring regions.

The company has established partnerships with leading domestic and international brands, offering a diverse product portfolio to meet the varied needs of its customers. By focusing on regional expansion and leveraging its retail expertise, Aditya Vision continues to strengthen its position in the competitive consumer electronics retail sector.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Aditya Vision plans to continue its expansion by adding 25–30 new stores, further strengthening its retail footprint. Despite challenges such as weather-induced slowdowns, the company has demonstrated resilience, with a 6% year-on-year revenue growth in Q1 FY26. With a robust operational model and strategic expansion plans, Aditya Vision is well-positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for consumer electronics in India's underserved markets.

Name: Avalon Technologies Ltd
Overview:
Avalon Technologies Ltd is a prominent Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) provider, delivering complete box-build solutions—from PCB design and assembly to full system integration—for global OEMs. It operates across sectors such as clean energy, rail, aerospace, industrial, and medical devices.

With dual manufacturing footprints in India and the U.S., the company supports geographically diversified delivery while strengthening its presence in domestic engineering and global export markets through precision engineering and integrated capabilities.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
With rising demand across diverse verticals, continued margin expansion, and a deepening order pipeline, Avalon is well-positioned for sustained growth. Its entry into semiconductor equipment manufacturing, expansion of Chennai capacity, efficiency gains, and balanced geographic delivery model offer a robust platform to underpin double-digit revenue and profitability growth in FY26.

Name: Schneider Electric Infrastructure Ltd
Overview:
Schneider Electric Infrastructure Limited (SEIL), incorporated in 2011, is a key player in manufacturing, designing, and servicing advanced electrical products and systems for the power sector. The company’s portfolio covers transformers, switchgear, protection relays, substation automation systems, and smart grid applications. With its vision to be a digital partner for sustainability and efficiency, SEIL leverages connected technologies and innovative solutions to serve critical sectors such as power generation, transmission & distribution, oil & gas, metros, and other energy-intensive industries.

SEIL operates four manufacturing facilities across Vadodara, Kolkata, and Chennai, supported by a strong domestic presence and select exports. The company focuses on offering tailored innovations for emerging markets, partnering with customers across utilities, transportation, renewable energy, and data center sectors. It benefits from a balanced business model, strong client relationships, and an expanding portfolio in modernization, digital services, and energy-efficient solutions.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Management’s strategic focus includes accelerating penetration in emerging sectors like data centers, renewables, and mobility, expanding capacity, and enhancing digital offerings. With strong industry tailwinds, robust order inflows, and a focus on modernization services, SEIL aims to maintain steady sales growth and improve profitability in the medium term.

Name: Inox Wind Ltd
Overview:
Inox Wind Limited (IWL), part of the INOXGFL Group, is a fully integrated wind energy solutions provider in India, offering end-to-end turnkey capabilities from project conception to commissioning and ongoing operations and maintenance (O&M). With over 13 years of operational track record, the company caters to a diverse client base, including Independent Power Producers (IPPs), Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs), utilities, corporates, and retail investors. Its portfolio includes 2 MW and 3 MW Wind Turbine Generators (WTGs) currently in production, along with secured licensing for a 4 MW platform.

The company operates four manufacturing facilities across Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh, and Himachal Pradesh, with an installed capacity exceeding 2.5 GW for nacelles, hubs, blades, and towers. Inox Wind also benefits from strong group synergies, with subsidiaries such as Inox Renewable Solutions (EPC services) and Inox Green Energy Services (one of India’s largest renewable O&M companies with ~5.1 GW under management). Its diversified order book of ~3.2 GW is spread across marquee clients, and the group is also making a strategic foray into solar energy to tap hybrid renewable opportunities.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company is also leveraging organic and inorganic growth opportunities in the O&M space, with a target of managing 10 GW of renewable assets within two years. Its entry into solar EPC and O&M further broadens its addressable market, positioning it to capture a larger share of India’s accelerating renewable energy investments.

Name: Triveni Turbine Ltd
Overview:
Triveni Turbine Limited (TTL), demerged from Triveni Engineering & Industries Ltd in 2010, is a leading manufacturer of industrial steam turbines up to 100 MW, catering to industrial captive and renewable power generation needs. Its portfolio spans back pressure, condensing, extraction, bleed, and API-compliant turbines, as well as reheat axial turbines designed for diverse industries such as biomass, waste-to-energy, waste heat recovery, geothermal, cement, steel, petrochemicals, textiles, and pulp & paper. TTL also provides comprehensive aftermarket solutions for both its own turbines and those of other OEMs.

The company has a global presence in over 80 countries, with 6,000+ turbines installed, contributing to a combined power generation capacity exceeding 16 GW. TTL operates two state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in Bengaluru (Peenya and Sompura) and maintains sales and service offices in the UK, Dubai, South Africa, and the USA. Its innovation focus includes API drive turbines and CO₂-based energy storage solutions, positioning it at the forefront of the energy transition.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
TTL plans to leverage its engineering expertise and expanding API market share to capture larger opportunities in both industrial and renewable power sectors. Its focus on energy-efficient turbines, CO₂-based storage, and an expanding export pipeline is expected to drive long-term growth, while its large installed base ensures steady aftermarket revenue streams.

Name: Voltamp Transformers Ltd
Overview:
Voltamp Transformers Ltd, established in Vadodara, Gujarat, specializes in the design, manufacture, and supply of oil-filled and dry-type transformers. With a legacy spanning over six decades, the company has executed more than 70,000 installations across India and select international markets. Voltamp caters to diverse sectors, including utilities, industries, infrastructure, and renewable energy, offering a comprehensive range of transformer solutions.

The company is strategically expanding its manufacturing capabilities to meet the growing demand in the power sector. Voltamp is targeting full capacity utilization in the ongoing fiscal year, FY26, with plans to enhance its production capacity to 6,000 MVA. This expansion is aimed at strengthening its position in the transformer industry and ensuring timely delivery to its clients.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Voltamp is optimistic about maintaining its growth trajectory in FY26, supported by robust demand in the power sector and strategic capacity expansion. The company aims to leverage its enhanced manufacturing capabilities and strong order book to achieve its revenue targets and sustain profitability.

Name: TD Power Systems Ltd
Overview:
TD Power Systems Ltd, established in 1999, specializes in manufacturing AC generators and electric motors tailored for various applications, including thermal, hydro, gas, and renewable energy sectors. The company is recognized for its expertise in delivering customized power solutions, catering to both domestic and international markets. With a robust presence in over 100 countries, TD Power Systems has installed more than 42 GW of capacity globally, underscoring its significant role in the power equipment industry.

Headquartered in Bengaluru, India, TD Power Systems operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and maintains a strong focus on research and development to meet evolving customer needs. The company's diverse product portfolio includes generators up to 250 MVA capacity, electric motors, and traction motors, serving industries such as cement, steel, oil and gas, marine, and railways. TD Power Systems is also expanding its footprint in the data center and geothermal energy sectors, reflecting its adaptability to emerging market demands.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
TD Power Systems is poised for continued growth, driven by its expanding order book and strategic initiatives in emerging sectors. The company's focus on innovation, capacity expansion, and global market penetration is expected to enhance its competitive edge. With a strong pipeline of projects and a diversified product portfolio, TD Power Systems is well-positioned to capitalize on opportunities in the power equipment industry.

Name: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd
Overview:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited (CGCEL) is a leading consumer electricals company in India with a legacy of over 75 years. It operates across two core business segments—Electrical Consumer Durables (ECD) and Lighting Products, offering a wide portfolio of fans, pumps, water heaters, appliances, and LED lighting under the "Crompton" brand. The company has consistently maintained leadership positions in multiple categories, including fans and residential pumps, supported by its deep distribution reach and strong product brand recall.

In recent years, CGCEL has strategically transformed itself under the Crompton 2.0 initiative, emphasizing premiumization, innovation, and market-driven go-to-market strategies. The company completed the acquisition and integration of Butterfly Gandhimathi Appliances, strengthening its presence in the South India kitchen appliance market. With manufacturing capacities spread across India, a wide retail network, and growing digital capabilities, Crompton aims to expand further into adjacent high-growth areas such as built-in kitchens and solar solutions.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals is strategically positioning itself for sustained growth through its "Crompton 2.0" vision, emphasizing innovation and consumer-centric product development. The company plans to introduce next-generation technology platforms, focusing on smart solutions, energy efficiency, durability, and easy reparability, supported by enhanced in-house R&D. Expansion into new segments and the introduction of premium offerings are central to its strategy, aiming to double its turnover in the next five to six years.

Name: Transformers & Rectifiers India Ltd
Overview:
Transformers & Rectifiers India Ltd (TARIL) is one of India’s largest manufacturers of power, furnace, and rectifier transformers, catering to power generation, transmission, distribution, and industrial sectors. With a manufacturing capacity of 40,000 MVA across three plants in Ahmedabad, the company is expanding to add 22,000 MVA by Q2 FY26, positioning itself to capture rising demand from the power sector’s multi-year expansion.

The company maintains a diversified product portfolio, including high-voltage power transformers, reactors, specialty transformers, and mobile substations. TARIL serves marquee clients such as Powergrid, NTPC, Tata Power, JSW, and Siemens Energy, and exports to 25+ countries. The recent acquisition of a CRGO lamination manufacturer marks a strategic backward integration move to control raw material costs and enhance margins.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
TARIL aims to achieve $1 billion revenue within the next three financial years, driven by capacity expansion, sustained high-margin order execution, and export growth. The company expects to become net debt-free in 18–24 months, with backward integration providing a margin cushion. Management sees no significant headwinds in the near term and anticipates strong demand momentum to continue.

Name: Honeywell Automation India Ltd
Overview:
Honeywell Automation India Limited (HAIL), established in 1987 as a joint venture between Tata and Honeywell, has evolved into a leading provider of integrated automation and software solutions. Specializing in process and building solutions, HAIL offers a diverse range of products, including environmental and combustion controls, along with engineering services to international clients.

With over 90 years of presence in India, Honeywell has become a significant player in the industrial automation sector. The company operates three manufacturing plants and four global centers for technology development across the country, contributing substantially to the "Make in India" initiative. Approximately 60% of its global software is developed in India, underscoring the nation's strategic importance to Honeywell's global operations.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Honeywell Automation India is projected to surpass the $1 billion revenue mark in 2025, driven by advancements and integration of AI, 5G, and cloud technologies. The company is capitalizing on these emerging technologies to expand its footprint and enhance its offerings in the country.

Name: CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd
Overview:
CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd is a global company specializing in the design and manufacture of power conversion equipment. It serves utilities, industries, and consumers with a focus on efficient and sustainable electrical energy solutions. The company emphasizes innovation through advanced R&D facilities and delivers products for specialized applications including railways and nuclear power.
 
 Business Segments
 Power Systems: Offers transformers, switchgear, and turnkey projects aimed at electrical energy management for utilities and industries.
 
 Industrial Systems: Manufactures electric motors, alternators, drives, and traction electronics catering to diverse industrial applications.
 
 Revenue Mix 
 Power Systems: Majority share in revenue from transformers, switchgear, and related solutions
 
 Industrial Systems: Electric motors, alternators, drives, and traction electronics
 
 Exports: Currently around 5% of revenue, targeted to increase to 20% within 4-5 years
 
 Railway business: Significant growth contributor, especially in recent years
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

CG Power is investing Rs 400 crore over two years to modernize its manufacturing capacity across facilities in Ahmednagar, Goa, Bhopal, and Malanpur. It aims to boost its export share to 20% within 4–5 years and increase its technological edge by focusing on R&D, especially in high-value segments like high-voltage motors for nuclear and hazardous applications.

Name: GE Vernova T&D India Ltd
Overview:
GE Vernova T&D India Ltd, formerly known as GE T&D India Ltd, is the listed entity of GE’s Grid Solutions business in India. With over a century in the power transmission and distribution sector, the company offers a comprehensive range of products and turnkey solutions, including transformers, switchgear, HVDC, and FACTS technology, catering to medium to ultra-high voltage levels up to 1200 kV.

As part of the global GE Vernova group, the company benefits from international expertise and scale, exporting to over 75 countries. It plays a critical role in India’s grid infrastructure, with about 50% of the country’s power flow monitored through its digital solutions. Its manufacturing presence includes five facilities across Tamil Nadu, Chennai, Noida, and Gujarat, positioning it well to serve domestic and export markets.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
GE Vernova T&D India is positioned to capitalize on the electrification and decarbonization trends in India and globally. With a strong order pipeline, robust export momentum, and sector tailwinds, the company aims to deepen its presence in high-value segments such as HVDC, GIS, and renewable integration. Continued operational efficiency and technological edge from GE Vernova’s global network will underpin future growth.

Name: Hitachi Energy India Ltd
Overview:
Hitachi Energy India Ltd, a joint venture between Hitachi and ABB’s Power Grids, operates as a leading power technology company serving utilities and industrial clients with engineering, products, solutions, and services. Its grid automation segment covers substation automation, communication networks, enterprise software, and grid-edge solutions to enhance reliability and efficiency of electricity networks.

In grid integration, the company has executed more than 4,000 transmission and substation projects, playing a vital role in renewable energy integration into India’s grid system. It is also a leader in high-voltage products, offering solutions for AC up to 1,200 kV and DC up to 1,100 kV, ensuring efficient and reliable electricity transmission. Additionally, the transformers business provides power and traction transformers, insulation, components, and digital sensors, with expansion underway in traction transformer capacity and high-voltage bushings.

Hitachi Energy India has also partnered with IIT Roorkee to develop a smart and sustainable campus energy ecosystem. Its Sustainability 2030 strategy, aligned with UN SDGs, emphasizes carbon neutrality by 2030, waste reduction, and freshwater efficiency. Having already transitioned to 100% renewable electricity in operations, the company underscores its long-term commitment to environmental stewardship, innovation, and sustainable growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management reaffirmed optimism on India’s “energy super cycle,” supported by government push for renewables, grid modernization, and infrastructure spending. With at least two HVDC projects annually expected, and robust pipelines in data centers, rail, and industry, revenue growth is expected to accelerate in FY27 and beyond. EBITDA margins are guided to remain sustainably in double digits, supported by scale, operational excellence, and favorable mix. Services and exports are set to strengthen further, while CAPEX-backed expansion will secure long-term leadership in India and global markets.

Name: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd
Overview:
BHEL is one of India’s largest power plant equipment manufacturers, playing a key role in the country’s core infrastructure development. The company operates across design, engineering, manufacturing, installation, and servicing, with a dominant position in the power sector — spanning thermal, gas, hydro, and nuclear energy. Beyond power, BHEL also serves sectors like transportation, defense, renewables, industrial products, and energy storage, strengthening its multi-sectoral reach.
 
 Business Segments
 Power Sector: Thermal, gas, hydro, nuclear power equipment — the largest contributor to revenues and orders.
 
 Nuclear Power: Strong market leadership in nuclear power equipment and projects.
 
 Industrial & Transportation: Equipment for railways, semi-high-speed trainsets, high-HP locomotives, and metro coaches.
 
 Renewables & Storage: Engaged in solar, wind, and energy storage solutions.
 
 Defense & Other Industrial Products: Contributes through specialized engineering and manufacturing capabilities.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

BHEL is focusing on profitability through better cost control and project execution while diversifying beyond its core power segment. The company is capitalizing on strong demand from Indian Railways and metro projects and expanding into renewables, energy storage, and defense manufacturing. With a significant role in nuclear power and a robust order book, BHEL stands to benefit from India's energy transition, while managing inflation and geopolitical risks to protect margins.

Name: Siemens Ltd
Overview:
Siemens Limited is a diversified technology and engineering company engaged in providing products and integrated solutions for multiple industrial sectors. Its offerings span manufacturing automation, process industries, intelligent infrastructure, power generation, transmission and distribution, and rail/mobility solutions. The company operates both domestically and internationally, with a major focus on India.
 
 Business Segment Revenue Breakdown (FY2025)
 Energy Segment:
 Contributes 40% of total revenue
 (Estimated FY2024-25 total revenue: approx. ₹22,000 crore, so the Energy segment is ~₹8,800 crore)
 
 Smart Infrastructure Segment:
 Accounts for 28% of revenue (about ₹6,160 crore)
 
 Digital Industries Segment:
 Provides 19% of revenue (approx. ₹4,180 crore)
 
 Mobility Segment:
 Contributes 9% of revenue (approximately ₹1,980 crore)
 
 Portfolio Companies:
 Makes up the remaining 4% (around ₹880 crore)
 
 Geographic Split:
 77% of revenue is generated within India, the remaining 23% from international operations.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook:
Siemens is poised for sustained growth through large-scale capital expenditure and technology investments, including new manufacturing sites and innovation centers across Asia and Europe. Rising demand for electrification, digitalization, and sustainable solutions in industrial, energy, infrastructure, and mobility sectors underpins strong market opportunities. The integration of C&S Electric strengthens low-voltage product offerings and export potential, while continuous innovation in digital industries and smart infrastructure enhances competitiveness.

Name: Havells India Ltd
Overview:
Havells India Ltd is one of India’s top companies in the Fast Moving Electrical Goods (FMEG) and power distribution equipment space. It sells a wide range of products — like wires, cables, switches, fans, lighting, air conditioners (Lloyd), water heaters, and appliances — through five strong brands. Over 90% of its products are made in-house at 14 factories, helping maintain quality and control costs.
 
 Segmental Performance & Strategic Initiatives
 A. Cables & Wires: Robust Growth: Volume up ~20–21% YoY, value growth ~27% — strong infrastructure and industrial demand. Capacity Expansion: Added ₹340 Cr capex this quarter — doubling underground cable capacity by FY27. Tumkur plant operational, boosting supply.
 
 B. Lloyd (Consumer Durables – RACs & Appliances): Network Growth: Expanding distribution in North & West India (traditionally strong in South/East) to deepen reach and balance margins.
 
 C. Electrical Consumer Durables (ECD): Decline in Fans/Coolers: Segment dropped sharply due to weak summer & patchy rains; room coolers fell significantly despite structural share gains.
 
 D. Switchgears: Contribution margin steady at 38–40%. Sequential dips due to higher export/project business — not structural.
 
 E. Lighting: Price Pressure: LED prices fell ~10% YoY but now stabilizing — price erosion plateauing.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Havells maintains a cautiously optimistic outlook, expecting demand recovery and margin improvement in the near term, viewing recent softness as temporary. Key growth drivers include infrastructure-led demand, expanded cable production capacity, deeper rural penetration, and renewable energy-linked opportunities.

Name: ABB India Ltd
Overview:
ABB India Limited is a leading provider of power and automation technologies in India, with a 75-year legacy and a strong focus on electrification, automation, robotics, and digital solutions for sectors like energy, infrastructure, and smart cities. The company has a robust manufacturing and R&D base and generates over 85% of its revenue from the domestic market.
 
 Business Segments: 
 Electrification — Generates ₹1,358 crore (43% of total revenue). This segment focuses on low- and medium-voltage electrical products, energy distribution, building automation, EV charging, and digital energy solutions.
 
 Motion — Contributes ₹1,096 crore (35% of total revenue). It covers motors, drives, and robotics for factories, HVAC, water, and logistics, supporting industrial productivity.
 
 Industrial Automation — Brings in ₹586 crore (19% of total revenue). It delivers process automation for industries like chemicals, oil & gas, power, and hybrid sectors.
 
 Robotics & Discrete Automation — Accounts for ₹150 crore (5% of total revenue). This segment provides industrial robots, machine automation, and digital factory solutions to boost manufacturing efficiency.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
ABB India is set for steady growth, driven by planned investments of ₹1,000 crore in capacity expansion, technology upgrades, and new factories, including advanced robotics and real-time data integration. Strong demand from railways, data centers, renewables, smart cities, and logistics, supported by large orders from Indian Railways and major hyperscalers, underpins revenue visibility.

Name: Dixon Technologies (India) Ltd
Overview:
Dixon Technologies is one of India’s largest EMS companies, operating across diverse verticals such as mobile phones, consumer electronics, home appliances, lighting, wearables, telecom and networking products. The company has a strong focus on backward integration, joint ventures, and component ecosystem creation to strengthen competitiveness and reduce import dependence.

Its business model is built around high-volume manufacturing, ODM capabilities, and strategic partnerships with global brands. With a robust order pipeline, capacity expansions across multiple product categories, and entry into new verticals like display modules and camera components, Dixon is positioning itself as a leading electronics manufacturing hub in India.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Dixon expects strong performance driven by festive demand, export expansion, and backward integration benefits. Margin improvements are anticipated from FY27 as component facilities scale and PLI-linked projects mature, helping offset post-PLI headwinds.

Name: Apar Industries Ltd
Overview:
Apar Industries Ltd, founded in 1958, is a market leader in electrical and metallurgical solutions, with a presence in over 140 countries. It operates across three major business segments: Conductors, Transformer and Specialty Oils (TSO), and Power/Telecom Cables. The company is recognized globally as the largest conductor manufacturer and the third-largest transformer oil producer.

Apar has also established a strong presence in specialty cable exports and is a key supplier to major infrastructure sectors including railways, renewables, and telecom. With 10 manufacturing facilities across India and UAE, the company is known for its integrated operations and expansive product range that includes over 500 transformer oil variants and high-efficiency conductors.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Apar Industries is strategically investing in capacity expansion to meet the growing demand for energy infrastructure. The company has announced plans to invest ₹1,300 crore over the next few years, with allocations of ₹800 crore for its cable business, ₹300 crore for conductors, and ₹200 crore for transformer oils. This expansion aligns with India's renewable energy goals, including the development of green energy corridors and mega solar parks.

Name: Aditya Infotech Ltd
Overview:
Aditya Infotech Limited (AIL), established in 1995, is India's leading provider of video security and surveillance solutions under the brand name 'CP Plus'. The company offers a comprehensive range of products, including smart home IoT cameras, HD analog and network systems, body-worn and thermal cameras, and AI-powered solutions such as number plate recognition and heat mapping. 

CP Plus serves both enterprise and consumer segments across over 550 cities in India. AIL operates a manufacturing facility in Kadapa, Andhra Pradesh, and maintains an R&D center in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. Its extensive distribution network comprises more than 1,000 distributors and over 2,100 system integrators, ensuring widespread availability and support for its products.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Aditya Infotech is poised for continued growth, driven by the increasing demand for advanced surveillance solutions in both urban and rural areas. The company plans to expand its product offerings by integrating emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence and machine learning to enhance security features.

Name: SEPC Ltd
Overview:
SEPC Limited, established in 2000, is a prominent Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) company specializing in delivering integrated solutions across various sectors, including water and wastewater management, roads, industrial infrastructure, and mining.

SEPC continues to play a pivotal role in India's infrastructure development, serving a wide range of clients, including central and state government agencies. The company's commitment to excellence and innovation positions it as a key player in the EPC industry.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
SEPC aims to leverage its strengthened financial position to capitalize on emerging opportunities in core and high-potential sectors. The company plans to expand its footprint through strategic contract wins and international projects. With a strong order pipeline and a focus on disciplined project execution, SEPC is well-positioned to drive sustainable business growth in the coming quarters.

Name: BGR Energy Systems Ltd
Overview:
BGR Energy Systems Ltd, incorporated in 1985, specializes in supplying systems and equipment and executing turnkey engineering project contracts. The company primarily operates in the power, petrochemical, and oil & gas sectors, delivering end-to-end project solutions including engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning (EPCC).

Its offerings span across EPC services and system manufacturing, positioning BGR as a notable contributor to infrastructure development in India and beyond.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

BGR Energy Systems Ltd is strategically expanding its presence in the power and infrastructure sectors through significant project acquisitions and capacity enhancements. The company has secured a ₹3,100 crore EPC contract from Tamil Nadu Electricity Board for a 600 MW power plant expansion, underscoring its capabilities in large-scale power projects

Name: Patel Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Patel Engineering Ltd is a prominent infrastructure development company specializing in civil engineering projects across various sectors.
