Established in 1949, the company has a rich history of delivering complex projects in areas such as hydropower, irrigation, tunneling, urban infrastructure, and transportation. With a strong presence in India and international markets, Patel Engineering has earned a reputation for executing large-scale projects with precision and efficiency.

The company's diverse portfolio includes the construction of dams, bridges, tunnels, roads, and industrial structures. Patel Engineering's expertise extends to hydroelectric power projects, irrigation systems, and urban infrastructure development. By leveraging advanced technology and a skilled workforce, the company continues to contribute significantly to the development of critical infrastructure, supporting economic growth and enhancing quality of life in the regions it serves.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Patel Engineering is poised for continued growth, driven by its substantial order book and strategic focus on high-demand infrastructure sectors. The company aims to leverage its expertise in executing large-scale projects to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the infrastructure development space. With a commitment to quality and timely delivery, Patel Engineering is well-positioned to contribute significantly to the development of critical infrastructure in India and beyond.

Name: B.L.Kashyap & Sons Ltd
Overview:
B.L. Kashyap & Sons Ltd operates as a prominent engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) service provider, specializing in the development of high-rise residential and commercial buildings, IT parks, and institutional infrastructure. The company brings deep technical expertise and end-to-end project capabilities to serve a diverse range of construction needs.

With a solid track record spanning multiple urban development projects, B.L. Kashyap leverages its strong execution framework, project management skills, and sector experience to deliver complex construction solutions efficiently.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

B.L. Kashyap & Sons Ltd (BLK) is experiencing robust growth in India's EPC sector, driven by a strategic focus on high-margin projects and operational excellence. In the first quarter of FY26, the company reported a 14.35% quarter-on-quarter revenue increase to ₹336.42 crore, along with a significant 259% rise in EBITDA, reflecting improved efficiency and profitability

Name: SPML Infra Ltd
Overview:
SPML Infra Ltd, established in 1981 and headquartered in New Delhi, is one of India's leading infrastructure development companies. With over four decades of experience, the company specializes in providing comprehensive solutions across various sectors, including water management, wastewater treatment, power generation, transmission and distribution, solid waste management, and other civil infrastructures. SPML Infra operates primarily in the Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) segment, serving both public and private sector clients. 

The company has a significant presence in urban infrastructure development, catering to approximately 50 million customers. SPML Infra is dedicated to promoting sustainable development for smart cities, focusing on enhancing access to essential services such as electricity, water, sanitation, and municipal solid waste management.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

SPML Infra Ltd is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to expand its operations in emerging sectors, including battery energy storage systems, to diversify its portfolio and align with evolving market demands. Additionally, SPML Infra is focusing on strengthening its leadership team to drive growth and implement a future-ready strategy.

Name: Vascon Engineers Ltd
Overview:
Vascon Engineers Ltd is a Pune-based engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) player with a diversified footprint in real estate development. The company is known for building institutional, industrial, and residential infrastructure while also undertaking real estate projects in urban centers.

With a legacy spanning decades, Vascon focuses on delivering turnkey solutions through its EPC division, while its real estate arm enhances its revenue streams. Its integrated business model allows it to benefit from synergies between construction and property development.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Vascon is optimistic about its growth trajectory. The company expects its real estate contributions to double by FY26, reflecting bullish prospects in its property business. Margins are anticipated to improve, with blended EBITDA potentially rising toward the mid-teens—reflecting enhanced operating efficiency and project mix.

Name: Simplex Infrastructures Ltd
Overview:
Founded in 1924, Simplex Infrastructures Ltd is a prominent Indian civil engineering and construction contracting company. With nearly a century of experience, the company has established a strong reputation for executing large-scale infrastructure projects across various sectors, including transportation, power, energy, utilities, buildings, and marine 

Headquartered in Kolkata, Simplex Infrastructures operates nationwide, delivering complex projects such as bridges, highways, power plants, metro systems, and industrial facilities. The company is known for its technical expertise, commitment to quality, and timely project delivery, making it a trusted partner in India's infrastructure development.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Simplex Infrastructures Ltd is focused on expanding its presence in key infrastructure sectors, including transportation, power, and urban development. The company aims to leverage its extensive experience and technical capabilities to secure and execute large-scale projects across India. By adopting innovative construction techniques and maintaining a strong commitment to quality, Simplex Infrastructures seeks to enhance its market position and contribute significantly to the nation's infrastructure growth.

Name: GVK Power & Infrastructure Ltd
Overview:
GVK Power & Infrastructure Limited (GVKPIL) is an Indian infrastructure development company primarily engaged in providing operation and maintenance services, manpower and consultancy services, and incidental services to owners of power plants, airports, and other infrastructure projects. The company has been involved in significant infrastructure projects, including the modernization of Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport in Mumbai and the development of airports in Indonesia. 

GVKPIL's operations span various sectors, including power generation, airport infrastructure, and other infrastructure development projects. The company's diversified portfolio reflects its commitment to contributing to India's infrastructure development and its strategic focus on sectors with growth potent
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
GVKPIL's performance will depend on its ability to navigate the challenges in the infrastructure sector and capitalize on opportunities in its diversified service offerings. The company's focus on providing essential services to power plants, airports, and other infrastructure projects positions it to benefit from the ongoing infrastructure development in India.

Name: Likhitha Infrastructure Ltd
Overview:
Likhitha Infrastructure Ltd is a specialized engineering and infrastructure company focused on gas pipeline construction across India. The firm's services span pipeline laying, installation of allied infrastructure, and comprehensive operations and maintenance support. It serves major clients in the petroleum and gas sector and has strong execution capabilities across key geographies.

The company leverages a robust project execution framework, enabling it to manage capital-intensive projects efficiently. Its expertise and strategic footprint position it as a trusted partner in India's growing pipeline infrastructure sector.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Likhitha Infrastructure’s solid execution track record and pipeline of active projects suggest potential for recovery in subsequent quarters. Industry tailwinds—led by thrust on gas infrastructure—and continued contract wins could support volume and margin improvement. Strong focus on operational efficiency will be critical as FY26 progresses.

Name: Garuda Construction and Engineering Ltd
Overview: Garuda Construction and Engineering Ltd, based in Mumbai, is a prominent player in the civil construction industry. Established in 2010, the company specializes in providing comprehensive construction services for residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure projects. Garuda is known for its commitment to quality, timely delivery, and adherence to safety standards. The company has undertaken several prestigious projects, contributing significantly to urban development. With a focus on innovation and sustainable practices, Garuda aims to redefine construction excellence in India.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
With strong financial momentum and enhanced operational metrics, Garuda is well-positioned to capitalize on the increasing opportunities in India’s construction sector. If the current trend in project execution and revenue growth sustains, the company could continue its upward trajectory through FY26 and beyond.

Name: Om Infra Ltd
Overview:
Om Infra Ltd, formerly known as Om Metals Infraprojects, operates in the infrastructure development and engineering sector. The company specializes in turnkey solutions for hydro-mechanical and water resource projects, including irrigation, dams, and hydropower plants. It has decades of expertise in delivering complex engineering projects for both government and private clients.

The company’s portfolio includes projects across India as well as international geographies. Om Infra’s focus on water and hydropower aligns with India’s long-term infrastructure push and the need for sustainable resource management. With capabilities in design, engineering, and execution, the company continues to bid for large-scale projects that offer long-term revenue visibility.
Key Takeways:
Growth Prospects
Management guided for robust demand in FY26 driven by government spending on water resource management, irrigation modernization, and renewable energy projects. Om Infra is also exploring international bids, which could diversify revenue streams further. The outlook remains strong with a healthy pipeline of projects.

Name: Welspun Enterprises Ltd
Overview:
Welspun Enterprises Limited (WEL), formerly known as Welspun Projects Ltd., is a part of the USD 2.7 billion Welspun Group. The company operates in the infrastructure space with investments in oil & gas. In the infrastructure sector, WEL focuses on road and water projects, primarily under the Hybrid Annuity Model (HAM). Additionally, the company engages in Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT)-Toll and Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) projects.

WEL's strategic approach involves selecting high-quality projects and maintaining a disciplined cost management framework. This focus has enabled the company to achieve record-high consolidated EBITDA margins and strong revenue growth. The company's diversified portfolio and robust project pipeline position it for sustained growth in the infrastructure sector.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Welspun Enterprises aims to achieve a revenue growth of 15–20% year-on-year. The company plans to leverage its strong order book and robust project pipeline to drive this growth. Additionally, WEL is committed to maintaining high EBITDA margins through continued focus on quality project selection and cost discipline.

Name: Omnitech Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Omnitech Engineering is a manufacturing and engineering solutions company that focuses on delivering precision-engineered components and customised mechanical systems for a wide range of industries. The company provides high-quality parts and assemblies used in industrial machinery, automation systems and engineering applications, ensuring accuracy, durability and performance as per client requirements.

In addition to component manufacturing, the company offers turnkey industrial automation solutions, covering design, development, installation and integration of automated systems. It caters to sectors such as manufacturing, automotive, infrastructure and heavy engineering, helping clients improve productivity, reduce manual intervention and enhance operational efficiency through customised engineering solutions.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Omnitech Engineering aims to expand its manufacturing capabilities and automation solutions portfolio to cater to rising demand from industrial and engineering sectors. The company plans to invest in advanced machinery, technology and design capabilities to deliver more complex and high-value solutions.

Name: KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd
Overview:
With a strong emphasis on innovation and quality, KHERL has achieved significant milestones, including maintaining capacity utilization above 90% and securing vendor approval from Indian Railways for supplying oil cooler radiators for converter transformers. The company is also expanding its manufacturing capabilities through its subsidiary, KRN HVAC Products Pvt. Ltd., with a planned capacity enhancement to produce 6 million units annually.

KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Limited (KHERL), established in 2017 and headquartered in Neemrana, Rajasthan, specializes in manufacturing fin and tube-type heat exchangers for the HVAC and refrigeration industries.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
KHERL aims to increase its export share of consolidated revenue to 30%-35% by FY26, up from the current 16% in FY25. The company is also focusing on expanding its manufacturing capacity through its subsidiary, KRN HVAC Products Pvt. Ltd., to produce 6 million units annually, reinforcing its market leadership and meeting the growing demand in the HVAC and refrigeration sectors.

Name: Kennametal India Ltd
Overview:
Kennametal India Ltd, a majority-held subsidiary of Kennametal Inc, is a leading provider of carbide tooling and specialized machining solutions for sectors such as automotive, defense, railways, infrastructure, and general engineering. With an established manufacturing presence in Bengaluru, the company is known for delivering high-precision cutting tools and wear-resistant solutions tailored to critical industrial needs.

The company’s operational model emphasizes innovation and customer-focused engineering, enabling it to drive productivity improvements across India’s manufacturing landscape. Its “Make in India” contributions are underpinned by end-to-end capabilities from design to service.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Kennametal India with positive momentum—continuing growth in sales and improved operational efficiency. The business is expected to sustain its focus on margin recovery and volume expansion, leveraging domestic market strength and its reputation for precision solutions. Industry demand recovery and cost discipline will be key to driving profitability ahead.

Name: Lloyds Engineering Works Ltd
Overview:
Lloyds Steels Industries is a specialized heavy-equipment engineering firm serving sectors including hydrocarbons, steel plants, power and nuclear energy, marine systems, and port/refinery infrastructure. It designs, manufactures, and commissions high-value industrial machinery such as pressure vessels, heat exchangers, rolling mills, marine loading arms, and more across diverse heavy-industry verticals.

In FY 25, the company delivered modest revenue growth accompanied by strengthened operational profitability and strategic capacity expansion. New environmental approvals and production ramp-ups signal a transformative phase ahead, laying the foundation for accelerated scaling in FY 26.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Lloyds is strategically transitioning from steady volume play to integrated value chain dominance—leveraging captive inputs, logistics infrastructure, and new capacity. FY 26 promises a robust uptick in iron-ore production. Enhanced margins, higher realizations, and scaling across verticals should drive transformation into a higher-growth, more profitable entity.

Name: Ceigall India Ltd
Overview:
Ceigall India Limited is a leading infrastructure construction company specializing in complex structural projects such as elevated roads, flyovers, expressways, bridges, tunnels, metro rail, and airport runways. With over two decades of operational experience, the company has established a strong presence in the EPC space by delivering high-quality projects for government and private clients.

Operating on an asset-light model, Ceigall leverages leased equipment to maintain flexibility, control capital expenditure, and achieve faster project mobilization. Its focus on technically challenging and large-scale infrastructure works positions it well to capitalize on India’s growing investment in transportation and urban infrastructure.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Ceigall India Ltd is strategically expanding its infrastructure capabilities to capitalize on India's growing demand for specialized construction services. The company is actively pursuing hybrid annuity model (HAM) projects, which now constitute a significant portion of its order book, reflecting a shift towards long-term, revenue-generating contracts. Ceigall is also enhancing its operational efficiency through the proposed merger with C&C Construction, aiming to integrate diverse infrastructure competencies and improve business agility.

Name: Kalpataru Ltd
Overview:
Kalpataru Limited is a prominent real estate development company headquartered in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Established in 1988, it has built a strong legacy of over five decades in delivering premium residential and commercial properties across India. The company has successfully completed more than 120 landmark projects, encompassing over 25 lakh square meters of developed area, and has earned the trust of over 19,500 families. 

Kalpataru's portfolio includes a diverse range of developments such as luxury residential towers, gated communities, townships, and office spaces. With a presence in key urban markets like Mumbai, Pune, Indore, Delhi, Hyderabad, and Kolkata, the company is committed to creating sustainable and innovative living and working spaces. Its focus on quality construction, timely delivery, and customer satisfaction has solidified its position as a leading player in the Indian real estate sector.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Kalpataru Limited is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company is expanding its real estate development business by venturing into redevelopment, joint venture (JV), and joint development agreement (JDA) projects with other landowners. This asset-light approach is expected to contribute significantly to its future growth. Additionally, Kalpataru is focusing on developing green and sustainable buildings, with 47 projects certified by the Indian Green Building Council (IGBC).

Name: Balu Forge Industries Ltd
Overview:
Balu Forge Industries Ltd is a leading precision engineering company specializing in manufacturing high-quality forged and machined components for the automotive, aerospace, and industrial sectors. Established in 1989, the company has a significant presence in both domestic and international markets, catering to a diverse clientele with advanced engineering solutions.

The company operates primarily in two segments: Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) and Replacement Market. Balu Forge Industries Ltd has been expanding its client base and service offerings, aiming to strengthen its position as a leader in the mobility and automotive sectors. With a focus on quality and customer satisfaction, the company is well-positioned to meet the growing demand in the automotive market.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Balu Forge Industries Ltd aims to continue expanding its footprint both domestically and internationally. The company plans to enhance its service offerings and operational efficiencies to meet the growing demand for automotive components. With a focus on quality and customer satisfaction, Balu Forge Industries Ltd is well-positioned to capitalize on the increasing trend of outsourcing manufacturing services by large corporations.

Name: The Anup Engineering Ltd
Overview:
The Anup Engineering Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in high-quality static process equipment, including heat exchangers, pressure vessels, reactors, and industrial centrifuges. Serving sectors such as oil & gas, petrochemicals, fertilizers, chemicals, and pharmaceuticals, the company caters to both domestic and international markets.

With a strong emphasis on engineering excellence and innovation, Anup Engineering has established itself as a preferred supplier for critical applications, offering customized solutions to meet the stringent requirements of its diverse clientele.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
The company aims for continued revenue growth of over 20% CAGR, supported by its robust order book and market demand. Margins are expected to improve through operational efficiencies, while capacity expansion and international market exploration will enhance diversification and strengthen its leadership in static process equipment manufacturing.

Name: AXISCADES Technologies Ltd
Overview:
Axiscades Technologies Limited is a technology solutions provider that focuses on delivering engineering and digital services to sectors like aerospace, defence, electronics, semiconductors, and artificial intelligence. The company develops a spectrum of solutions—from system design and integration to advanced product engineering—to support clients in complex technological domains.

Positioned as a hybrid services-and-products firm, Axiscades is transitioning toward scalable offerings through investments in infrastructure, global partnerships, and innovation. This approach aims to strengthen its foothold in mission-critical verticals and expand long-term growth via product-led models.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Axiscades Technologies is poised for significant growth, targeting over 40% year-on-year expansion in its core verticals, including aerospace, defense, and electronics, semiconductors, and AI (ESAI). The company has secured a robust order book exceeding ₹1,260 crore for FY26, with additional orders from the DRDO, BEL, and other defense laboratories, totaling approximately ₹600 crore

Name: G R Infraprojects Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1995, G R Infraprojects Ltd is a fully integrated Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) player with a strong presence in the road and highway sector across 15 Indian states. The company undertakes projects across EPC, BOT, HAM, DBFOT, and BOOT models, offering end-to-end capabilities from design and planning to construction and maintenance. Its portfolio extends beyond roads to include metro projects, power transmission lines, ropeways, railways, and multi-modal logistics parks, reflecting a strategy of diversified sectoral exposure.

Over the years, the company has built a reputation for execution efficiency, a disciplined balance sheet, and selective participation in high-value projects. Despite sectoral challenges like underbidding and working capital intensity, it maintains a robust order book and continues to target profitable growth. Its forward focus is on portfolio diversification, strategic asset monetization, and leveraging opportunities from the government’s infrastructure push, particularly in roads, railways, and transmission sectors.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

G R Infraprojects Ltd is strategically expanding its infrastructure portfolio, with a focus on road and highway projects across multiple states in India. The company is actively participating in significant highway development initiatives, including the construction of six-lane expressways and the development of greenfield road sections under the Hybrid Annuity Model (HAM).

Name: Power Mech Projects Ltd
Overview:
Power Mech Projects Ltd is a leading engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) company specializing in infrastructure projects—particularly in power (BTG, balance of plant), industrial construction, water, and mining sectors. The company delivers integrated EPC solutions, operations & maintenance services, and fabrication capabilities through a pan-India presence and overseas operations.

Robust execution excellence, a diversified project portfolio across industries, and strong balance sheet management underpin its position as a trusted, full-service EPC partner, focused on high-value segments and long-term order visibility.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
With a strong and diversified order book, the company targets ~25% YoY revenue growth in FY26, aiming for around ₹6,500 crore in revenue, supported by robust pipeline and uptick in megaproject execution. Operational execution, margin sustainability, and expansion into high-growth segments such as mining and international projects will be key drivers going forward.

Name: GMM Pfaudler Ltd
Overview:
GMM Pfaudler is a global leader in corrosion-resistant glass-lined equipment and process systems, catering primarily to the pharmaceutical and chemical industries. Over time, the company has diversified into mixing systems, filtration and drying equipment, engineered systems, and heavy engineering solutions. Its business model integrates manufacturing, engineering, and service capabilities across India and international markets.

The company has been expanding its global footprint through strategic acquisitions and facility expansions. It focuses on cost optimization, capacity enhancement, and regional flexibility to serve customers across geographies. With strong domestic demand and restructuring initiatives in overseas operations, GMM Pfaudler is positioned for steady growth in both revenue and profitability.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management remains confident of sustained order inflows, strong domestic demand, and global diversification benefits. With a healthy backlog, strategic acquisitions, footprint optimization, and focus on profitability, GMM Pfaudler is positioned to deliver steady growth and margin expansion through FY26 and beyond.

Name: GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd
Overview:
GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd is a prominent player in India's infrastructure sector, specializing in power generation, urban utilities, and transportation projects. The company operates a diverse portfolio, including thermal and renewable energy plants, metro rail systems, and smart city initiatives, contributing significantly to urban development and energy access.

With a strong presence across various infrastructure segments, GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd aims to support India's growth through sustainable and innovative solutions. The company's commitment to excellence and customer-centric approach has established it as a trusted partner in the nation's infrastructure development journey.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd aims to expand power generation capacity, enhance urban infrastructure projects, and improve profitability through operational efficiency. Leveraging its strong order backlog and diversified portfolio, the company expects to strengthen its market position and drive sustainable long-term growth across core infrastructure sectors.

Name: Hindustan Construction Company Ltd
Overview:
Hindustan Construction Company Limited (HCC), the flagship of the HCC Group, is a pioneer in India’s engineering and construction industry with nearly a century of experience. The company has played a vital role in the development of dams, tunnels, nuclear and hydro power plants, expressways, bridges, and urban infrastructure projects across the country.

HCC is widely recognized for executing complex and large-scale infrastructure works, including significant contributions to hydropower and nuclear capacity, as well as roads and metro systems. Its expertise in challenging terrain and technologically advanced projects has positioned it as a preferred partner for critical national projects.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management does not expect revenue growth due to execution limits in the current backlog. However, strong order inflows in FY26 are expected to drive accelerated execution from FY27 onward. The company targets an order book of ₹20,000 crores and anticipates 30–40% CAGR in revenue from FY27–28 as new projects ramp up, supported by deleveraging and sector tailwinds.

Name: H.G. Infra Engineering Ltd
Overview:
H.G. Infra Engineering Ltd. is a leading EPC company with a strong presence in road and highway construction, along with selective exposure to HAM projects. Over the years, the company has diversified into railways, metro, solar, battery energy storage systems (BESS), and water infrastructure, broadening its growth opportunities.

The company holds AA-class certification with Rajasthan PWD and SS-class with the Military Engineering Services, showcasing its execution strength. Its client base includes marquee names such as MoRTH, NHAI, DMRC, Indian Railways, MES, NTPC, GUVNL, and various state PWDs, ensuring consistent order inflows from both central and state authorities.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

H.G. Infra Engineering Ltd (HGIEL) is strategically expanding its footprint across multiple infrastructure sectors, including roads, railways, renewable energy, and urban development. The company is actively engaged in the development of major expressways, access-controlled corridors, and the redevelopment of key railway infrastructure to enhance connectivity and economic growth.

Name: Pitti Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Established in 2008, Pitti Engineering Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in electrical steel laminations, motor cores, sub-assemblies, die-cast rotors, press tools, and precision-machined metal components. The company serves diverse industries, including automotive, railways, and data centers, providing critical components for electric motors, transformers, and other electrical equipment. 

The company has demonstrated significant growth through strategic acquisitions, capacity expansions, and a focus on high-value, value-added products. Its diversified product portfolio and strong order book reflect its ability to meet the evolving demands of its customers. Pitti Engineering's focus on innovation, operational efficiency, and customer satisfaction continues to drive its success in the competitive manufacturing landscape.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Looking ahead, Pitti Engineering aims to achieve a revenue target of ₹2,000 crore for FY26, driven by a strong order pipeline and ongoing capacity expansion initiatives. The company has approved a ₹150 crore capital expenditure plan to enhance its manufacturing capabilities over the next 18 months.

Name: AGI Infra Ltd
Overview:
AGI Infra Ltd, incorporated in 2005, is a prominent construction and real estate development company based in Punjab, India. The company specializes in delivering a diverse range of residential and commercial projects, including affordable homes, mid-segment properties, and high-end developments such as flats, penthouses, plots, independent villas, office spaces, and retail outlets. 

Additionally, AGI Infra has expanded its portfolio to encompass hospitality and education sectors, undertaking projects like universities, hospitals, schools, malls, auditoriums, hotels, and industrial buildings .
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
AGI Infra Ltd is poised for continued growth in the coming quarters. The company's strategic focus on delivering quality projects across diverse segments and expanding into new sectors positions it well for sustained success.

Name: Ramky Infrastructure Ltd
Overview:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd is an established infrastructure conglomerate offering end-to-end engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) services across sectors like industrial infrastructure, water and wastewater treatment, urban development, roads, and buildings. Founded in 1994, it has built a reputation for delivering sustainable infrastructure solutions across India.

With a fully debt-free balance sheet and integrated capabilities, the company operates across design, execution, and operations, focusing on long-term contracts and large-scale infrastructure projects. Its vertically integrated model enhances cost efficiency and execution reliability.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
With restructuring complete and a debt-free balance sheet, Ramky is well positioned to scale up operations and secure new contracts in FY26. Management focus remains on strengthening the EPC order book, improving execution cycles, and enhancing profitability as operating leverage kicks in.

Name: PSP Projects Ltd
Overview:
PSP Projects Ltd is a construction and infrastructure company offering a wide range of construction services across industrial, institutional, government, and residential sectors. The company is known for handling large, technically complex projects and brings over a decade of experience led by its experienced promoter, Mr. Prahalad S. Patel.

Additionally, PSP Projects has extended its operations overseas through real estate development projects in the USA, carried out via its subsidiaries.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

PSP Projects Ltd is poised for significant growth, aiming to enhance its position in India's infrastructure sector. The company is focusing on expanding its portfolio by undertaking more Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) projects, particularly those requiring precast manufacturing capabilities. This strategic direction is expected to bolster its execution capabilities and competitiveness in the market.

Name: Arkade Developers Ltd
Overview:
Arkade Developers Limited is a Mumbai-based real estate developer focused on creating high-end residential properties. The company caters to buyers seeking premium lifestyle living and operates within the dynamic Mumbai metropolitan region, venturing into both central and emerging micro-markets.

Its business centers on delivering quality construction, timely project completion, and modern design aesthetics—positioning itself firmly in the upscale housing segment and building a reputation for luxurious residential offerings.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
The company declared its first-ever interim dividend, underscoring financial confidence. Strategic moves like entry into the high-potential Thane micro-market and the acquisition of Filmistan Pvt. Ltd signal future growth, with ultra-luxury towers under planning expected to elevate its portfolio and revenue potential in coming years.

Name: Sathlokhar Synergys E&C Global Ltd
Overview:
Sathlokhar Synergys E&C Global Ltd, founded in 2013, is an Indian company specializing in engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) services. Headquartered in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, the company provides comprehensive solutions for the construction of buildings and infrastructure facilities. Their expertise spans various sectors, including industrial, warehousing, commercial, institutional, and pharmaceutical projects, as well as solar energy installations and mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) services. 

Sathlokhar Synergys is recognized for its integrated approach, delivering end-to-end services from design to execution. The company has demonstrated significant growth, securing substantial contracts from prominent organizations such as Reliance Consumer Products, Komatsu India, and Hong Fu Industrial Group.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Sathlokhar Synergys E&C Global Ltd is focused on expanding its market footprint by engaging with a broad network of potential clients and submitting high-value proposals across key sectors. The company aims to achieve a minimum revenue growth of 40% in the upcoming fiscal year, with aspirations to reach INR 1,000 crore in revenue by 2027 without relying on external debt.

Name: Thejo Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Thejo Engineering Ltd is a leading Indian engineering solutions provider specializing in rubber and polyurethane-based engineered products for bulk material handling, mining, and mineral processing industries. Established in 1988, the company offers a range of products including belt cleaning systems, spillage control, impact and abrasion protection, and screening solutions.

With a global presence, Thejo operates manufacturing facilities in India and subsidiaries in Australia, Saudi Arabia, Brazil, and Chile. The company serves diverse sectors such as mining, steel, cement, chemicals, power, and ports, providing both product manufacturing and on-site maintenance services.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Thejo Engineering aims to expand its global footprint and enhance its product offerings to meet the evolving needs of the bulk material handling and mining industries. With a strong order book and focus on operational efficiency, the company is well-positioned to capitalize on emerging opportunities in international markets.

Name: HMT Ltd
Overview:
HMT Ltd is a government-owned engineering and manufacturing company with operations in machine tools, precision components, and related industrial products. The company has a long-standing presence in India, providing quality solutions to automotive, aerospace, and engineering sectors.

HMT has modernized several of its manufacturing plants to enhance efficiency and meet industry standards. With a diversified product portfolio and strategic collaborations, the company continues to serve domestic and international markets, leveraging its legacy and technical expertise.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company plans to further modernize its manufacturing facilities, enhance operational efficiency, and expand product offerings in high-demand industrial sectors. Strategic partnerships and focus on technology adoption are expected to drive sustainable growth and market competitiveness.

Name: HLE Glascoat Ltd
Overview:
HLE Glascoat Ltd is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in glass-lined and chemical process equipment for industries such as chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and food processing. Established in 1987, the company operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Gujarat and has expanded its footprint through strategic acquisitions in India and Germany.

The company is committed to delivering high-quality equipment and services, leveraging advanced manufacturing technologies and a skilled workforce. HLE Glascoat focuses on innovation and operational excellence to meet the evolving demands of its clientele and achieve sustainable growth.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
HLE Glascoat Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by expanding its product portfolio and enhancing manufacturing capabilities. The company focuses on innovation and quality to meet evolving market demands and is well-positioned for sustained growth in the coming years.

Name: Jash Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Jash Engineering Ltd, established in 1973, is a leading Indian manufacturer specializing in equipment for water intake systems, wastewater pumping stations, treatment plants, and stormwater management. The company also serves sectors such as power, steel, cement, paper & pulp, petrochemicals, chemicals, fertilizers, and other process industries.

Operating as a one-stop solution provider, Jash offers comprehensive services including design, casting, fabrication, assembly, and testing. The company is recognized as an industry leader in India and exports its products to over 45 countries worldwide.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Jash Engineering is focusing on expanding its product offerings and enhancing its manufacturing capabilities. The company is investing in new facilities and technologies to strengthen its position in the global market. With a robust order book and strategic initiatives in place, Jash Engineering aims to achieve sustainable growth in the coming fiscal years.

Name: Walchandnagar Industries Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1908 by Walchand Hirachand Doshi, Walchandnagar Industries Ltd (WIL) is a prominent Indian company specializing in heavy engineering and project execution services. Headquartered in Mumbai, WIL operates across various sectors, including energy, defense, aerospace, and industrial machinery. 

The company is recognized for its expertise in manufacturing complex engineering products and providing turnkey solutions for large-scale projects. WIL's product offerings encompass a wide range of equipment and services, such as boilers, power generation systems, propulsion systems, and industrial & marine transmissions.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Walchandnagar Industries is poised to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the defense, aerospace, and energy sectors. The company's strategic initiatives, including the integration of AI technologies and expansion into new markets, are expected to drive long-term growth.

Name: M & B Engineering Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1981, M&B Engineering Ltd is a prominent design-led engineering solutions provider in India. As a subsidiary of the M&B Group, which has a legacy dating back to 1951, the company specializes in delivering turnkey solutions in the Pre-Engineered Building (PEB) and self-supported steel roofing sectors. 

Operating through its two divisions—Phenix and Proflex—M&B Engineering offers comprehensive services encompassing project design, engineering, manufacturing, and installation across various industrial and infrastructure segments
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

M&B Engineering Ltd is poised for significant growth, focusing on expanding its market presence both domestically and internationally. The company plans to enhance its manufacturing capabilities and explore new markets to meet the increasing demand for sustainable and efficient building solutions. Through continuous innovation and a commitment to quality,

Name: Diffusion Engineers Ltd
Overview:
Diffusion Engineers Ltd (DEL), established in 1982, is a prominent Indian manufacturer specializing in welding consumables, wear plates and parts, and heavy engineering equipment. The company serves a diverse range of industries, including cement, steel, power, and mining, providing solutions that enhance the efficiency and longevity of industrial machinery. With a strong focus on innovation, DEL has established a significant presence in both domestic and international markets.

Operating through three integrated segments—Welding Consumables, Wear Plates & Parts, and Heavy Engineering Equipment—DEL has developed a comprehensive product portfolio that caters to the evolving needs of its clientele.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
DEL aims to leverage its expanded order book and diversified product portfolio to drive sustained growth. The company plans to enhance its manufacturing capabilities and explore new markets to capitalize on emerging opportunities.

Name: JNK India Ltd
Overview:
JNK India Ltd is an engineering and technology-driven company specializing in design, engineering, manufacturing, and providing EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) solutions—particularly in combustion systems such as process-fired heaters, reformers, and cracking furnaces. Over time, the company has broadened its scope to include advanced solutions like flares, incinerators, and renewable energy systems (e.g., hydrogen production, solar PV-EPC), positioning itself as a comprehensive provider in the energy and environmental infrastructure space.

The company continues to leverage its engineering precision, domain expertise, and turnkey delivery capabilities to stand out in critical infrastructure verticals like refining, petrochemicals, fertilizers, and emerging renewables.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
JNK India plans to build on its strong FY25 foundation where it logged ₹495 crore in revenue and achieved its largest-ever order inflows of over ₹932 crore by targeting around ₹1,200 crore in order wins for FY26 and delivering 50% revenue growth with margin improvement of 100–200 basis points.

Name: DEE Development Engineers Ltd
Overview:
DEE Development Engineers Ltd is a specialized engineering firm known for designing, fabricating, and delivering complex piping systems, pressure vessels, and heat exchangers. The company primarily serves sectors such as oil & gas, power—including nuclear—and chemical industries, leveraging its engineering and manufacturing expertise to handle technically demanding projects.

With a focus on operational excellence and strategic facility expansion, DEE positions itself as a reliable process-piping solutions partner, emphasizing quality, customization, and supply chain efficiency to meet client needs across heavy industries.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Looking ahead, DEE remains focused on scaling capacity, improving supply chain integration, and entering new high-growth markets such as hydrogen technologies. These developments are expected to drive strong top-line growth, maintain profitability, and support long-term value creation in FY26 and beyond.

Name: Sanghvi Movers Ltd
Overview:
Sanghvi Movers Limited is a leading player in the crane rental industry, offering medium to heavy-duty cranes to both public and private sector clients. The company operates a diverse fleet of hydraulic truck-mounted telescopic, lattice boom, and crawler cranes with significant lifting capacities, making it a critical enabler for large-scale industrial and infrastructure projects.

Over time, SML has evolved from being a pure-play crane rental business into a group structure, with strategic forays into wind EPC, renewable energy, and international expansion. Its strong positioning across renewables, infrastructure, cement, steel, and energy sectors highlights its role as a key beneficiary of India’s infrastructure build-out and global construction opportunities.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management remains highly confident of scaling both domestic and international businesses, supported by strong order visibility, sectoral demand, and strategic investments. The crane rental segment will remain the backbone, while renewables and Saudi expansion are expected to drive incremental growth. Overall, SML is positioned to capitalize on industry tailwinds and deliver long-term value.

Name: Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd
Overview:
Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd, founded in 1926, specializes in pipeline construction, water supply projects, and infrastructure development on a turnkey basis. Its operations span drinking water, irrigation, sewerage, drainage, and hydroelectric power projects. The company also manufactures and supplies concrete railway sleepers to Indian Railways, along with a range of concrete and steel pipes.

With 19 factories and 17 project offices across India, Indian Hume Pipe serves both public and private sector clients such as L&T, NCC, TATA Power, BHEL, and Indian Railways. While EPC contracts form the company’s core business, its pipe manufacturing business contributes a smaller share. The company continues to invest in new pipe technologies like BWSC and PCCP, expanding its relevance in government-led infrastructure projects.
Key Takeways:
Growth & Future Outlook
Management guided for execution to pick up pace, supported by seasonality and expected clearance of certain delayed projects. Over the medium term, the company targets sustainable growth driven by government water and sewerage projects, rising urban infrastructure spending, and expansion into newer geographies. Margins are expected to remain in the range of 5–6%, while profitability will depend on timely payment releases from government agencies.

Name: Rajoo Engineers Ltd
Overview:
Rajoo Engineers Limited, founded in 1986 with promoters from the Doshi family, is a specialized manufacturer of plastic extrusion machinery based in Gujarat. The company designs and produces customized solutions, serving a broad array of industrial clients requiring precision-engineered extrusion equipment. 

With a strong export footprint across multiple countries, Rajoo stands out as a trusted name in plastic processing machinery, built upon decades of expertise in innovation and customer-specific designs.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Rajoo Engineers is strategically positioned for further growth through continued innovation and possible facility expansion. Their recent QIP raising and plans for a manufacturing park signal ambitions to enhance production capacity and R&D capabilities.

Name: Rishabh Instruments Ltd
Overview:
Rishabh Instruments Ltd is a leading manufacturer of electrical and electronic test and measurement instruments in India. Established in 1982, the company offers a wide range of products, including digital multimeters, insulation testers, and power analyzers.

With a strong focus on innovation and quality, Rishabh Instruments has expanded its presence internationally, establishing subsidiaries in Poland, the United Kingdom, the United States, China, and Cyprus.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook 
Management’s focus is clear on sustaining high-margin domestic performance while realigning international and HPDC portfolios. With aggressive R&D investments, new capacity ramp-up, diversification away from automotive dependence, and a scaling solar business, Rishabh Instruments is positioned for consistent double-digit growth.

Name: Emkay Tools Ltd
Overview:
Emkay Tools Ltd, incorporated in 2023, is a specialized Indian manufacturer focused on producing high-quality taps and cutting tools. These precision-engineered products are primarily utilized in the automobile and auto ancillary industries, catering to the growing demand for efficient and durable components in manufacturing processes. The company's offerings include a range of threading taps and cutting tools designed to meet the stringent requirements of modern industrial applications.

In addition to its core manufacturing operations, Emkay Tools Ltd is also involved in power generation through wind energy. The company owns and operates windmills in Rajasthan and Karnataka, contributing to sustainable energy production and aligning with India's renewable energy goals.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Emkay Tools Ltd is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to expand its manufacturing capabilities to meet the increasing demand for high-speed steel (HSS) threading taps and cutting tools, particularly from the automobile and auto ancillary sectors. Additionally, Emkay Tools Ltd aims to invest in advanced manufacturing technologies to improve product quality and production efficiency.

Name: Bajel Projects Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 2022, Bajel Projects Ltd (BPL) is a leading Indian Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) company specializing in power transmission and distribution infrastructure. A demerged entity from Bajaj Electricals Ltd, BPL offers end-to-end solutions encompassing in-house design, testing, procurement, manufacturing, installation, and commissioning of high-voltage systems up to 400 kV. With a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Ranjangaon, Maharashtra, BPL produces transmission line towers, monopoles, and other critical infrastructure components, ensuring quality and timely delivery.

BPL operates through four key business verticals: Power Transmission, Power Distribution, Monopoles, and International EPC. The company has secured significant projects, including ultra-mega transmission orders and substation expansions, reinforcing its position in the power infrastructure sector
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Bajel Projects Ltd is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to expand its manufacturing capacity at its Ranjangaon facility to over 100,000 metric tons per annum, up from the current 40,000 metric tons, through a ₹170 crore investment.

Name: Eimco Elecon (India) Ltd
Overview:
Eimco Elecon (India) Limited, established in 1974 and headquartered in Vallabh Vidyanagar, Gujarat, is a leading manufacturer and marketer of equipment for underground and opencast mining operations. 

The company pioneered the introduction of intermediate technology in India, notably with the development of Side Dump Loaders, Load Haul Dumpers, and Rocker Shovel Loaders. These innovations have positioned Eimco Elecon as a key player in the mining equipment sector.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Eimco Elecon is poised for growth in the coming quarters, supported by a robust order book and ongoing strategic initiatives. The company's focus on innovation and customized solutions positions it well to capitalize on opportunities in the mining equipment sector.

Name: Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd
Overview:
Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd (VPRP) is a prominent infrastructure development company in India, established in 1986. The company specializes in executing engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) projects across various sectors, including water supply, roads, railways, and irrigation.

VPRP has a strong presence in multiple states and union territories, undertaking projects for central and state governments, as well as private entities. The company is known for its commitment to quality, timely delivery, and adherence to safety standards.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Limited (VPRPL) is strategically expanding its footprint in India's infrastructure sector, focusing on water supply, railways, roads, and urban wastewater projects. In FY2025, the company secured 14 new projects worth ₹1,855.8 crore, bringing its total order book to over ₹5,000 crore, with a healthy bid pipeline of approximately ₹5,000 crore in upcoming tenders

Name: Yuken India Ltd
Overview:
Established in 1976 through a technical and financial collaboration with Yuken Kogyo Co. Ltd., Japan, Yuken India Ltd specializes in manufacturing a comprehensive range of oil hydraulic equipment. The company's product portfolio includes pumps, valves, cylinders, hydraulic power units, and accessories, catering to various industrial applications. 

Headquartered in Kolar, Karnataka, Yuken India operates with a commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction. The company's strategic focus on research and development enables it to offer advanced hydraulic solutions that meet the evolving needs of its clients.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Yuken India aims to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the hydraulic equipment industry by focusing on product innovation and expanding its export markets. The company plans to enhance its research and development capabilities to introduce advanced hydraulic solutions that cater to the evolving needs of its clients.

Name: Ganesh Green Bharat Ltd
Overview:
Ganesh Green Bharat Ltd, founded in 2016, is a prominent Indian company specializing in solar photovoltaic (PV) module manufacturing, solar systems, electrical contracting, and water supply scheme projects. The company offers end-to-end solutions in the renewable energy sector, providing services such as the supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of solar systems, water supply infrastructure, and electrical goods. 

With a strong commitment to sustainability and innovation, Ganesh Green Bharat aims to contribute significantly to India's renewable energy goals. The company has successfully executed numerous projects across various states, including solar home lighting systems, on-grid solar systems, and solar pump systems, catering to both urban and rural areas.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Ganesh Green Bharat Ltd is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to expand its solar module manufacturing capacity from 750 MW to 1.1 GW at its Gujarat facility, investing ₹5.52 crore to meet increasing demand for solar PV modules.

Name: Kabra Extrusion Technik Ltd
Overview:
Kabra Extrusiontechnik Ltd, part of the Kolsite Group, is a leading player in plastic extrusion machinery, with a market share of ~40% in its product category. The company manufactures a wide range of extrusion systems including blown film lines, pipe extrusion lines, and compounding lines, supported by R&D capabilities and international technical collaborations. It operates from two units in Daman and has installed over 15,000 systems across more than 100 countries.

In recent years, KET diversified into clean energy solutions through its Geon battery division, which designs and manufactures advanced lithium-ion battery packs and modules. With a facility in Chakan, Pune, the company serves multiple EV and energy storage segments. Expanding beyond B2B, it entered the B2C home inverter battery space in July 2025, signaling its ambition to strengthen its consumer brand in India’s fast-growing storage market.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Management reiterated confidence in the extrusion division as the growth driver, supported by demand from pipe and film applications, sustained R&D investments, and exports. For the battery business, near-term challenges remain, but the strategic focus is on scaling the home inverter B2C line, strengthening BESS partnerships, and targeting new EV sub-segments. With extrusion profitability intact and battery restructuring underway, the company expects gradual improvement in blended margins and stronger revenue diversification over the next 2–3 years.

Name: GMR Airports Ltd
Overview:
GMR Infrastructure is a diversified infrastructure company primarily engaged in the development, maintenance, and operation of airports, along with interests in power generation, highways, coal mining, EPC contracting, and special economic zones. It operates the largest private airport platform in India, ranking as the largest in Asia and second-largest globally, with a strong presence in both domestic and international passenger traffic management.

The company’s operations span across key airports in Delhi, Hyderabad, and Goa, with greenfield projects under development, including Bhogapuram Airport in Andhra Pradesh and Crete Airport in Greece. GMR also leverages non-aero revenue streams such as duty-free retail, cargo operations, commercial property development, and airport-adjacent businesses to drive profitability and diversify income sources.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management expects FY26 to be a turning point, driven by higher aero yields at Delhi, growth in international traffic, and ramp-up of non-aero businesses. With key projects nearing completion, refinancing benefits materializing, and new revenue streams scaling up, the company is positioned for stronger cash flows, improved leverage, and enhanced shareholder value in the medium term.

Name: NBCC (India) Ltd
Overview:
NBCC (India) Limited, a Government of India Navratna enterprise under the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, is a leading player in the construction and redevelopment sector. The company operates through three primary segments – Project Management Consultancy (PMC), Engineering Procurement & Construction (EPC), and Real Estate. Its expertise in executing large-scale government and private sector projects, particularly in stressed real estate and urban redevelopment, gives it a distinct competitive advantage.

With a strong track record, NBCC has delivered landmark projects across the country and built a robust order book exceeding ₹1 lakh crores on a consolidated basis. The company’s position as a PSU enables it to secure high-value redevelopment mandates, supported by government initiatives and steady demand for housing and infrastructure projects.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management aims to capitalise on its strong order book, government backing, and expertise in high-margin redevelopment projects to sustain double-digit growth. With a targeted order intake of at least ₹25,000 crores in the next financial year and robust execution capabilities, NBCC expects to deliver steady revenue expansion and margin improvement, despite near-term challenges in the PMC segment due to regulatory restrictions in certain regions.

Name: Thermax Ltd
Overview:
Thermax Limited is a diversified engineering solutions company headquartered in India, recognized for its expertise in delivering integrated solutions across Energy, Environment, and Chemical segments. With a history of innovation and sustainability, Thermax provides products and services that help customers optimize energy use, reduce environmental impact, and enhance operational efficiency.
 
 The company operates 14 manufacturing facilities in India and abroad, enabling it to serve both domestic and global markets effectively. Its robust order book and growing international revenue share highlight its strong execution capabilities and global footprint.
 Business Segments
 Energy:
 Provides boilers, heaters, power plants, and sustainable energy solutions. It focuses on designing, manufacturing, and commissioning equipment for industrial heating and cooling.
 
 Environment:
 Delivers air pollution control, water and wastewater treatment, waste heat recovery, and related environmental solutions. This segment supports industries in meeting stringent environmental norms and sustainability targets.
 
 Chemical:
 Offers a range of specialty chemicals, including ion exchange resins and performance chemicals, catering to water treatment, construction, paper, textiles, and other industries.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Thermax Limited is intensifying its focus on clean and renewable energy solutions, aiming to expand its footprint in bioenergy and green hydrogen sectors. The company plans to enhance its digital offerings by integrating advanced technologies like IIoT and AI into its operations and maintenance services. Thermax is also exploring opportunities in emerging markets, particularly in Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa, to diversify its revenue streams.

Name: Larsen & Toubro Ltd
Overview:
Larsen & Toubro Ltd (L&T) is a leading multinational engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) conglomerate, renowned for executing large-scale complex projects in infrastructure, hydrocarbon, power, defense, technology, and financial services. Ranked among the world’s top five construction companies, L&T operates through a broad network of subsidiaries, JVs, and associates, providing diversified services and solutions across India and major international markets.
 
 Business Segments & Revenue Mix
 Approximate contribution to total revenue:
 
 Infrastructure: 46% — Core EPC projects, metro rail, roads, bridges, urban infra.
 
 Hydrocarbon: 12% — Oil & gas, petrochemicals, onshore & offshore projects.
 
 Power: 3% — Thermal, renewable energy EPC solutions.
 
 Defense Engineering: 2% — Defense equipment, missile systems, naval systems.
 
 Technology Services (L&T Tech + LTI Mindtree): 21% — Engineering R&D, digital, IT services.
 
 Financial Services: 8% — Infrastructure finance, retail & housing finance.
 
 Development Projects: 3% — Smart cities, real estate, PPP projects.
 
 Geographic mix:
 Domestic (India): 64% of total revenue — driven by India’s massive infra & urbanization push.
 International: 36% — USA, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Southeast Asia.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook:
Larsen & Toubro (L&T) is poised to benefit from massive growth in India’s public and private infrastructure investments while rapidly expanding its presence in global markets, particularly the Middle East and Africa. The company is targeting large-scale renewable and green hydrogen projects, complementing its green energy initiatives. Tech-focused expansion and incubation of new-age businesses aim to diversify revenue streams and capture high-margin opportunities.

Name: MTAR Technologies Ltd
Overview:
MTAR Technologies, incorporated in 1970, is an engineering solutions company catering to critical sectors including clean energy, aerospace, defence, nuclear power, and oil & gas. Headquartered in Hyderabad, the company operates through multiple state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and has built deep relationships with both Indian government organizations and global OEMs.

Its portfolio includes precision-engineered products such as actuators, assemblies, ball screws, bearings, and nuclear equipment. With a diversified presence across long-cycle and high-entry-barrier industries, MTAR has positioned itself as a strategic partner for marquee customers worldwide while scaling up its global exports footprint.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
MTAR expects broad-based growth across clean energy, defence, aerospace, and nuclear, with margins remaining stable. Civil nuclear and oil & gas will be major growth engines from FY27, while clean energy remains the key contributor in FY26. Management is confident of achieving its growth and profitability targets, supported by robust order inflows, capacity expansion, and strong client relationships.

Name: Engineers India Ltd
Overview:
Engineers India Limited (EIL) is a leading engineering consultancy and turnkey project execution company with a strong foothold in hydrocarbon and infrastructure sectors. The company delivers integrated solutions ranging from consultancy and engineering to large-scale turnkey projects, catering to both domestic and international clients. Its robust order book growth and diversified project portfolio underscore its strategic positioning in key industrial segments.

EIL has been expanding its international presence with significant projects in the Middle East and plans to enter new markets like Saudi Arabia. The company is also diversifying into emerging sectors such as defence and renewable energy, leveraging its core engineering expertise while maintaining a strong commitment to sustainable growth and operational excellence.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
EIL is positioned for strong growth driven by an expanding order book, international market penetration, and diversification into defence and renewable sectors. The company’s focus on execution excellence, margin sustainability, and working capital management supports its ambition to nearly double revenues over the medium term. Continued government investment in hydrocarbon and infrastructure sectors is expected to underpin robust demand, while strategic initiatives will enhance resilience against evolving industry dynamics.

Name: Techno Electric & Engineering Company Ltd
Overview:
Techno Electric & Engineering Company Ltd (TEECL) is a leading player in the power infrastructure industry, offering services in Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC), asset ownership, and operations & maintenance. With proven execution capabilities, the company has built a strong reputation in transmission and distribution, flue gas desulphurization, smart metering, and renewable energy EPC.

TEECL is also expanding into high-growth areas such as hyperscale and edge data centers, positioning itself to benefit from India’s digital infrastructure push. With a diversified portfolio, strong order book, and disciplined capital allocation, the company is well placed to leverage sectoral tailwinds in power demand growth, transmission expansion, emission control compliance, and digital transformation.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
TEECL is targeting ₹4,500 crore revenue and ≥₹75 EPS in FY27, driven by scaling data center capacity to 50 MW, continued smart meter rollouts, and strong transmission EPC demand. Backed by robust cash flows, zero EPC debt, and sectoral growth catalysts, the company is positioned for sustained high growth and margin expansion over the next few years.

Name: Tega Industries Ltd
Overview:
Tega Industries, established in 1976, is a leading global manufacturer and distributor of specialized consumable and equipment products serving the mineral beneficiation, mining, and bulk solids handling industries. It is recognized as the second largest global producer of polymer-based mill liners by revenue. The company’s extensive product portfolio supports critical and recurring applications worldwide, reflecting a broad geographic presence with a strong focus on Latin America.

The company’s operations are organized into two primary segments: Consumables and Equipment. The Consumables segment dominates revenue contribution, while the Equipment segment has shown rapid growth, supported by key orders and expansions. Tega’s business strategy centers on innovation, operational excellence, and geographic expansion, particularly in mining hubs like Chile.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management reaffirms its guidance for FY26, targeting a long-term revenue CAGR of 15%, with equipment expected to grow at around 25%. Expansion in Chile and growth in the copper and gold mining cycles globally are key growth drivers. While geopolitical and supply chain risks persist, proactive measures and strong order visibility position Tega well for sustained growth and margin improvement.

Name: Afcons Infrastructure Ltd
Overview:
Afcons Infrastructure Limited, incorporated in 1959, is a leading infrastructure engineering and construction company in India. It specializes in executing large-scale projects across sectors such as transportation, marine, industrial, and urban infrastructure. 

The company offers end-to-end solutions, including design, engineering, construction, and project management, and is known for handling complex and challenging projects. With a mix of domestic and international operations, Afcons combines technical expertise with a strong focus on timely project execution and quality standards.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Afcons Infrastructure is strategically positioning itself to capitalize on India's infrastructure boom, driven by initiatives like PM Gati Shakti, which aims to mobilize $1 trillion in investments. The company is expanding its footprint both domestically and internationally, securing significant projects such as the ₹6,800 crore railway contract in Croatia and the ₹4,535 crore road projects in Croatia. Domestically, Afcons is actively involved in major urban infrastructure projects, including metro expansions in cities like Chennai and Kanpur.

Name: Ircon International Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1976, Ircon International Ltd (IRCON) is a Navratna Central Public Sector Enterprise under the Ministry of Railways. Initially established as a railway construction company, it has evolved into a diversified EPC and infrastructure player engaged in complex infrastructure projects across sectors such as railways, highways, tunnels, bridges, buildings, and electrification. The company operates in both domestic and international markets, providing engineering, project management, and consultancy services.

With 405 domestic and 130 international infrastructure projects completed across 25 countries, IRCON has built a robust track record in railway and highway execution. It has delivered over 5,500 TKM of railway track, 9,654 RKM of electrification, 6,807 km of highways, and 1.56 million sq. m of building area. The company manages its operations through 52 project offices in India and 6 overseas offices, backed by 11 subsidiaries and 7 joint ventures.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Ircon International Ltd is strategically expanding its infrastructure portfolio to meet the growing demand for transportation and industrial development. The company has secured significant contracts, including a ₹755.78 crore railway project in Madhya Pradesh and a ₹187.08 crore rural industrial park project in Kerala, reflecting its strong foothold in both rail and industrial infrastructure sectors.

Name: NCC Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1978, NCC Limited is a diversified infrastructure and construction company executing large-scale EPC and BOT projects across multiple verticals such as buildings, transportation, water and environment, electrical transmission & distribution, irrigation, mining, and railways. The company also has a presence in real estate development through NCC Urban Infrastructure Ltd, operating in key cities like Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Chennai. With over four decades of industry expertise, NCC has executed landmark projects including AIIMS hospitals, IIT and IIM campuses, metro viaducts, expressways, green building initiatives, and major irrigation works.

The company maintains a strong domestic presence and a robust client base, including public and private sector leaders like Airports Authority of India, Adani, NBCC, Powergrid, and metro rail corporations. As of 9M FY25, its consolidated order book stood at ₹55,548 crore, diversified across buildings, transportation, water & railways, electrical, irrigation, and mining. NCC has also entered the growing smart meters segment, with a sizable order share from Bihar and Maharashtra projects.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

NCC Limited is strategically focusing on expanding its presence in high-demand infrastructure sectors such as transportation, water supply, and affordable housing. The company has secured significant contracts, including a ₹3,214 crore tunnel construction project for the Mumbai Goregaon to Mulund twin tunnel.

Name: Rites Ltd
Overview:
RITES Limited, established in 1974, is a public sector enterprise specializing in transport consultancy and engineering. It operates across consultancy, turnkey projects, exports, and leasing, with a significant domestic presence and growing international footprint. As the export arm of Indian Railways (excluding select Asian countries), it provides end-to-end solutions including feasibility studies, design, project management, rolling stock supply, and maintenance.

The company’s diversified expertise spans over 55 countries, with a strong base in railways, urban infrastructure, roads, airports, and inland waterways. As of 9M FY25, consultancy contributed the largest share of revenues, followed by turnkey execution, exports, and leasing. With a robust order book and strategic MoUs, RITES is positioning itself for sustained growth in domestic and overseas markets.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
RITES aims to raise its international business contribution to 25% of total revenue, targeting new geographies and cross-country projects. With a healthy order pipeline, diversified segment exposure, and operational efficiency, the company is on track for 20% revenue growth in FY26. Strategic partnerships, including MoUs with CWPRS and Etihad Rail, are expected to strengthen capabilities in both domestic and global markets.

Name: K E C International Ltd
Overview:
KEC International Limited, a flagship company of the RPG Group, is a global infrastructure EPC major with a legacy spanning over eight decades. The company operates across multiple verticals, including Power Transmission & Distribution (T&D), Railways, Civil, Urban Infrastructure, Solar, Oil & Gas Pipelines, and Cables. With a footprint in over 110 countries and 275+ ongoing projects, KEC is recognized for its diverse engineering capabilities and large-scale execution expertise.

In FY25, the company reported revenues of ₹21,847 Cr, backed by strong T&D growth and robust international presence. It has eight manufacturing facilities across India, Dubai, Brazil, and Mexico, with enhanced production capacities for towers, cables, and conductors. KEC’s clientele spans governments, utilities, and private players globally. Backed by a strong order book of over ₹40,000 Cr (including L1 orders), the company maintains a solid Growth Outlook driven by sectoral tailwinds in renewables, infrastructure, and digital substations.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Management expects continued momentum in T&D, supported by renewable energy integration, international demand, and digital grid solutions. Civil execution is set to improve with payment releases, and cables are projected to see revenue and margin growth. Renewables remain a strategic focus with opportunities in Solar, Wind, and BESS. Despite challenges in Transportation and Oil & Gas, KEC aims for 15% revenue growth in FY26 with an EBITDA margin of 8–8.5%, and 9% in FY27.

Name: Tube Investments of India Ltd
Overview:
Tube Investments of India Ltd. (TII) is a diversified engineering and manufacturing company serving automotive, railway, construction, mining, agriculture, and consumer markets. It holds leadership positions in precision steel tubes, chains, bicycles, and gears, while strategically expanding into new businesses like TMT bars, truck bodies, clean mobility, and EVs.
 
 Business Segments 
 
 Engineering (Tubes, Chains, Precision Steel Products): ~60% of total revenue
 
 Cycles & Components (Bicycles, Accessories, Fitness Equipment): ~25% of total revenue
 
 Gears (via Shanthi Gears Ltd): ~10% of total revenue
 
 New Ventures (TMT bars, Truck Bodies, Clean Mobility, EVs, CDMO, API): ~5% and growing
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Tube Investments is pursuing a multi-decade growth strategy by expanding core businesses like CDW and ERW tubes and diversifying into EVs, pharma (CDMO/API), and clean mobility solutions. With capacity expansions near Chennai, focus on domestic lithium sourcing, and innovation in the gear and bicycle segments, the company is balancing engineering strength with entry into new verticals.

Name: Mold-Tek Technologies Ltd
Overview:
Mold-Tek Technologies Ltd is a niche engineering and design services company, specializing in structural engineering and detailing solutions for clients in the US, Europe, and Middle East. It provides services across civil, mechanical, and structural domains, leveraging advanced technologies and a skilled workforce. The company’s strong reputation in rebar detailing, precast detailing, and steel structures has established it as a preferred outsourcing partner.

Over the years, Mold-Tek has expanded its capabilities by adopting automation tools and BIM (Building Information Modelling), which have enhanced project accuracy and reduced turnaround times. Its offshore delivery model provides a cost advantage while ensuring global-quality standards.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Outlook remains strong as global infrastructure investment increases and companies continue to outsource specialized design services. Mold-Tek is focusing on expanding service offerings in BIM and structural detailing, while deepening client relationships in North America and Europe.

Name: Jaiprakash Associates Ltd
Overview:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd is a diversified infrastructure and engineering firm with operations spanning construction, real estate development, cement, power, fertilizers, hospitality, and related sectors. The company has undergone strategic asset restructuring to manage financial pressures and adapt to market shifts.

The company’s operations experienced significant volatility, leading to restructuring benefits and cost containment. The operational focus remains on stabilizing revenues across verticals while gradually reducing leverage and optimizing project execution.
Key Takeways:
r. Future Outlook
Jaiprakash Associates is expected to continue its path to recovery by leveraging its large project portfolio and restructuring gains. Sustained improvement depends on revitalized project inflows, improved real-estate traction, and disciplined cost-control. This trajectory should help inch the company toward more consistent earnings and a revival in operational momentum in FY26.

Name: John Cockerill India Ltd
Overview:
