Awfis is poised for continued growth, driven by the increasing demand for flexible and hybrid workspaces in India. The company's strategic expansion into tier-II cities and diversification into related sectors are expected to enhance its market position. With a strong operational foundation and a focus on innovation, Awfis aims to capitalize on the evolving workspace trends in FY26 and beyond.

Name: Marathon Nextgen Realty Ltd
Overview:
Marathon Nextgen Realty Ltd is a real estate developer focused on residential and commercial projects in Mumbai and the surrounding metropolitan region. The company emphasizes quality construction, timely delivery, and customer-centric designs.

It has built a strong brand presence in the real estate market, attracting clients seeking premium residential and commercial spaces. Operational efficiency and strategic project execution have contributed to its profitability and market recognition.

Marathon Nextgen Realty is pursuing growth through expansion of its project portfolio and innovation in real estate offerings, aiming to enhance long-term stakeholder value.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Marathon Nextgen Realty Ltd is strategically expanding its footprint beyond traditional residential and commercial projects into diverse sectors such as Special Economic Zones (SEZs), integrated townships, infrastructure development, entertainment, hospitality, education, and the capital markets. The company is actively exploring redevelopment opportunities and considering launching new projects in key areas to enhance its portfolio.

Name: Anant Raj Ltd
Overview:
Anant Raj Ltd is a well-established real estate developer rooted in Delhi NCR, with a rich portfolio that spans integrated townships, residential complexes, IT parks, commercial spaces, hospitality assets, and warehousing. Over the past few years, the company has diversified its operations to include data centre and cloud infrastructure, creating a platform for future‑ready digital real estate offerings. 

By FY 2024‑25, Anant Raj demonstrated robust financial momentum driven by operational excellence and strategic diversification. The company significantly improved its balance sheet through debt reduction, successfully launched new residential and commercial projects, and strengthened its positioning in both real estate and data centre/cloud services
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Looking ahead, Anant Raj plans to expand its real estate footprint with new residential, commercial, and affordable housing launches, alongside a focused push into data centre capacity expansion. These moves position the company well to capture growth in digital infrastructure and real estate markets, aiming for sustained revenue diversification and value creation.

Name: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd
Overview:
Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd is a prominent Indian real estate development company, focusing on residential and commercial projects in key urban markets. Established in 2008, the company operates primarily in Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, and the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, known for quality construction and timely delivery.

The company offers a diverse portfolio of properties, including affordable housing, mid-income housing, and premium developments. Arvind SmartSpaces aims to cater to a wide range of customer needs, from first-time homebuyers to investors seeking high-end properties, while emphasizing sustainable development and customer satisfaction.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Arvind SmartSpaces plans to continue expanding in existing markets and explore new urban centers. The company aims to launch new projects with a focus on sustainable development and customer-centric designs. With a strong order book and commitment to quality, Arvind SmartSpaces is positioned to capitalize on growing demand in the Indian real estate market.

Name: SignatureGlobal India Ltd
Overview:
Signatureglobal (India) Limited, founded in 2000, is a leading real estate developer in the Delhi NCR region, with a stronghold in the affordable and lower mid-income housing segment. The company has progressively expanded its portfolio into mid-income and premium housing, along with large township projects. Its operations are concentrated in strategically chosen micro-markets such as Gurugram’s Sector 71, Sohna Elevated Corridor, and Sector 37D, all backed by robust connectivity and infrastructure growth.

By June 2025, Signatureglobal had delivered 15.7 mn sqft of housing projects and developed a total portfolio of 50.8 mn sqft, comprising ongoing, recently launched, and forthcoming projects. The company emphasizes rapid execution, standardization, and the use of advanced construction technologies such as aluminium formwork, ensuring high quality and timely delivery. A wide distribution network of 2,400+ channel partners and a strong digital sales strategy have been central to its sales growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Signatureglobal targets ₹125 bn in FY26 pre-sales and ₹48 bn in revenue recognition, supported by sustained launches in premium and mid-income housing. With strong brand recall, steady price realization, and strategic expansion into high-demand micro-markets, the company expects momentum to build in the remaining quarters, aided by faster construction cycles and a balanced product mix.

Name: Ashiana Housing Ltd
Overview:
Ashiana Housing Ltd, established in 1986 and headquartered in New Delhi, is a real estate developer known for its specialization in senior living, residential apartments, and community-focused housing. It operates across multiple cities including Jaipur, Chennai, Pune, Bhiwadi, Lavasa, and Jamshedpur, with a reputation for timely delivery and customer satisfaction.

The company has built a niche in senior living and retirement communities, while also developing mainstream residential projects and limited retail offerings. Alongside real estate development, Ashiana provides facilities management services, focusing on creating long-term “happy communities” rather than just housing units.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
For FY26, Ashiana has planned an investment of ₹425 crore, nearly doubling the previous year’s outlay, with a strong focus on expanding its senior living projects. The company is also preparing to enter new markets such as Mumbai and Bengaluru to diversify its portfolio beyond existing geographies. Management has indicated that FY26 will likely see improved revenue momentum and margin recovery, supported by stronger deliveries and better pricing across projects.

Name: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd
Overview:
Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd (MLDL) is a diversified real estate developer with core businesses spanning residential projects, commercial complexes, and industrial clusters, including SEZs. The company maintains a strategic focus on mid-premium and premium segments, with an expanding industrial clusters business that enhances profitability. 

The company continues to grow its land bank and project pipeline across key markets like Mumbai, Bangalore, Pune, and NCR, while navigating regulatory delays impacting launches. With robust demand supported by easing interest rates, MLDL aims to accelerate project execution and capitalize on premium pricing in select micro-markets, reinforcing its path toward ambitious sales targets.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
MLDL aims to grow sales at a 25-30% CAGR to reach a multi-thousand crore sales target by FY30, focusing on resolving launch bottlenecks and accelerating project execution. The industrial clusters business is expected to expand further, leveraging premium pricing and strategic partnerships. The company plans to deepen market presence in key cities rather than broadening geographically in the near term.

Name: Hubtown Ltd
Overview:
Hubtown Ltd, established in 1985 and formerly known as Ackruti City Limited, is a prominent real estate development company headquartered in Mumbai, India. The company specializes in the construction and development of residential, commercial, IT, industrial, and infrastructure projects. Hubtown operates across various cities, including Mumbai, Thane, Pune, Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodara, and Mehsana, executing projects both independently and through subsidiaries, joint ventures, and associate companies.

Over the years, Hubtown has built a diverse portfolio encompassing large-scale residential complexes, commercial spaces, and infrastructure developments. The company's commitment to quality construction and timely delivery has earned it a reputable position in the Indian real estate sector.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Hubtown Ltd is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to significantly expand its real estate development business by venturing into redevelopment, joint venture (JV), and joint development agreement (JDA) projects with other landowners. This asset-light approach is expected to contribute significantly to its future growth. Additionally, Hubtown is focusing on developing green and sustainable buildings, with 47 projects certified by the Indian Green Building Council (IGBC).

Name: Puravankara Ltd
Overview:
Puravankara Limited is a prominent real estate developer with operations across major metro cities in India, including Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Chennai, Kochi, Hyderabad, and Goa. The company operates through three brands: Puravankara (luxury housing and commercial offices), Provident (affordable housing), and Purva Land (plotted development projects), offering a diversified portfolio targeting multiple customer segments. Its business model is supported by a large and geographically diversified project pipeline, with growing presence in western markets such as Mumbai and Pune alongside its strong southern base in Bengaluru and Chennai.

In FY25 and early FY26, the company focused on strengthening its project launch pipeline, entering high-value redevelopment opportunities, and monetizing commercial assets. With a robust business development (BD) approach, Puravankara has strategically acquired prime redevelopment sites and joint development agreements, ensuring a steady replenishment of its land bank. The firm also continues to expand its annuity income base through commercial leasing, with marquee tenants like IKEA, while managing regulatory and approval challenges effectively.
Key Takeways:
.Growth Outlook
Management expects FY26 growth to be driven by a robust, geographically balanced pipeline, high-IRR redevelopment projects (30–35%+ potential), and commercial asset monetization. Resolution of e-Khata delays is expected to accelerate handovers and revenue recognition from Q2/Q3 FY26. Pending collections from sold units stand at ₹4,643 crore, providing strong cash flow visibility.

Name: Sri Lotus Developers & Realty Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in February 2015, Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Limited is a prominent real estate developer based in Mumbai, specializing in the redevelopment of ultra-luxury and luxury residential and commercial properties. The company operates primarily in Mumbai's western suburbs, focusing on areas such as Juhu, Bandra West, and Andheri West. 

Sri Lotus Developers employs an asset-light model, engaging in redevelopment and joint development agreements rather than acquiring land outright. This approach allows the company to minimize capital expenditure while expanding its project portfolio. The company's projects are marketed under the "Lotus Developers" brand, which commands a 22% pricing premium in the Juhu micro-market.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Sri Lotus Developers and Realty Limited is poised for continued growth, focusing on expanding its presence in Mumbai's high-end real estate market. The company plans to enhance its project portfolio by entering new micro-markets such as Prabhadevi, Nepean Sea Road, and Ghatkopar, capitalizing on rising demand and high capital appreciation in these areas.

Name: Valor Estate Ltd
Overview:
Valor Estate Ltd is engaged in the business of real estate development and allied activities. The company primarily focuses on developing residential and commercial properties while also diversifying into property leasing and asset management. It aims to capitalize on the growing demand for organized and modern real estate solutions.

The company continues to explore opportunities in both urban and semi-urban regions, targeting affordable as well as premium housing. With real estate being cyclical, Valor Estate is strategically positioning itself with a balanced portfolio to mitigate risks and capture steady revenue streams.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Going forward, Valor Estate plans to launch new residential and mixed-use projects while leveraging its land bank to generate sustained cash flows. The commercial leasing segment is expected to emerge as a stable revenue generator over the next few years.

Name: NESCO Ltd
Overview:
NESCO Ltd operates across four distinct verticals: licensing office spaces in IT parks, exhibition hosting, industrial equipment manufacturing (Indabrator), and hospitality/catering through its Nesco Foods arm. The company’s integrated infrastructure supports a broad client base, including corporates, event organizers, and industrial operators.

It commands leadership in Mumbai’s exhibition and real estate sectors, offering sustainable office premises and state-of-the-art convention facilities. This diversified footprint positions NESCO well to leverage synergies across real estate, manufacturing, hospitality, and events.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
NESCO with strong momentum diversified demand across its key verticals, improved margins, and active investment in realty capacity expansion. Sustained traction in exhibitions and foods, coupled with infrastructure development, primes the company for resilient performance in the coming quarters.

Name: Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd
Overview:
Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd is a well-established engineering, procurement, and construction company with over five decades of experience. It specializes in turnkey projects across residential, infrastructure, commercial, institutional, and hospitality verticals.

The company maintains a strong pan-India presence, executing projects through its engineering excellence, project management capabilities, and integrated design-to-delivery model, delivering iconic projects like railway station redevelopments, metro depots, and commercial complexes.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Ahluwalia Contracts is strategically expanding its operations by securing substantial infrastructure projects across India. Recent contract wins include a ₹1,100 crore residential development in Gurugram and a ₹572 crore terminal construction at Darbhanga Airport, reflecting the company's strong presence in both urban and regional markets. With an order book exceeding ₹11,000 crore, the company is poised to execute projects over the next 24–30 months, focusing on residential, commercial, and institutional developments.

Name: Keystone Realtors Ltd
Overview:
Keystone Realtors Ltd, operating under the Rustomjee brand, is a Mumbai-based real estate developer specializing in redevelopment and residential projects across the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR). With a focus on an asset-light, capital-efficient model, the company blends new launches with strategic urban redevelopments to optimize returns and capital efficiency.

Backed by a strong balance sheet and nimble execution capabilities, Keystone delivers across price points—from affordable to super-premium—combining redevelopment opportunities with new construction to maintain consistent sales momentum and value creation.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
With pre-sales and project launches well ahead of full-year FY26 guidance, Keystone is well-positioned to sustain growth through FY26. Its asset-light model, strong cash collections, and growing redevelopment pipeline provide resilience and scalability. The company is poised to leverage Ahmedabad market opportunities and maintain margin-rich, capital-efficient growth strategies.

Name: Nirlon Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1958, Nirlon Ltd is primarily engaged in the development, leasing, and management of the Nirlon Knowledge Park (NKP), a landmark Grade-A commercial real estate asset located in Goregaon East, Mumbai. The company has evolved from its legacy in synthetic yarn and rubber manufacturing to become a key real estate developer and manager.

Nirlon’s focus remains on maintaining high occupancy and steady rental income from NKP and related properties, leveraging premium location advantages and long-term institutional tenant relationships to support its commercial portfolio.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Supported by its high occupancy model, entrenched institutional tenancy, and resilient margins, Nirlon appears poised to sustain commercial property performance. While there are upcoming vacancies—e.g., Morgan Stanley vacating ~449,000 sq ft—management has already re-leased significant portions and secured renewals, demonstrating agility in tenant management.

Name: Sunteck Realty Ltd
Overview:
Sunteck Realty Limited is a Mumbai-based real estate developer with a strong focus on premium and luxury residential and commercial projects in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR). The company has established itself as one of the largest developers in Western suburbs while also expanding into Eastern corridors with a diversified portfolio of projects.

With a robust pipeline and a balanced approach between asset-light and asset-heavy models, the company has steadily expanded its presence across micro-markets. Backed by strong partnerships and a healthy balance sheet, Sunteck continues to reinforce its leadership in the high-value real estate segment of MMR.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management remains confident of sustaining 30–35% pre-sales growth and expects collections to improve by 20% in FY26 as new launches ramp up. With a robust launch pipeline, luxury-led demand, and strong financial metrics, Sunteck is positioned for accelerated growth and long-term value creation.

Name: Max Estates Ltd
Overview:
Max Estates, the real estate development arm of the Max Group, is a prominent player in the Delhi-NCR real estate market. Established in 2016, the company focuses on delivering sustainable and well-being-oriented commercial and residential developments. With a diversified portfolio, Max Estates aims to enhance the quality of life through thoughtfully designed spaces that cater to modern urban needs.

Max Estates has a significant presence in the NCR region, with a development potential spanning approximately 17 million square feet. The company is actively engaged in several high-value projects, including mixed-use developments and premium residential communities, reflecting its commitment to shaping the urban landscape of Delhi-NCR.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Max Estates is strategically expanding its footprint in the Delhi-NCR real estate market, aiming to achieve pre-sales bookings of ₹6,500 crore in FY26. The company plans to launch multiple projects, including the Estate 361 development in Gurugram, which is expected to contribute significantly to its growth trajectory. Additionally, Max Estates is focusing on enhancing its rental income streams, targeting an annualized rental income of ₹723 crore from its commercial properties.

Name: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd
Overview:
Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd, established in 2015, is a prominent provider of customized managed workspace solutions in India. The company specializes in offering fully serviced, tech-enabled office environments tailored to meet the specific needs of enterprises, including mid-to-large corporates, MNCs, and startups. Smartworks' offerings encompass modern campuses with design, technology, and community-driven amenities, aiming to enhance productivity and employee well-being. 

Headquartered in Gurugram, India, Smartworks operates across multiple cities, providing flexible office spaces that cater to the evolving demands of businesses. The company's focus on delivering high-quality, scalable, and cost-effective workspace solutions has positioned it as a key player in the Indian coworking industry.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd is poised for continued growth, with plans to expand its operational footprint and enhance service offerings. The company aims to capitalize on the increasing demand for flexible workspace solutions, driven by the rise of hybrid work models and the need for scalable office spaces. Smartworks is focusing on strengthening its technological infrastructure and community-driven amenities to provide a seamless and productive environment for its clients.

Name: Sobha Ltd
Overview:
Sobha Limited, founded in 1995, is a leading Indian real estate developer with a vertically integrated model, covering the entire lifecycle from design and construction to delivery. The company operates across residential, commercial, and contractual manufacturing segments, leveraging its in-house capabilities in interiors, glazing, metal works, and concrete products to maintain stringent quality control. Its real estate portfolio spans multiple formats including luxury apartments, villas, plotted developments, and retail spaces.

The company has a strong geographical footprint, with a dominant presence in Bangalore and significant operations in NCR, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and other regions. As of June 30, 2025, Sobha has completed 145.89 million sq ft, with 43.67 million sq ft under development and a forthcoming pipeline of 18.38 million sq ft. A robust land bank of 417 acres (development potential of ~41.91 million sq ft) underpins its growth strategy, complemented by an additional 1,765 acres under various stages of monetization and consolidation.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Sobha’s growth will be fueled by its entry into new geographies such as Greater Noida, a strong pipeline of premium residential and commercial projects, and robust inventory value. The company's healthy cashflows, negative net debt, and large land bank position it well to capitalize on demand momentum in the mid-to-premium housing segment. Additionally, its backward-integrated operations and emphasis on execution efficiency provide a competitive advantage for scaling across multiple high-growth urban markets.

Name: Brigade Enterprises Ltd
Overview:
Brigade Enterprises Ltd, established in 1986 and headquartered in Bengaluru, is a prominent real estate developer primarily focused on residential, commercial, retail, and hospitality projects across South India and expanding in other regions. The company has developed over 100 million square feet of space with a diversified portfolio spanning multiple cities including Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, and Mysuru.

Known for its strategic land acquisitions and premium product launches, Brigade maintains a strong presence in the residential and commercial real estate markets while also growing its hospitality business. Its integrated approach combines project development, leasing, and sustainable initiatives aligned with net zero goals.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Brigade aims for 15-20% year-on-year presales growth in FY26, focusing on a balanced mix of volume and value growth with an average pricing assumption around ₹10,000 per sq. ft. The company plans launches primarily in the second half of FY26 and targets full occupancy of key commercial projects by year-end. Management remains confident about sustained demand and prudent capital allocation while closely monitoring market dynamics.

Name: TARC Ltd
Overview:
TARC Ltd began as a construction and contracting company and has evolved into one of the largest real estate developers and land-bank holders in the New Delhi metropolitan area. It operates across diverse verticals residential, hospitality, commercial, and retail developing high-end communities and mixed-use projects.

In its latest fiscal year, TARC delivered a strong performance driven by the launch of premium projects in Gurugram and Delhi. Its focus remains on executing luxury residential developments with curated designs, while gearing up new launches and preparing an expanded project pipeline.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
TARC is positioning for sustained momentum. The company has acquired additional land parcels in Gurugram and is finalizing designs for two more luxury residential projects to launch in FY26. With its robust project pipeline, strong brand traction, and growing GDV base, TARC is well-placed to extend its growth trajectory into the next fiscal year.

Name: Hemisphere Properties India Ltd
Overview:
Hemisphere Properties India Ltd was established following a disinvestment exercise by the Indian government involving surplus land from the erstwhile Videsh Sanchar Nigam Ltd (VSNL). Under a restructuring scheme, approximately 740 acres of land were transferred into HPIL.

This entity is structured to develop or monetize these prime land parcels in compliance with the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs’ policies and HPIL’s management mandate.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
HPIL is well-positioned to unlock substantial value through structured land development and strategic partnerships. Its success will largely depend on real estate market dynamics in its key regions especially Pune and its ability to align with urban development policy frameworks for optimized returns.

Name: Embassy Developments Ltd
Overview:
Embassy Developments Limited (EDL) is the real estate development arm under the Embassy Group, focused on residential, commercial, and SEZ projects. It operates primarily in high-growth metro markets including Bengaluru, Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR), NCR, and Chennai, offering a diversified portfolio spanning affordable, premium, luxury, and ultra-luxury residential spaces.

Following its merger and consolidation, EDL now commands a vast development pipeline underpinned by a significant land bank and strategic sectoral investments. Its operational model spans project identification, execution, launches, and monetization—leveraging deep domain expertise and a robust brand presence.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
EDL is poised for robust growth backed by an aggressive pipeline and pre-sales target that more than doubles from the previous year. Its focus on residential demand, prime metro markets, and monetization of commercial assets positions it to sustain momentum. With strong execution capabilities, pipeline visibility, and strategic partnerships, EDL is set to consolidate its position as a pan-India real estate leader.

Name: Elpro International Ltd
Overview:
Elpro International Limited is a diversified Indian company engaged in manufacturing surge arresters, developing real estate properties, making equity investments in third parties, and operating windmills. Established in 1985 and headquartered in Mumbai, Elpro International has evolved into a multi-faceted organization with a presence in various sectors.

Elpro International's surge arresters are utilized in protecting electrical equipment from voltage spikes, serving industries such as power generation and distribution. In the real estate sector, the company focuses on the construction and development of residential and commercial properties, contributing to urban infrastructure growth.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Elpro International aims to leverage its diversified business portfolio to drive growth. The company plans to expand its presence in the electrical equipment sector, capitalize on opportunities in real estate development, and explore further investments in renewable energy through its windmill operations.

Name: Unitech Ltd
Overview:
Unitech Ltd, established in 1971, is a prominent player in India's real estate sector. Initially a soil and foundation engineering consultancy firm, it has diversified its portfolio to include commercial complexes, IT parks, residential developments, schools, hotels, malls, and amusement parks.

In addition to its real estate ventures, Unitech has expanded its business interests into power transmission and hospitality sectors. The company has been involved in constructing highways, roads, powerhouses, and transmission lines. Its hospitality division includes the development of hotels and amusement parks, contributing to its diversified business model.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Unitech Ltd aims to leverage its diversified portfolio to navigate the challenges in the real estate sector. The company's focus on infrastructure development in the power transmission sector and expansion in the hospitality industry are expected to contribute to its revenue streams. However, the company will need to address its profitability issues to achieve sustainable growth in the coming fiscal years.

Name: Shriram Properties Ltd
Overview:
Shriram Properties Ltd is a real estate development company in India, engaged in residential and commercial projects across multiple cities. It specializes in developing premium housing, townships, and mixed-use complexes with modern design and infrastructure.

Headquartered in Chennai, the company emphasizes quality construction, timely project execution, and customer satisfaction. It leverages brand recognition and strong financial planning to ensure successful project completions and sustained growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Shriram Properties plans to expand into new cities, focus on premium housing segments, and optimize land acquisition strategies. Sustainable growth is supported by operational efficiency, brand recognition, and customer-centric approaches.

Name: Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings Ltd
Overview:
Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings Ltd is a diversified Indian infrastructure company operating across railways, real estate, energy, and engineering sectors. It has a strong presence in the railway segment, manufacturing and supplying wagons, coaches, and related components, while also offering services in track construction, electrification, signaling, and maintenance.

In addition to railways, the company develops residential and commercial real estate projects, including townships and industrial parks, and invests in renewable energy initiatives such as wind and solar power. Leveraging its engineering expertise, Texmaco Infrastructure delivers turnkey infrastructure solutions domestically and internationally, focusing on quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction to support India’s infrastructure growth.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Texmaco Infrastructure & Holdings Ltd is strategically enhancing its growth prospects through significant real estate developments and renewable energy projects. The company has entered into development agreements for major residential and commercial projects in Delhi and Kolkata, including a 10-acre mixed-use development in Kamla Nagar, Delhi, and a residential project in Entally, Kolkata.

Name: Arihant Superstructures Ltd
Overview:
Incorporated in 1994, Arihant Superstructures Ltd (ASL) is a real estate developer with a strong presence in the affordable and mid-income housing segments across the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR). Over the years, it has also diversified into premium housing, villas, and mixed-use projects, alongside plans for hospitality and sports infrastructure. The company leverages joint development (JD), joint venture (JV), and development management (DM) models to remain asset-light in select projects, with nearly one-fifth of its ongoing development portfolio under such structures.

ASL commands a market share of ~13% in Navi Mumbai and between 5–50% across other micro-markets where it operates. Its portfolio spans affordable housing, mid-income, and premium villas, along with upcoming annuity assets such as a 221-key hotel and a 10.5-acre gymkhana. With ~18 million sq. ft. of development pipeline valued at ~₹12,500 crores in gross development value (GDV), the company remains focused on Navi Mumbai, Panvel, and other growth corridors around upcoming infra hubs like the Navi Mumbai International Airport and Atal Setu.
Key Takeways:
Future Growth
Management reaffirmed FY26 presales guidance of ₹1,100 crores, targeting ₹1,500 crores in FY27. Realizations are expected to grow 7–10% annually, particularly in premium and mid-income projects nearing completion. Regulatory headwinds are easing, with environmental clearances for Arihant Avanti and Arihant 7 Anaika expected by December 2025, enabling revenue recognition from FY27.

Name: BEML Land Assets Ltd
Overview: BEML Land Assets Ltd (BLAL) was incorporated in 2021 as a wholly owned subsidiary of BEML Limited, a central public sector undertaking under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India. The company’s primary mandate is to manage and monetize surplus and non-core land assets of BEML, aiming to unlock value from underutilized properties. BLAL focuses on developing residential, commercial, and industrial projects on these lands, enabling optimal utilization of government-owned real estate. With strategic locations across India, BLAL seeks to create sustainable revenue streams while supporting BEML’s core business. The company also works to ensure that land asset development complies with regulatory, environmental, and urban planning norms, creating long-term value for stakeholders.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

BEML Land Assets Ltd, established in 2021 following the demerger of non-core assets from BEML Limited, is strategically focusing on monetizing surplus land and immovable assets. The company is actively exploring opportunities in real estate development, particularly in urban areas, to capitalize on India's rapid urbanization. Additionally, BEML Land Assets is considering partnerships and collaborations to enhance its growth prospects.

Name: Prozone Realty Ltd
Overview:
Prozone Realty Ltd operates in the development, ownership, and management of commercial properties—including shopping malls—as well as substantial residential infrastructure. The company combines real estate development with property operations and value-added management consultancy services, catering to both retail and residential market segments.

Through integrated real estate ventures, Prozone Realty focuses on creating large-scale commercial destinations and community-oriented residential projects, aiming to deliver enduring value through operational excellence and strategic development.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Prozone Realty Ltd is strategically enhancing its position in India's real estate sector through a diversified approach encompassing retail, residential, and commercial developments. The company is actively expanding its portfolio of regional shopping centers and mixed-use developments across the country, aiming to create world-class destinations that cater to evolving consumer preferences.

Name: TransIndia Real Estate Ltd
Overview:
Transindia Real Estate Ltd, incorporated in 2021, is a diversified real estate and infrastructure company based in India. The company engages in various business activities, including leasing of land and commercial properties, development of logistics parks and warehousing facilities, real estate development and leasing, and providing engineering and equipment hiring solutions. Transindia Real Estate aims to capitalize on the growing demand for infrastructure and real estate services in India.

With a focus on strategic development and operational efficiency, Transindia Real Estate is positioning itself as a key player in the Indian real estate and infrastructure sectors.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Transindia Real Estate Ltd is poised for sustained growth, driven by its strategic initiatives and diversified business model. The company's focus on expanding its portfolio and enhancing operational efficiency positions it well to capitalize on opportunities in the Indian real estate and infrastructure markets. With ongoing projects and future plans, Transindia Real Estate aims to deliver value to its stakeholders and contribute to the development of India's infrastructure.

Name: Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd
Overview:
Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd, established in 1992, is a prominent real estate development company based in Chennai, India. The company specializes in constructing residential, commercial, and IT park projects, with a significant focus on joint development ventures. Arihant Foundations has successfully delivered a diverse portfolio of developments, including luxury villas, gated communities, and mixed-use complexes, catering to the evolving needs of urban living and business environments. 

The company's residential projects are strategically located in serene yet well-connected neighborhoods, ensuring a balance of lifestyle, convenience, and long-term appreciation. In the commercial sector, Arihant Foundations develops spaces positioned in high-demand business hubs, catering to global corporations and emerging enterprises.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd is actively pursuing strategic initiatives to drive future growth and enhance its market presence. The company plans to expand its operations by increasing its annual solar module manufacturing capacity from 700 MW to 1.5 GW by the end of the year, with a further expansion to 4.5 GW by 2026.

Name: Suraj Estate Developers Ltd
Overview:
Suraj Estate Developers Ltd., established in 1986, is a prominent real estate construction company specializing in residential and commercial developments in the South-Central Mumbai region. The company has a significant presence in the redevelopment market, holding a 61% share in South-Central Mumbai's redevelopment sector. 

With a portfolio that includes over 1,011 homes redeveloped free of cost, Suraj Estate Developers has established itself as a leader in urban redevelopment projects. The company's business model focuses on luxury, value-luxury, and commercial segments, catering to a diverse customer base.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Suraj Estate Developers aims to leverage its strong market position and extensive project pipeline to drive growth in FY26. The planned launches, coupled with strategic acquisitions and an expansive pipeline, position the company for sustained growth, emphasizing developments in the South-Central Mumbai micro-market, including luxury and commercial segments.

Name: Peninsula Land Ltd
Overview:
Peninsula Land Ltd is a prominent real estate development company engaged in residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects across India. The company focuses on delivering high-quality construction, maintaining sustainable practices, and ensuring timely project completion. Its project portfolio includes premium residential complexes, IT parks, and retail spaces catering to urban growth and infrastructure demand.

With strong project management systems and strategic land acquisitions, Peninsula Land has positioned itself as a reliable developer in key urban markets. The company continues to explore opportunities for new project launches and joint ventures to strengthen its presence in emerging markets while maintaining operational efficiency and profitability.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
The company aims to expand its footprint through new residential and commercial projects in key urban and emerging markets. Enhanced project execution, improved operational efficiency, and strategic land acquisitions are expected to drive sustainable growth and long-term value creation for stakeholders.

Name: Eldeco Housing & Industries Ltd
Overview:
Eldeco Housing and Industries Ltd, established in 1985, is a prominent real estate developer in India. The company specializes in the development of residential, commercial, and retail properties, with a significant presence across North India. Eldeco is recognized for delivering quality projects that cater to a diverse clientele, ranging from affordable housing to luxury developments. 

With a commitment to timely delivery and customer satisfaction, Eldeco has built a strong reputation in the real estate sector. The company operates in over 20 cities, including Lucknow, Noida, Greater Noida, Faridabad, Gurgaon, Sonepat, Panipat, Ludhiana, Jalandhar, Kanpur, Panchkula, and Sitarganj.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Eldeco Housing and Industries Ltd aims to continue its growth trajectory by leveraging its extensive experience and diversified project portfolio. The company plans to expand its presence in existing markets and explore new regions to tap into emerging opportunities.

Name: Oswal Green Tech Ltd
Overview: Oswal Green Tech Ltd is a real estate development company incorporated in 1981, focusing on the development and construction of residential and commercial properties. The company also invests its surplus funds in interest-bearing inter-corporate deposits. Oswal Green Tech Ltd aims to deliver quality real estate projects that meet the evolving needs of its customers.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Oswal Greentech Ltd is actively expanding its real estate portfolio, focusing on residential projects such as Centra Greens in Ludhiana, Punjab. The company is also enhancing its investment segment by acquiring a 5% stake in Oswal Agro Mills Ltd (OAML), strengthening its strategic position and potential for future growth.

Name: Omaxe Ltd
Overview:
Omaxe Ltd is a prominent Indian real estate developer, established in 1989, with a diversified portfolio encompassing residential, commercial, retail, and township projects. The company operates across 30 cities in 8 states, including key markets like Delhi NCR, Lucknow, Ludhiana, and Faridabad. Omaxe has delivered over 135 million square feet of real estate space, positioning itself as a significant player in the Indian real estate sector. 

The company's projects range from multi-story apartments and independent floors to integrated townships and commercial complexes. Omaxe's commitment to quality construction and timely delivery has earned it a strong reputation among homebuyers and investors.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Omaxe Ltd plans to invest approximately ₹10,000 crore over the next 2-3 years to accelerate its real estate development activities. This investment will focus on expanding its residential and commercial project portfolio, enhancing infrastructure, and exploring new markets.

Name: Chennai Petroleum Corporation Ltd
Overview:
Chennai Petroleum Corporation Limited (CPCL) is a key player in refining crude oil and manufacturing various petroleum products, including lubricating oil additives. The company markets its main petroleum products through its parent company, Indian Oil Corporation (IOCL), and independently markets specialty products like paraffin wax and petrochemical feedstocks. CPCL operates a complex refinery with a focus on operational efficiency and product innovation.

The company maintains high utilization rates, consistently exceeding rated capacity, and focuses on energy efficiency and cost control. CPCL is advancing several strategic projects, including the Cauvery Basin Refinery JV with IOCL and a lube oil base stock (LOBS) upgrade, aimed at boosting value-added product offerings and future profitability.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management aims to improve margins steadily by leveraging operational efficiency, reducing fuel losses, and ramping up specialty product sales. Growth will be supported by capital projects like the LOBS upgrade and Cauvery Basin Refinery, alongside capturing regional demand gaps, especially in motor spirit. The company remains cautiously optimistic, balancing capital discipline with innovation and sustainability initiatives.

Name: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd
Overview:
Indian Oil Corporation Ltd (IOCL) is India's largest refining and petroleum products company, with a robust presence across the hydrocarbon value chain. Its footprint spans refining, marketing, pipelines, R&D, petrochemicals, and emerging clean/renewable energy initiatives.
 
 Business Segments and Latest Revenue (FY2025)
 Total Revenue: ₹8,45,513 crore 

 Revenue by Key Product Segments:
 
 High-Speed Diesel (HSD): 47%, approx. ₹3,97,391 crore
 
 Motor Spirit (Petrol): 22%, approx. ₹1,86,013 crore
 
 Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG): 13%, approx. ₹1,09,917 crore
 
 Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF): 3%, approx. ₹25,365 crore
 
 Superior Kerosene Oil (SKO): 1%, approx. ₹8,455 crore
 
 Others (petrochemicals, lubricants, allied products): 14%, approx. ₹1,18,372 crore
 
 These figures are based on percentage splits applied to total consolidated revenue for the year.
 
 Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging Infrastructure
 IOCL is setting up 10,000 EV charging stations nationwide by 2026,
 
 Green Hydrogen & Renewable Energy Initiatives
 * Green Hydrogen: IOCL is building India’s largest green hydrogen plant—a 10,000 TPA project at Panipat refinery—targeted to be operational by December 2027. .
 
 * Renewables: Plans to expand installed renewable power capacity from 256MW to 12GW.
 
 * Net-Zero Commitment: IOCL targets net-zero emissions by 2046, with all refineries transitioning to green hydrogen and deployment of energy-efficient, low-carbon technologies.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
IOCL’s growth is anchored in expanding its refining and petrochemical capacity through major capex and integration projects, while strengthening revenue stability via a diversified value chain and leading market share in key fuel segments. The company is advancing India’s green energy transition by building the nation’s largest green hydrogen plant, shifting refinery hydrogen use to green sources, and scaling renewable power and EV infrastructure nationwide. Strategic expansion into specialty chemicals, value-added products, and digital and clean energy services further enhances its product portfolio.

Name: Oil & Natural Gas Corpn Ltd
Overview:
Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) is India’s largest state-owned oil and gas enterprise, accounting for approximately 71% of domestic crude oil and 84% of natural gas production. As a Maharatna PSU, ONGC is deeply integrated across the oil and gas value chain—from upstream exploration and production to refining, petrochemicals, and marketing through subsidiaries such as HPCL and MRPL. ONGC also operates internationally via ONGC Videsh, managing 37 oil and gas projects in 17 countries. With consolidated revenues of ₹6,75,655 crore and net profits of ₹36,226 crore in FY2025, ONGC remains India’s most profitable PSU. The company is investing aggressively in renewable energy and green technologies, aiming for 10 GW of renewable energy by 2030, in line with India’s decarbonization goals.
 
 Business Segments (with Revenue Percentage, FY2025)
 Oil & Gas Exploration & Production (Upstream):
 ~16–20% of revenue
 Exploration, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas within India and abroad.
 
 Refining & Petrochemicals (Downstream, via Subsidiaries HPCL, MRPL):
 ~78–80% of revenue
 Refining, processing, and marketing of petroleum products, petrochemicals, and LPG.
 
 Alternative & Renewable Energy and Others:
 ~2–4% of revenue
 Wind and solar power projects, oilfield services, technology solutions, LNG, consulting, coal mining, and project management.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook:
ONGC is focusing on aggressive capital allocation toward renewable energy, including wind, solar, and green hydrogen, while enhancing exploration and production through advanced technologies, digitalization, and new project development. International expansion via stake sales, joint ventures, and asset acquisitions aims to access technology and capital. Strengthening integration across refining, petrochemicals, and marketing will improve value chain resilience. Alignment with government policies on energy security, decarbonization, and sector reforms, along with diversification into oil-to-chemical conversion, LNG, and carbon capture, positions ONGC for sustainable, long-term growth and profitability.

Name: Reliance Industries Ltd
Overview:
Reliance Industries Limited (RIL) is India’s largest private sector corporation and a Fortune 500 company, recognized for its substantial market capitalization and global footprint. Initially focused on oil and gas, RIL has systematically diversified its operations to include consumer-centric verticals such as retail, digital services, and media. The company operates in over 100 countries and is a major contributor to India’s merchandise exports.
 
 Business Segment:
 Oil & Gas : (56.6%) Core and largest business, including refining, exploration, and petrochemicals.
 Retail: (30.8% YoY) One of India’s largest retailers, covering grocery, fashion, electronics, and more.
 Digital Services: (15% YoY)Telecommunication and broadband services via Jio Platforms, rapidly growing subscriber base.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook:
Reliance Industries Limited (RIL) is pursuing an ambitious growth strategy focused on renewable energy, aiming for 100GW capacity by 2030 through investments in solar, wind, green hydrogen, batteries, and carbon capture technologies. Aggressive capital expenditure plans, including giga factories for solar and battery production, support vertical integration and technological leadership. The company targets net-zero carbon emissions by 2035, aligning with global ESG trends to attract international investors. RIL continues to leverage its scale and ecosystem across retail, digital, and media platforms, while strategic partnerships and minority stake sales to global tech majors provide capital and advanced technology, further accelerating growth.

Name: GAIL (India) Ltd
Overview:
GAIL (Gas Authority of India Limited) is India’s largest integrated natural gas company and a Maharatna PSU under the Government of India. It operates across the natural gas value chain — from trading and transmission to city gas distribution, petrochemicals, LPG production, and renewables. GAIL also holds stakes in key ventures like Petronet LNG and Ratnagiri Gas & Power, runs subsidiaries in Singapore and the US, and is a top 10 global LNG portfolio marketer.
 
Business Segments 
 
 Natural Gas Trading/Marketing: ~75% of total revenue — includes bulk procurement, trading, and supply to industries like fertilizers and power.
 
 Natural Gas Transmission: ~10% — operates India’s largest network of cross-country pipelines.
 
 Petrochemicals: ~8% — manufactures polymers and related products.
 
 LPG & Liquid Hydrocarbons: ~5% — includes LPG production and transmission.
 
 City Gas Distribution (CGD): ~2% — retail supply of CNG and piped natural gas to households and vehicles.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
GAIL India’s growth is driven by a planned ₹30,000 crore capex over the next three years targeting pipelines, petrochemicals, CGD, and renewable energy projects. The company aims to diversify beyond fossil fuels with ₹26,000 crore investment in renewables by 2030, while expanding its pipeline network to connect new gas fields and RLNG terminals, enhancing supply security. Securing 7–8 MTPA of long-term LNG contracts will ensure fuel availability, supporting India’s goal to increase natural gas share in the energy mix from 6% to 15% by 2030.

Name: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd
Overview:
Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HPCL) is a leading oil refining and marketing company in India, engaged in refining crude oil, producing hydrocarbons, and managing E&P blocks. It operates major refineries in Mumbai and Visakhapatnam and holds a 50% stake in the Bathinda refinery. HPCL has a strong nationwide marketing network with thousands of retail outlets and LPG distributors, holding a 24% market share in India’s petroleum marketing segment. The company is aggressively expanding its refining and petrochemical capacity and diversifying into LNG imports to strengthen its long-term profitability and market presence.
 
 Business Segments 
 
 High-Speed Diesel (HSD): ~51% of total revenue
 
 Motor Spirit (Petrol): ~26%
 
 Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG): ~13%
 
 Other Petroleum Products, E&P, Petrochemicals, and LNG: ~10%
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Hindustan Petroleum is executing a massive CAPEX and modernization plan, aiming to double profits through refinery expansion, petrochemical integration, and LNG diversification. With strategic stakes in major projects like the Rajasthan refinery and strong retail/LPG distribution, HPCL is strengthening both upstream and downstream segments.

Name: Adani Total Gas Ltd
Overview:
Adani Total Gas, a key subsidiary of the Adani Group, is one of India’s largest players in the City Gas Distribution (CGD) sector. It supplies natural gas through an extensive pipeline network to domestic, commercial, industrial, and transport segments. The company also engages in the retail sale of LPG cylinders and gas appliances, contributing to India’s shift towards cleaner fuels.
 
 Business Segments
 Piped Natural Gas (PNG): Supplies piped gas to households, commercial kitchens, and industries — 55% of FY22 revenue.
 
 Compressed Natural Gas (CNG): Supplies CNG for transportation (auto, cars, buses) — 45% of FY22 revenue.
 
 LPG Retail & Appliances: Sells LPG cylinders and gas stoves, supporting fuel diversification.
 
 New Energy Initiatives: Expanding into compressed biogas (CBG) and electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Adani Total Gas Ltd (ATGL) is planning a major expansion with Rs 18,000–20,000 crore investments over the next 8–10 years to scale its CNG infrastructure and pipeline network. The company targets 1,800+ CNG stations and aims to provide piped gas to households across new geographies.

Name: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd
Overview:
Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) is one of India’s leading public sector oil and gas companies engaged in refining crude oil and marketing a wide range of petroleum products. It accounts for about 14–15% of India’s total refining capacity and operates an extensive retail network with 20,000+ fuel stations, 82 retail depots, 54 LPG bottling plants, and 56 aviation fuel stations, serving industrial, commercial, household, and aviation customers nationwide. BPCL also markets lubricants under the MAK brand and is expanding its presence in petrochemicals, gas, and renewables.
 
Business Segments :
 
 High-Speed Diesel (HSD): ~52% of total revenue
 
 Motor Spirit (Petrol): ~23.4% of total revenue
 
 Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG): ~11.3% of total revenue
 
 Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) & Lubricants: Remaining share (ATF ~21% domestic market share; Lubricants ~25% market share under MAK brand)
 
 Gas Business & Petrochemicals: Growing focus via subsidiaries like Bharat Gas Resources Ltd. and planned capacity additions.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
BPCL’s growth is anchored on ‘Project Aspire’ and a multi-pronged strategy that combines modernization, diversification, and sustainability. Significant investments in petrochemicals, lubricants, and green energy will mitigate risks from declining fuel demand amid rising EV adoption, while its extensive retail footprint ensures steady cash flows and cross-selling opportunities. Expansion in the gas and renewables segments strengthens portfolio resilience and aligns with India’s energy transition goals.

Name: Oil India Ltd
Overview:
Oil India Ltd is a leading state-owned oil and gas company engaged in the exploration, development, production, and transportation of crude oil and natural gas in India. The company also owns and operates a refinery in Numaligarh, Assam, and maintains an extensive pipeline network for crude oil and multi-product transport. With a diversified revenue base dominated by crude oil sales, Oil India plays a key role in India’s upstream hydrocarbon sector while actively expanding its refining and pipeline operations to support long-term growth.
 
 Business Segments 
 Sale of Crude Oil: ~76%
 
 Sale of Natural Gas: ~18%
 
 Pipeline Transportation: ~3%
 
 Other Activities: ~3%
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Oil India Ltd is transforming from a conventional oil & gas player into a diversified energy enterprise, backed by integrated operations and significant investments in green energy projects. Its capex-intensive expansion at Numaligarh Refinery and commitment to net-zero by 2046—with over ₹2 lakh crore in green investments—highlight its pivot toward long-term sustainability. With upstream strength, refining scale, and infrastructure leverage, OIL is strategically positioned to capture both legacy energy demand and the emerging clean energy wave in India.

Name: Mangalore Refinery And Petrochemicals Ltd
Overview:
MRPL, a subsidiary of ONGC, operates a 15 MMTPA complex refinery in Mangaluru capable of processing varied crude grades. Its business spans refining, petrochemicals, and fuel retail under the ‘HiQ’ brand. The company also produces polypropylene (‘Mangpol’) and aromatics like paraxylene and benzene.

It has a growing retail footprint of 101 outlets and expanding petrochemical capacity. With 69% of revenue from domestic sales and 31% from exports, MRPL serves a balanced market. Infrastructure expansions like the Devangonthi terminal and innovation through 22 IP filings highlight its forward-focused strategy.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Mangalore Refinery & Petrochemicals Limited (MRPL) is gearing up for growth by broadening its retail footprint, aiming to nearly triple its network through a significant rollout of new outlets—bringing robust energy products closer to consumers. At the same time, the company is shifting focus toward the petrochemical business, investing heavily in local production capacity to hedge against refining volatility and align with rising demand.

Name: Waaree Energies Ltd
Overview:
Waaree Energies Ltd is a leading Indian renewable energy company specializing in solar photovoltaic (PV) modules and EPC (engineering, procurement, and construction) solutions. The company designs, manufactures, and installs solar panels for residential, commercial, and utility-scale projects. Waaree Energies operates modern manufacturing facilities capable of producing high-efficiency solar modules and provides end-to-end project solutions including rooftop and ground-mounted solar systems.

The company is committed to promoting sustainable energy adoption in India and globally. Its strategic focus on research, quality, and operational excellence ensures reliable solar solutions for diverse applications. Waaree Energies also emphasizes global exports and partnerships, contributing to the growth of renewable energy infrastructure while supporting India’s energy transition goals.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Waaree Energies is poised for exponential growth as it transitions from a solar module manufacturer to a full-stack renewable energy solutions provider. With confirmed orders worth ₹49,000 crore and a 100+ GW pipeline, plus integrated expansion across modules, inverters, battery storage, and hydrogen electrolysers, Waaree is building unmatched capacity leadership in India.

Name: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd
Overview:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd (IREDA) is a government-owned public financial institution operating under the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE). Established with the aim to promote, develop, and commercialize renewable energy and energy efficiency projects, IREDA functions as India’s largest green-focused NBFC and has also been classified as an "Infrastructure Finance Company" by the RBI. It was granted 'Navratna' status by the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy, reflecting its strategic significance and operational independence.

The company plays a crucial role in financing renewable energy projects across sectors such as solar, wind, hydro, biomass, ethanol, green mobility, and energy efficiency. With 75% ownership by the Government of India, IREDA is a strategic vehicle for the country’s green financing goals. It maintains a strong nationwide presence, covering 23 states and 4 union territories, and offers end-to-end financial solutions for clean energy projects, including equipment manufacturing and transmission.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

The Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency (IREDA) is accelerating its role as a pivotal financier in India's renewable energy sector. With the nation's target of achieving 500 GW of non-fossil fuel-based capacity by 2030, IREDA is poised to play a crucial role in this transition. The agency is expanding its financing portfolio to include emerging sectors such as green ammonia, pumped storage hydropower, and decentralized solar rooftop projects under initiatives like the PM KUSUM scheme.

Name: Inox India Ltd
Overview: Incorporated in 1976, Inox India Limited designs, engineers, manufactures, and installs cryogenic equipment and systems. It serves industrial gas, LNG, hydrogen, aerospace, scientific research, and beverage industries. The company operates three manufacturing facilities — Kalol, Kandla SEZ, and Silvassa — with an installed capacity of 3,100 equivalent tank units and 2.4 million disposable cylinders annually. It exports to 100+ countries and is part of the Inox Group.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Inox India Ltd is strategically expanding its capabilities to meet the growing demand for cryogenic equipment across various sectors. The company is establishing a state-of-the-art 30-acre manufacturing facility in Savli, Gujarat, which aims to double India's current cryogenic equipment manufacturing capacity. This expansion is expected to support the nation's transition to green energy by enhancing production of cryogenic tanks for liquefied natural gas (LNG) and other industrial gases.

Name: Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd
Overview:
Emmvee Photovoltaic Power Ltd is a Bengaluru-based solar company that manufactures high-performance photovoltaic (PV) modules and solar cells. It is an integrated player – meaning it produces both the solar cells and the assembled modules – which helps it maintain better control over cost and quality. Emmvee is known for leveraging advanced technologies like TOPCon and Mono-PERC to deliver efficient solar modules, and it has four manufacturing plants in Karnataka. 

Over the years, Emmvee has built a strong presence not only in India but also in Europe through its EPC (engineering, procurement, construction) projects. The company offers utility-scale PV systems, rooftop solutions, and B2B solar modules, and it has built a reputation for innovation, quality, and sustainability in its manufacturing processes.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Emmvee is aggressively scaling up its manufacturing capacity: it plans to nearly double its module capacity and triple its cell capacity over the next few years, riding on strong solar demand in India and policy support. It aims to use fresh capital to pay down debt, strengthen its balance sheet, and fund this expansion.

Name: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd
Overview:
ACME Solar Holdings Ltd, incorporated in 2015, is a leading renewable energy company in India. It develops, owns, and operates a diversified portfolio of solar, wind, hybrid, and Firm and Dispatchable Renewable Energy (FDRE) projects. 

ACME focuses on large-scale utility projects and innovative energy storage solutions, contributing to India’s transition toward clean and sustainable energy. The company combines technology-driven project execution with long-term Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) to ensure stable operations and reliable power delivery.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd is rapidly expanding its footprint in India's renewable energy sector, focusing on solar, wind, hybrid, and Firm and Dispatchable Renewable Energy (FDRE) projects. The company has secured long-term Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) for 5,130 MW, with 2,890 MW operational and an additional 1,840 MW under development.

Name: SJVN Ltd
Overview:
SJVN Limited is a state-owned enterprise engaged in the generation and sale of electricity, with a diversified portfolio across hydro, thermal, and renewable energy sources. Alongside power generation, the company provides consultancy services for hydro projects and has been accorded Navratna status in August 2024, reflecting its strategic importance and operational scale.

The company is focusing on large-scale capacity additions in solar, hydro, and thermal projects, supported by strong PPA tie-ups and a robust execution pipeline.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management is optimistic about meeting aggressive commissioning targets, supported by strong execution, PPA security, and government-backed renewable initiatives. The company expects capacity mix to shift further towards renewables, with operational efficiencies in hydro and thermal supporting stable cash flows. Long-term growth is anchored in expanding REIA-led projects, pumped storage developments, and timely completion of large-scale generation assets.

Name: NHPC Ltd
Overview:
NHPC is India’s premier hydroelectric power generation company and a Mini Ratna Category I PSU under the Government of India. Primarily, NHPC generates and sells bulk power to state power utilities while also providing project management, EPC construction services, consultancy, and power trading. Its core operations support India’s clean energy goals with a major focus on expanding hydro and renewable energy capacity.
 
 Business Segments
Hydroelectric Power Generation: Core business; bulk power supply through hydro projects.
 
Project Management & EPC: Provides project execution, construction contracts, and consultancy.
 
Renewables & Solar: Actively developing floating solar projects and hybrid clean energy parks.
 
Energy Storage: Expanding into large-scale pumped hydro storage for grid stability.
 
 Revenue Summary
 Nearly 100% of revenue is derived from the generation and sale of hydroelectric power, with incremental contribution from consultancy, trading, and EPC services. NHPC’s total installed capacity is expanding, with 8 new hydro projects (6,434 MW) under construction and additional projects of ~6,752 MW under clearance. The company’s clean energy portfolio is set to diversify with solar and pumped hydro storage initiatives.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

NHPC is pursuing aggressive expansion into pumped hydro storage with a planned 20–22 GW pipeline, targeting first commissioning by FY 2028–29. The company is also moving into floating solar projects and expanding hydro capacity through key partnerships with state agencies. With strong government backing and leadership in hydroelectric power, NHPC is expected to play a vital role in India’s transition to a renewable-heavy energy mix, benefiting from increasing demand for grid stability and clean power.

Name: NTPC Green Energy Ltd
Overview:
NTPC Green Energy Ltd is the renewable subsidiary of NTPC Limited, created to accelerate the group’s clean energy ambitions. Its portfolio covers solar, wind, small hydro, and energy storage projects, with an increasing focus on new technologies such as green hydrogen. It is central to NTPC’s vision of achieving large-scale decarbonization.

The company manages both operational projects and a large pipeline of under-construction capacity. With its strong financial backing and NTPC’s expertise in execution, it has quickly emerged as a key player in India’s renewable landscape. Its public listing further enhanced visibility and investor confidence in its growth story.
Key Takeways:
Capacity & Operations
NTPC Green currently operates close to 4 GW of renewable energy capacity while another ~20 GW is under construction, making it one of the fastest expanding green power companies in India.

Growth Ambitions
The company has laid out an ambitious target of achieving 60 GW of renewable capacity by FY2032. This positions it at the forefront of India’s clean energy transition, backed by strong policy tailwinds.

Future Outlook
With rising electricity demand and government support for renewables, NTPC Green is set to play a central role in meeting India’s climate commitments while delivering strong shareholder value.

Name: Jaiprakash Power Ventures Ltd
Overview:
Jaiprakash Power Ventures Limited (JPVL), incorporated in 1994, is engaged in power generation through thermal and hydroelectric plants, along with operations in coal mining, sand mining, and cement grinding. The company operates strategically located plants in Uttarakhand and Madhya Pradesh, supported by captive coal mines to ensure fuel security for its thermal operations.

JPVL has steadily diversified its energy portfolio, combining renewable hydropower with large-scale thermal capacity. The company is also pursuing operational efficiency and cost optimization initiatives to strengthen its position in the Indian power sector, while continuing to focus on sustainable, reliable, and affordable power supply.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management aims to sustain high PLFs, further optimize fuel procurement costs, and enhance profitability through operational efficiencies. Focus will remain on leveraging existing assets, strengthening long-term contracts, and exploring selective growth opportunities in renewable and allied sectors.

Name: Adani Green Energy Ltd
Overview:
Adani Green Energy Limited is India’s largest and one of the world’s top renewable energy companies, operating as a pure-play renewable power holding company for solar, wind, and hybrid energy projects. The company builds, owns, and operates utility-scale grid-connected solar, wind, and hybrid power assets, supplying electricity under long-term PPAs with central and state government entities across 12 Indian states.
 
 Business Segment Breakdown (FY2025)
 Power Supply:
 This is the core revenue segment, accounting for approximately 75% of total revenue or ₹7,121 crore for FY25. Power supply revenue is generated from the sale of electricity under long-term contracts.
 
 Traded Goods:
 The remaining 25% of revenue, or about ₹2,374 crore, comes from the sale of traded goods and other ancillary renewable business activities.
 
 Total Revenue (FY25):
 ₹9,495 crore, marking a 23% annual increase.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook:
The company plans massive capacity expansion, targeting 45 GW of renewable energy by 2030, while strengthening backward integration in solar manufacturing to improve cost efficiency and supply control. Large-scale hybrid projects, such as the Khavda park, and strategic international partnerships—particularly with TotalEnergies—will enhance technology access and capital inflows.

Name: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd
Overview:
Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd is one of India’s leading providers of renewable energy solutions for commercial and industrial (C&I) customers. The company focuses on supplying clean power through solar and wind energy projects, helping businesses reduce electricity costs and meet their sustainability and carbon reduction goals. Its offerings include rooftop solar installations, open-access renewable energy projects and captive power solutions tailored to enterprise clients.

With a long operating history, the company has built a strong portfolio of renewable energy assets and long-term relationships with corporates across multiple industries. It manages the entire value chain, including project development, engineering, procurement, construction and operations and maintenance. This integrated model enables it to deliver reliable and scalable clean energy solutions while maintaining operational efficiency.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions aims to expand its renewable energy capacity by developing new solar, wind and hybrid power projects to meet growing demand from commercial and industrial clients. The company plans to strengthen its presence in open-access and captive segments while entering new geographies to diversify its customer base.

Name: Suzlon Energy Ltd
Overview:
Suzlon Energy Ltd is a leading renewable energy solutions provider with expertise across manufacturing, project execution, and O&M of wind turbine generators. It operates as a vertically integrated OEM, producing major components like blades, towers, generators, gearboxes, and nacelles, supported by in-house R&D and engineering capabilities.

The company offers end-to-end wind project services, including resource assessment, infrastructure development, power evacuation, and technical execution. With a track record of over 20 GW installations globally and a strong domestic footprint, Suzlon has positioned itself as a dominant player in India’s renewable energy market.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management aims for around 60% growth in deliveries, revenue, EBITDA, and normalized PAT in FY26, maintaining consolidated EBITDA margins at ~17%. The company plans to leverage sector growth, a robust domestic supply chain, and policy support to sustain momentum, while mitigating execution risks in land and transmission through proactive project selection.

Name: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd
Overview:
Saatvik Green Energy Limited, incorporated in 2015, is a company in India that manufactures high-efficiency solar PV modules and provides engineering, procurement and construction (EPC) services. It offers products based on advanced technologies like Mono PERC and N-TopCon modules in both monofacial and bifacial variants, serving residential, commercial, and large utility-scale solar power projects. The firm has established a strong manufacturing base in Ambala, Haryana, with significantly expanded production capacity over the years.

The company has steadily scaled its operations: starting with small module capacity when it commenced manufacturing, it has grown to over 3.8 GW of operational module manufacturing capacity. Besides module production, it also handles EPC contracts and operations & maintenance (O&M) services. The firm has won large supply contracts and is participating actively in India’s renewable energy push, positioning itself as an integrated solar energy player.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook

Saatvik plans to further increase its module and cell manufacturing capacity with new facilities (including one in Odisha), and move towards becoming a more vertically integrated solar players (ingot-wafer-cell-module chain). It aims to leverage strong demand for solar PV modules domestically and internationally by entering more export markets. The company is also expected to improve margins through adoption of higher-efficiency technologies, benefit from favourable state incentives, and use funds raised (such as via IPO) for paying down debt, expanding capacity

Name: Inox Wind Energy Ltd
Overview:
Inox Wind Energy Ltd (IWEL), part of the diversified INOXGFL Group, operates in the renewable energy sector through its holding in Inox Wind Limited (IWL). The company’s business spans the generation and sale of wind energy, along with providing engineering, procurement, and commissioning (EPC) services for wind farms. The group has a significant market presence in both chemicals and renewables, with a combined market capitalization of USD 10 billion.

IWEL is in the process of amalgamating into its subsidiary Inox Wind Limited, a strategic move aimed at simplifying the corporate structure, optimizing operational efficiency, and strengthening its market position. This integration is expected to further align strategic interests and enhance shareholder value, with the transaction anticipated to complete within FY25.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Post-amalgamation, IWEL aims to streamline operations, enhance management efficiency, and reinforce its position in the renewable energy sector. The strengthened balance sheet, healthy order book, and focused corporate structure are expected to drive sustainable growth in the coming years.

Name: Websol Energy System Ltd
Overview:
Websol Energy System Limited is a pure-play solar photovoltaic cell and module manufacturer, headquartered in West Bengal. Established in the mid-1990s as a technology-driven export-oriented enterprise, it now operates a fully integrated production facility in Falta SEZ.

The company specializes in high-efficiency mono-PERC bifacial solar cells and modules, supported by modern, automated manufacturing lines and rigorous quality, environmental, and safety certifications.
Key Takeways:
Growth Outlook
Websol Energy System is rapidly scaling up its solar manufacturing to meet growing demand. It’s doubling its solar cell capacity to 1.2 GW with a new 600 MW mono PERC line coming online by October, alongside its existing operations. On a larger scale, the company is investing heavily—about ₹3,000 crore—to add 4 GW each of solar cell and module capacity in phased expansions, aiming for full build-out by mid-2027 and 2028. These moves are fully backed by internal funds and institutional financing, reflecting strong operational confidence. The result is already visible—Websol recently reported nearly double quarter-over-quarter revenue, along with sharply improved margins

Name: Inox Green Energy Services Ltd
Overview:
Inox Green Energy Services Ltd is a leading pure-play provider of long-term operation and maintenance (O&M) services for wind energy assets across India. The company specializes in servicing wind turbine generators (WTGs) and supporting infrastructure through predictive and reactive maintenance, remote monitoring, and coordination with distribution utilities.

A subsidiary of Inox Wind Ltd under the INOXGFL group, it has developed over a decade of experience with a multi-gigawatt portfolio under service. With more than 3 GW under contract, it delivers turnkey solutions to ensure stable wind energy operations nationwide.
Key Takeways:
Growth or Future Outlook
Entering FY26, Inox Green Energy is positioned for continued progress. The increasing installed base of WTGs under O&M, along with rising demand for reliable maintenance, is expected to drive revenue and margin improvements. The steady rise in quarterly profits indicates operational leverage as the business scales.

Name: KPI Green Energy Ltd
Overview:
KPI Green Energy Ltd., part of the KP Group and incorporated in 2008, is engaged in developing, owning, and operating renewable power projects under its ‘Solarism’ brand. The company operates across solar and wind-solar hybrid formats, catering both as an Independent Power Producer (IPP) and as a service provider to Captive Power Producers (CPPs). Its portfolio spans multiple states, with strong execution capabilities and an expanding order pipeline.

The company has demonstrated rapid scale-up in capacity and market presence, supported by a favorable policy environment for renewable energy in India. With a robust order book, diversified customer base, and strategic expansion into new geographies and technologies, KPI Green is positioning itself for sustained growth.
Key Takeways:
Future Outlook
Management targets 60–70% annual growth until FY30, with FY26 performance expected to mirror FY25 momentum. Execution visibility extends into FY27, backed by a robust order pipeline, secured PPAs for all IPP projects, and strong demand from both government and C&I customers.

Name: Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd
Overview:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd is a global leader in end-to-end solar EPC (engineering, procurement, and construction) solutions and a prominent player in the operation and maintenance (O&M) of solar power assets.
